info:
الهدف من هذه القصائد هو توجيه قلوب الناس إلى الحق تبارك وتعالى. فالله أمرنا وقال "اذكروا الله ذكرا كثيرا". 
#The aim of spiritual odes [Qasidas] is to turn people's hearts to the Divine Most High. Allah Most High orders us to "Make truly lots of Mindfulness of Allah". #
وقد تم تأليف هذه القصائد وإنشادها من قبل شيوخ روحانيين لينقلوا تجربتهم الروحية لمن يريدها. والكثير من هذه القصائد أنشدت في حلقات الذكر العامة أو الموالد في دمشق أولا، ثم في تركيا والأردن والعراق ومصر والمغرب والجزائر وتونس وجنوب أفريقيا، وبلدان أخرى كثيرة،،، .
#These odes have been traditionally delivered by spiritually-composed authors to convey their spiritual experience to aspirants. Many of these odes have originally been delivered in a public dhikr gathering [Hadra] or Mawlid in Damascus, and then closely followed in Turky, Jordan, Iraq, Egypt, Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, South Africa, among many others.#
 وتحمل القصائد الكثير من الصور البيانية لتعبر عن التجليات الروحية للمؤلف، مثل الكأس ليشير إلى لذة اللقاء ومعرفة وحدانية الحق تعالى.  
#Qasidas typically carry metaphors that express the spiritual experience, such as a 'goblet' of wine, to refer to the ecstasy of experiencing the Oneness of the Divine Most High.#
 وعلاوة على كلمات القصيدة، فإن الأداء والحالة الروحية للمنشدين مع النغم المصاحب للذكر الجماعي لها تأثير واضح في توجيه القلوب إلى الله تعالى. ومن الجدير بالذكر أن القصائد ما هي إلا وسيلة للإرشاد ثم تذوق وحدانية الحق تعالى.  
#Apart from the words, the performance and spiritual state of the vocalists with the rhythm of the accompanying group dhikr have considerable influence in turning hearts to Allah Most High. It is worth mentioning that the qasidas are just means to provide guidance [Irshad] and experience of the Divine Oneness.#
وأخيرا، عظيم الاستفادة من هذه القصائد هي من نصيب الأشخاص الذين يتخذون النَّبِيّ صلى الله عليه وسلم  أسوة حسنة لهم، فيرجون الله واليوم الآخر، ويذكرون الله كثيرا   
#Finally, the person who would best benefit from these spiritual odes is the one who has taken the Prophet (Peace be upon him) as a role model in seeking Allah, minding the Last Day, and making lots of dhikr of Allah Most High.#
وقد أقرَّ النَّبِيّ صلى الله عليه وسم القصائد التي أنشدها الناس أمامه مثل "طلع البدر علينا" عند وصوله للمدينة، وقد أكرم كعب بن زهير عندما ألقى قصيدة البردة بين يديه. وقد أنشد النَّبِيّ صلى الله عليه وسلم  بعض القصائد القصيرة من ارتجاله هو، مثل ما فعل يوم الخندق، وفي غيرها من الحوادث.
#The Prophet (Peace be upon him) approved the qasidas composed by people around him, such as that of 'Tala'a al-Badru Alayna' when he first arrived to Madinah. He has even honoured  Kaab bin Zuhair on delivering the Qasida of Al-Burda. The Prophet himself composed short qasidas while digging the trench around Madinah, among other incidents.#
info_2:
The aim of spiritual odes [Qasidas] is to turn people's hearts to the Divine Most High. Allah Most High orders us to "Make truly lots of Mindfulness of Allah". #

الهدف من هذه القصائد هو توجيه قلوب الناس إلى الحق تبارك وتعالى. فالله أمرنا وقال "اذكروا الله ذكرا كثيرا".

#These odes have been traditionally delivered by spiritually-composed authors to convey their spiritual experience to aspirants. Many of these odes have originally been delivered in a public dhikr gathering [Hadra] or Mawlid in Damascus, and then closely followed in Turky, Jordan, Iraq, Egypt, Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, South Africa, among many others.#

وقد تم تأليف هذه القصائد وإنشادها من قبل شيوخ روحانيين لينقلوا تجربتهم الروحية لمن يريدها. والكثير من هذه القصائد أنشدت في حلقات الذكر العامة أو الموالد في دمشق أولا، ثم في تركيا والأردن والعراق ومصر والمغرب والجزائر وتونس وجنوب أفريقيا، وبلدان أخرى كثيرة،،،

#Qasidas typically carry metaphors that express the spiritual experience, such as a 'goblet' of wine, to refer to the ecstasy of experiencing the Oneness of the Divine Most High.#

وتحمل القصائد الكثير من الصور البيانية لتعبر عن التجليات الروحية للمؤلف، مثل الكأس ليشير إلى لذة اللقاء ومعرفة وحدانية الحق تعالى.

#Apart from the words, the performance and spiritual state of the vocalists with the rhythm of the accompanying group dhikr have considerable influence in turning hearts to Allah Most High. It is worth mentioning that the qasidas are just means to provide guidance [Irshad] and experience of the Divine Oneness.#

وعلاوة على كلمات القصيدة، فإن الأداء والحالة الروحية للمنشدين مع النغم المصاحب للذكر الجماعي لها تأثير واضح في توجيه القلوب إلى الله تعالى. ومن الجدير بالذكر أن القصائد ما هي إلا وسيلة للإرشاد ثم تذوق وحدانية الحق تعالى.

#Finally, the person who would best benefit from these spiritual odes is the one who has taken the Prophet (Peace be upon him) as a role model in seeking Allah, minding the Last Day, and making lots of dhikr of Allah Most High.#

وأخيرا، عظيم الاستفادة من هذه القصائد هي من نصيب الأشخاص الذين يتخذون النَّبِيّ r  أسوة حسنة لهم، فيرجون الله واليوم الآخر، ويذكرون الله كثيرا.

#The Prophet (Peace be upon him) approved the qasidas composed by people around him, such as that of 'Tala'a al-Badru Alayna' when he first arrived to Madinah. He has even honoured  Kaab bin Zuhair on delivering the Qasida of Al-Burda. The Prophet himself composed short qasidas while digging the trench around Madinah, among other incidents.#

وقد أقرَّ النَّبِيّ r  القصائد التي أنشدها الناس أمامه مثل "طلع البدر علينا" عند وصوله للمدينة، وقد أكرم كعب بن زهير عندما ألقى قصيدة البردة بين يديه. وقد أنشد النَّبِيّ r  بعض القصائد القصيرة من تأليف هو، مثل ما فعل يوم الخندق، وفي غيرها من الحوادث.

wirds.ar_wird_description: الغَزَلُ وشكوى الغرام للنبي ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Love of the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: al-ghazalu wa shakwaa al-gharaami lin-nabee ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: mawlaya salli wa sallim da'imaan abadaan [.....] 'alaa habeebika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمِنْ تَذَكُّرِ جِيْرَانٍ بِذِيْ سَلَمِ [.....] مَزَجْتَ دَمْعًا جَرَى مِنْ مُقْلَةٍ بِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Is it because of remembering neighbors at Dhi-salam in Madinah that you mingle with blood tears shed from your eyes?
wirds.transliteration: amin tadhakkuri jeeraanin bi dhi-salami [.....] mazaajta dam'an jaraa min muqlatin biddam

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمْ هَبَّتِ الرِّيْحُ مِنْ تِلْقَاءِ كَاظِمَةٍ [.....] وَأَوْمَضَ الْبَرْقُ فِي الظَّلْمَاءِ مِنْ اِضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Or has the wind blown from Kaazimah mountain in Madinah – and the lightning flashed in Idam’s dark near Madinah?
wirds.transliteration: am habbat ir-reeh min tilqaa'i kaazimatin [.....] wa awmaza al-barqu fi az-zulmaa'i min idham

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَا لِعَيْنَيْكَ اِنْ قُلْتَ اكْفُفَا هَمَتَا [.....] وَمَا لِقَلْبِكَ اِنْ قُلْتَ اسْتَفِقْ يَهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: What ails your eyes? When you bid them stop, they weep still more. What ails your heart? When you bid it to come to its senses, it wanders.
wirds.transliteration: famaa li'aynayka in qultak uffa hamataa [.....] wamaa liqalbika in qultas tafiq yahimmi

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَيَحْسَبُ الصَّبُّ أَنَّ الْحُبَّ مُنْكَتِمٌ [.....] مَا بَيْنَ مُنْسَجِمٍ مِنْهُ وَمُضْطَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Recon the lover that his love may be concealed, when a torrent’s in one part of him, and in the other, a conflagration?
wirds.transliteration: ayahsabu as-sabbu anna al-hubba munkatimun [.....] maa bayna munsaajimim minhoo wa mudtarrim

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَوْلَا الْهَوَى لَمْ تُرِقْ دَمْعًا عَلَى طَلَلٍ [.....] وَلَا أَرِقْتَ لِذِكْرِ الْبَانِ وَالْعَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: But for passion, you wouldn’t weep at an abandoned camp, nor lie awake at night recalling the willow and the mount.
wirds.transliteration: lawla al-hawaa lam turiq dam'an 'alaa tallalin [.....] wala areeqta lidhikri al-baani wal 'alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَكَيْفَ تُنْكِرُ حُبًّا بَعْدَ مَا شَهِدَتْ [.....] بِهِ عَلَيْكَ عُدُوْلُ الدَّمْعِ وَالسَّقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: So how can you deny your love, when witnesses of tears and sickness have testified to it against you?
wirds.transliteration: fakayfa tunkiru hubban ba'da maa shahidat [.....] bihi 'alayka 'udoolu ad-dam'i was-saquam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَثْبَتَ الْوَجْدُ خَطَّيْ عَبْرَةٍ وَضَنَى [.....] مِثْلَ الْبَهَارِ عَلَى خَدَّيْكَ وَالْعَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lovesick passion has written upon your cheeks two tear-lines like yellow and red.
wirds.transliteration: wa athbata al-wajdu khattay 'abratan wa danaa [.....] mithla al-bahaari 'alaa khaddayka wal 'anam

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَعَمْ سَرَى طَيْفُ مَنْ أَهْوَى فَأَرَّقَنِيْ [.....] وَالْحُبُّ يَعْتَرِضُ اللَّذَّاتِ بِالْأَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Yes! My loved one’s spirit haunted me, and denied me my sleep. For love ever obstructs pleasures with pain.
wirds.transliteration: na'am sara tayfu man ahwaaa fa arraqani [.....] wal hubbu ya'taridu al-ladhdhati bil-alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا لَائِمِيْ فِي الْهَوَى الْعُذْرِيِّ مَعْذِرَةً [.....] مِنِّيْ اِلَيْكَ وَلَوْ أَنْصَفْتَ لَمْ تَلُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You who reproach me for this chaste love: I seek your pardon! Yet has you judged fairly, you would not have reproached me at all.
wirds.transliteration: yaa laa'imi fi al-hawaa al-'uthriyyi ma'dhiratan [.....] minni ilayka walaw ansafta lam talumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَدَتْكَ حَالِيَ لَا سِرِّيْ بِمُسْتَتِرٍ [.....] عَنِ الْوُشَاةِ وَلَا دَائِيْ بِمُنْحَسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: May you be spared my state! I cannot hide my secret from my detractors; my sickness will not leave me.
wirds.transliteration: 'adatka haaliyyaa laa sirriyyi bimusattirin [.....] 'ani al-wushaati wala daaa'i bimuhhasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَحَّضْتَنِي النُّصْحَ لَكِنْ لَسْتُ أَسْمَعُهُ [.....] اِنَّ الْمُحِبَّ عَنِ الْعُذَّالِ فِيْ صَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You offered me sincere advice, but I did not heed it. A lover is deaf to all his reproachers.
wirds.transliteration: mahhadtani an-nus'ha lakin lastu asma'uhu [.....] inna al-muhibba 'ani al-'uth'aali fi samam

wirds.ar_wird_description: اِنِّي اتَّهَمْتُ نَصِيْحَ الشَّيْبِ فِيْ عَذَلِي [.....] وَالشَّيْبُ أَبْعَدُ فِيْ نُصْحٍ عَنِ التُّهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I suspect the counsel even of my own grey hairs; although their advice is far indeed from deception.
wirds.transliteration: inni itthamtun nasiha ash-shaybi fi 'adhali [.....] was-shaybu ab'adu fi nus'hin 'ani at-tuhami

wirds.ar_wird_description: التحذير من هوى النفس
wirds.en_wird_description: Selfishness Lamented
wirds.transliteration: at-tahzeer min hawa an-nafs

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّ أَمَّارَتِيْ بِالسُّوْءِ مَا اتَّعَظَتْ  [.....] مِنْ جَهْلِهَا بِنَذِيْرِ الشَّيْبِ وَالْهَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Thanks to its foolishness, my ill-urging ego has paid no heed to the warner: white hair and old age.
wirds.transliteration: fa inna ammaarati bis-suu'i maa itta'adhat [.....] min jahlihaa binazeerish-shaybi wal-haram

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا أَعَدَّتْ مِنَ الْفِعْلِ الْجَمِيْلِ قِرَى  [.....] ضَيْفٍ أَلَمَّ بِرَأْسِيْ غَيْرَ مُحْتَشِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Neither has it prepared fair deeds in hospitable welcome for a guest who has taken up residence on my head.
wirds.transliteration: Wa laa a'addat mina al-fi'li al-jameeli qiraa [.....] daifan allama bi ra'si ghayra muhtasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَوْ كُنْتُ أَعْلَمُ أَنِّيْ مَا أُوَقِّرُهُ  [.....] كَتَمْتُ سِرَّا بَدَا لِيْ مِنْهُ بِالْكَتَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Had I known that I will not be honoring it, I would have concealed its secret by dyeing it black.
wirds.transliteration: Law kuntu a'lamu anni ma uwaqqiruhu [.....] katamtu sirran bada li minhu bil-katam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَنْ لِيْ بِرَدِّ جِمَاحٍ مِنْ غَوَايَتِهَا  [.....] كَمَا يُرَدُّ جِمَاحُ الْخَيْلِ بِاللُّجُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Who will help me curb a bolting rebel’s willfulness in the way that a rebel stallion may be curbed with reins?
wirds.transliteration: Man li biraddi jimaahin min ghawayatiha [.....] kamaa yuraddu jimaahu al-khayli billujumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَلَا تَرُمْ بِالْمَعَاصِيْ كَسْرَ شَهْوَتِهَا [.....]  اِنَّ الطَّعَامَ يُقَوِّيْ شَهْوَةَ النَّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Do not try to subdue unlawful desires by satisfying them. Food only increases a glutton’s desires.
wirds.transliteration: Falaa tarum bil-ma'aasi kasra shahwatiha [.....] inna al-ta'aama yuqawwi shahwata al-nahimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالنَّفْسُ كَالطِّفْلِ إِنْ تُهمِلْهُ شَبَّ عَلَى  [.....] حُبِّ الرَّضَاعِ وَإِنْ تَفْطِمْهُ يَنْفَطِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The ego is like a child: neglect it, it will grow still suckling; only if you wean it, it will be weaned.
wirds.transliteration: Wa al-nafsu kal-ṭifli in tuhmilhu shabba 'ala [.....] hubbi al-raḍa'i wa in taftimhu yanfaṭim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاصْرِفْ هَوَاهَا وَحَاذِرْ أَنْ تُوَلِّيَهُ  [.....] اِنَّ الْهَوَى مَا تَوَلَّى يُصْمِ أَوْ يَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Frustrate its whims; be wary of giving it power, for whims pollute or pervert whatever they control.
wirds.transliteration: Fasrif hawaha wa haadhir an tuwaliyahu [.....] inna al-hawaa ma tawalla yusmi aw yasimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَرَاعِهَا وَهْيَ فِي الْأَعْمَالِ سَائِمَةٌ  [.....] وَاِنْ هِيَ اسْتَحْلَتِ الْمَرْعَى فَلَا تُسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Guard it as it grazes in the pastures of deeds. Should it find the grazing sweet, let it not roam.
wirds.transliteration: Wa ra'eeha wa hiya fi al-a'maali sa'imatun [.....] wa in hiya ishtalati al-mara'a falaa tusaimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ حَسَّنَتْ لَذَّةً لِلْمَرْءِ قَاتِلَةً  [.....] مِنْ حَيْثُ لَمْ يَدْرِ أَنَّ السُّمَّ فِي الدَّسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Many a delight has it approved which proves murderous, for some do not know that the fat contains a poison.
wirds.transliteration: Kam hassanat ladhathan lil-mar'i qaatilatan [.....] min haythu lam yadri anna al-summ fi al-dasami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاخْشَ الدَّسَائِسَ مِنْ جُوْعٍ وَمِنْ شِبَعٍ  [.....] فَرُبَّ مَخْمَصَةٍ شَرٌّ مِنَ التُّخَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Fear the evil of hunger and satiety, for being hungry is sometimes worse than overeating.
wirds.transliteration: Wa khsha al-dasaa'isa min ju'in wa min shib'a [.....] farubb makhmasatin sharrun min al-tukhami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاسْتَفْرِغِ الدَّمْعَ مِنْ عَيْنٍ قَدِ امْتَلَأَتْ [.....]  مِنَ الْمَحَارِمِ وَالْزَمْ حِمْيَةَ النَّدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shed tears from an eye that has stuffed itself with forbidden sights; hold strong to a diet of regret.
wirds.transliteration: Wa istafriqi al-dam'a min 'aynin qad imtala'at [.....] mina al-maharaami wa alzam himyata al-nadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَخَالِفِ النَّفْسَ وَالشَّيْطَانَ وَاعْصِهِمَا [.....] وَاِنْ هُمَا مَحَّضَاكَ النُّصْحَ فَاتَّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Disobey the ego and the devil; suspect them both even when they offer you true counsel.
wirds.transliteration: Wa khalifi al-nafs wa al-shaytaana wa 'sihimaa [.....] wa in huma maḥaddaka al-nus'ha fatthim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمَا خَصْمًا وَلَا حَكَمًا ف [.....] َأَنْتَ تَعْرِفُ كَيْدَ الْخَصْمِ وَالْحَكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Obey neither of them as a complainant or an arbiter. Well you know the complainant’s and the arbiter’s plotting.
wirds.transliteration: Wa laa tuta'i minhuma khasman wa laa hakaman fa [.....] anta ta'rifu kayda al-khasmi wa al-hakami

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ مِنْ قَوْلٍ بِلَا عَمَلٍ [.....]  لَقَدْ نَسَبْتُ بِهِ نَسْلاً لِذِيْ عُقُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I seek forgiveness of God for words not followed by deeds, for by them did I attribute progeny to a sterile man.
wirds.transliteration: Astaghfiru Allah min qawlin bila 'amalin [.....] laqad nasabtu bihi naslan lidhi 'uqumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمَرْتُكَ الْخَيْرَ لَكِنْ مَا ائْتَمَرْتُ بِهِ [.....]  وَمَا اسْتَقَمْتُ فَمَا قَوْلِيْ لَكَ اسْتَقِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I commend goodness to you while not confronting myself. Being crooked, of what use is my command to be straight?
wirds.transliteration: Amartuka al-khayra lakin ma atamartu bihi [.....] wa ma istaqamtu fama qawlii laka istaqimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا تَزَوَّدْتُ قَبْلَ الْمَوْتِ نَافِلَةً  [.....] وَلَمْ أُصَلِّ سِوَى فَرْضٍ وَلَمْ أصُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: No optional devotions have I accumulated, ready for my demise; nor have I fasted, nor prayed, more than the minimum required.
wirds.transliteration: Wa laa tazawwadtu qabla al-mawti naafilatan [.....] wa lam usalli siwa fardhin wa lam asumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مدح النبي ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Praises of the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: Madḥ al-Nabī ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: ظَلَمْتُ سُنَّةَ مَنْ أَحْيَا الظَّلَامَ إلى  [.....] أَنِ اشْتَكَتْ قَدَمَاهُ الضُّرَّ مِنْ وَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have wronged the example of him who revived the black nights, praying until his feet complained of painful swelling.
wirds.transliteration: Zalamtu sunnata man ahya'a az-zalam ila [.....] ani ishtakat qadamahu ad-durra min warami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَشَدَّ مِنْ سَغَبٍ أَحْشَاءَهُ وطَوَى [.....]  تَحْتَ الْحِجَارَةِ كَشْحًا مُتْرَفَ الْأَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Over his belly and soft skin he placed a stone, tightening a belt over it to lessen the hunger-pangs.
wirds.transliteration: Washadda min saqabih ash-sha'ah wa-tawa [.....] tahtal hijarati kashhan mutrafal adami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَرَاوَدَتْهُ الْجِبَالُ الشُّمُّ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ  [.....] عَنْ نَفْسِهِ فَأَرَاهَا أَيَّمَا شَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: High mountains sought to tempt him by turning to gold, but he showed them lofty height upon height.
wirds.transliteration: Waraadathul jibalu ash-shummu min dhahabin [.....] an nafsihi fa'raaha ayama shamami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَكَّدَتْ زُهْدَهُ فِيْهَا ضَرُوْرَتُهُ [.....]  اِنَّ الضَّرُوْرَةَ لَا تَعْدُوْ عَلَى الْعِصَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: His dire need only confirmed his detachment from them. A need such as his shall overpower the infallible.
wirds.transliteration: Wa akaddat zuhduhoo feehaa darooratuhu [.....] inna ad-daroora laa ta'doo alaa al-isami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكَيْفَ تَدْعُوْ إِلَى الدُّنْيَا ضَرُوْرَةُ مَنْ [.....]  لَوْلَاهُ لَمْ تُخْرَجِ الدُّنْيَا مِنَ الْعَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How could need tempt him to worldliness when but for him the world would not have been brought from the void?
wirds.transliteration: Wa kayfa tad'u ila ad-dunya darooratu man [.....] law laahu lam tukhriji ad-dunya mina al-adami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ سَيِّدُ الْكَوْنَيْنِ وَالثَّقَلَيْنِ  [.....] وَالْفَرِيْقَيْنِ مِنْ عُرْبٍ وَمِنْ عَجَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the most honorable of both worlds, both jinn and humankind and both groups: Arabs and non-Arabs.
wirds.transliteration: Muhammadan sayyidu al-kawnayni wa-thaqalayni [.....] wal fareeqayni min 'urbin wa min 'ajami

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَبِيُّنَا الْآمِرُ النَّاهِيْ فَلَا أَحَدٌ  [.....] أَبَرَّ فِيْ قَوْلِ لَا مِنْهُ وَلَا نَعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Our Prophet ﷺ is the one who commands good, forbids evil. There is none more faithful to his word, whether Yes or No.
wirds.transliteration: Nabi'una al-aamir an-naahi falaa ahadun [.....] abarra fee qawli laa minhoo wa laa na'ami

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُوَ الْحَبِيْبُ الَّذِيْ تُرْجَى شَفَاعَتُهُ  [.....] لِكُلِّ هَوْلٍ مِنَ الْأَهْوَالِ مُقْتَحَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He is the loved one whose intercession is hoped for; a victor against every terror and calamity.
wirds.transliteration: Huwa al-habeebu alladhii turjā shafa'atuhu [.....] likulli hawlin mina al-ahwaali muqtahami

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَعَا اِلَى اللهِ فَالْمُسْتَمْسِكُونَ بِهِ [.....]  مُسْتَمْسِكُوْنَ بِحَبْلٍ غَيْرِ مُنْفَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: To God was his call, and those who hold fast to him hold fast to a rope that shall never break.
wirds.transliteration: Daa ila Allahi fal-mustamsikoona bihii [.....] mustamsikoona bihablin ghayri munfasiimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاقَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ فِيْ خَلْقٍ وَفِيْ خُلُقٍ  [.....] وَلَمْ يُدَانُوْهُ فِيْ عِلْمٍ وَلَا كَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In his form and his qualities, he excelled the other Prophets. Their knowledge and nobility did not rival his own.
wirds.transliteration: Faaqan nabiyyina fi khalqin wa fee khuluqin [.....] wlam yudaanoohu fee 'ilmin wa laa karamii

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّهُمْ مِنْ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ مُلْتَمِسٌ  [.....] غَرْفًا مِنَ الْبَحْرِ أَوْ رَشْفًا مِنَ الدِّيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They all seek from the Prophet ﷺ handfuls from the ocean or drops of the drizzle.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kulluhum min rasoolil laahi multamisoona [.....] ghorfan mina al-bahri aw rashfan mina ad-diyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَوَاقِفُوْنَ لَدَيْهِ عِنْدَ حَدِّهِمِ  [.....] مِنْ نُقْطَةِ الْعِلْمِ أَوْ مِنْ شَكْلَةِ الْحِكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Before him do they stand, respecting their limits; dots to his knowledge, or vowel-signs to his wisdom.
wirds.transliteration: Wa waaqifoona ladayhi 'inda hadihim [.....] min nuqtati al-'ilmi aw min shaklati al-hikami

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَهْوَ الَّذِيْ تَمَّ مَعْنَاهُ وَصُوْرَتُهُ [.....]  ثُمَّ اصْطَفَاهُ حَبِيْبًا بَارِئُ النَّسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He it is whose meaning and form reached perfection. Then the Inspirer of Souls chose him as His beloved.
wirds.transliteration: Fahuwa alladhii tamm ma'naahu wa sooratuhu [.....] thumma isstafahu habeeban baare'u an-nasami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُنَزَّهٌ عَنْ شَرِيْكٍ فِيْ مَحَاسِنِهِ  [.....] فَجَوْهَرُ الْحُسْنِ فِيْهِ غَيْرُ مُنْقَسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Too exalted is his beauty to have a rival. In him is the undivided essence of all beauty.
wirds.transliteration: Munazzahun 'an shareekin fee mahasinihi [.....] fajawharul husni feehi ghayru munqasimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَعْ مَا ادَّعَتْهُ النَّصَارَى فِيْ نَبِيِّهِمِ  [.....] وَاحْكُمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ مَدْحًا فِيْهِ وَاحْتَكِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Set aside the claim the Christians made about their Prophet ﷺ. Then compose the praises you wish of him.
wirds.transliteration: Da' ma addaatuhu an-nasaraa fee nabiyyihim [.....] wahkum bima shi'ta madhan feehi wahtakimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَانْسُبْ اِلَى ذَاتِهِ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ شَرَفٍ  [.....] وَانْسُبْ اِلَى قَدْرِهِ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ عِظَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: To his essence assign whatever you will of honor. To his stature assign what greatness you will
wirds.transliteration: Wansub ila dhaatihi ma shi'ta min sharafin [.....] wansub ila qadrihi ma shi'ta min 'i'zaami

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّ فَضْلَ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ لَيْسَ لَهُ [.....]  حَدٌّ فَيُعْرِبَ عَنْهُ نَاطِقٌ بِفَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For verily the merit of the Prophet ﷺ has no limits that might be expressed in words.
wirds.transliteration: Fa inna fadla rasoolil laahi laysa lahoo [.....] haddun fayu'rybu 'anhoo naatiqun bifaami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَوْ نَاسَبَتْ قَدْرَهُ آيَاتُهُ عِظَمًا [.....]  أَحْيَا اسْمُهُ حِيْنَ يُدْعَى دَارِسَ الرِّمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: If his miracles stood in proportion to his greatness, the very mention of his name would revive dry bones.
wirds.transliteration: Law naasabat qadrah ayaatuhu 'i'zaaman [.....] ahyaa ismahoo heena yad'aa daarisa ar-ramami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمْ يَمْتَحِنَّا بِمَا تَعْيَا الْعُقُوْلُ  [.....] بِهِ حِرْصًا عَلَيْنَا فَلَمْ نَرْتَبْ وَلَمْ نَهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He did not try us with things that baffle the mind – such was his concern for us – so we neither doubted nor strayed.
wirds.transliteration: Lam yamtahinna bima ta'yaa al-'uquulu [.....] bihi hirsan 'alaynaa falam nartab wa lam nahim

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَعْيَا الْوَرَى فَهْمُ مَعْنَاهُ فَلَيْسَ يُرَى [.....]  فِي الْقُرْبِ وَالْبُعُدِ فِيْهِ غَيْرُ مُنْفَحِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Understanding his meaning exhausts the human mind. Near and far, all were seen to be dumbstruck.
wirds.transliteration: A'yaa al-waraa fahmu ma'naahu falaysa yuraa [.....] fee al-qurbi wal-bu'udi feehi ghayru munfahim

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَالشَّمْسِ تَظْهَرُ لِلْعَيْنَيْنِ مِنْ بُعُدٍ  [.....] صَغِيْرَةً وَتُكِلُّ الطَّرْفَ مِنْ أَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He is like the sun: To the eye at a distance it seems small, but when near, it dazzles the sight.
wirds.transliteration: Kash-shamsi tazhiru lil-'ayniyn min bu'din [.....] sagheeratan wa tukillu at-tarfa min amami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكَيْفَ يُدْرِكُ فِي الدُّنْيَا حَقِيْقَتَهُ  [.....] قَوْمٌ نِيَامٌ تَسَلَّوْا عَنْهُ بِالْحُلُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How can his reality be grasped in this world by people who are asleep, distracted from him by dreams.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kayfa yudriku fee ad-dunya haqiqatahu [.....] qawmun niyaamun tasallaw 'anhu bil-hulum

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَبْلَغُ الْعِلْمِ فِيْهِ أَنَّهُ بَشَرٌ  [.....] وَأَنَّهُ خَيْرُ خَلْقِ اللهِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The most we know of him is that he is mortal man, and that he is the best of all God’s creation!
wirds.transliteration: Famablaughu al-'ilmi feehi annahu basharun [.....] wa annahu khayru khalqi Allah kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ آيٍ أَتَى الرُّسْلُ الْكِرَامُ بِهَا [.....]  فَاِنــَّمَا اتَّصَلَتْ مِنْ نُوْرِهِ بِهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Every miracle which the Noble Messengers brought was theirs by virtue of his light alone.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kullu ayin ataa ar-rusulu al-kiraamu biha [.....] fa'innamaa ittasalat min noorihi bihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّهُ شَمْسُ فَضْلٍ هُمْ كَوَاكِبُهَا  [.....] يُظْهِرْنَ أَنْوَارَهَا لِلنَّاسِ فِي الظُّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For verily he is the sun of virtue, and they are its planets. They show his lights to humanity in the dark.
wirds.transliteration: Fa'innahu shamsu fadlin hum kawakibuha [.....] yuzhirna anwaraha lil-nasi fi az-zulami

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَكْرِمْ بِخَلْقِ نَبِيٍّ زَانَهُ خُلُقٌ  [.....] بِالْحُسْنِ مُشْتَمِلٍ بِالْبِشْرِ مُتَّسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How noble are the physical qualities of a prophet ﷺ adorned by good traits! He is cloaked with beauty and known for his smile.
wirds.transliteration: Akram bi khalqi nabiyyin zaanahu khuluqun [.....] bil-husni mushtamilin bil-bishri muttasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَالزَّهْرِ فِيْ تَرَفٍ وَالْبَدْرِ فِيْ شَرَفٍ  [.....] وَالْبَحْرِ فِيْ كَرَمٍ وَالدَّهْرِ فِيْ هِمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: As a blooming flower in delicacy, as the full moon in honor, like the ocean in generosity, as persistent as time itself.
wirds.transliteration: Kazzahri fee tarafin wal-badri fee sharafin [.....] wal-bahri fee karamim wal-dahri fee himamin

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهُ وَهْوَ فَرْدٌ مِنْ جَلَالَتِهِ  [.....] فِيْ عَسْكَرٍ حِيْنَ تَلْقَاهُ وَفِيْ حَشَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: When alone, out of grandeur, he appears as though he is in the midst of a large army and guards.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annahu wahwa fardun min jalalatihi [.....] fee 'askarin heena talqaahu wa fee hashami

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّمَا اللُّؤْلُؤُ الْمَكْنُوْنُ فِيْ صَدَفٍ  [.....] مِنْ مَعْدِنَيْ مَنْطِقٍ مِنْهُ وَمُبْتَسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: From the rich mine of his speech and his smile, hidden pearls seemed to sparkle from their shell.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annamaa al-lu'lu'u al-maknuunu fee sadafin [.....] min ma'dinay manṭiqin minhu wa mubtasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا طِيْبَ يَعْدِلُ تُرْبًا ضَمَّ أَعْظُمَهُ  [.....] طُوْبَى لِمُنْتَشِقٍ مِنْهُ وَمُلْتَثِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: No perfume can rival the earth that holds his bones. Blessed are they that breathe its fragrance, or kiss it.
wirds.transliteration: La teebaa ya'dilu turban dhammā a'ẓumahu [.....] tuba limuntashiqin minhu wa multathim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مولد النبي ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Birth of the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: Mawlid al-Nabi ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَبَانَ مَوْلِدُهُ عَنْ طِيْبِ عُنْصُرِهِ [.....] يَا طِيْبَ مُبْتَدَاٍ مِنْهُ وَمُخْتَتَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: His birth revealed purity of his ancestry. How fine is his origin, how pure is his final end.
wirds.transliteration: Abaana mawliduhu 'an teebi 'unsurihi [.....] ya teeba mubtada'in minhu wa mukhatam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَوْمٌ تَفَرَّسَ فِيْهِ الْفُرْسُ أَنَّهُمُ  [.....] قَدْ أُنْذِرُوا بِحُلُوْلِ الْبُؤْسِ وَالنِّقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: That day the Persians sensed that they had been warned of the descent of defeats and retribution.
wirds.transliteration: Yawmun tafarassa feehi al-fursu annahum [.....] qad undhiru bihulooli al-bu'si wal-niqami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبَاتَ اِيْوَانُ كِسْرَى وَهْوَ مُنْصَدِعٌ   [.....] كَشَمْلِ أَصْحَابِ كِسْرَى غَيْرَ مُلْتَئِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By night the Arch of Kisra split asunder. Likewise his horde, never to be restored.
wirds.transliteration: Wa baata iwanu Kisra wa huwa munsadi'un [.....] kashamli as'habī Kisra ghayra multaim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالنَّارُ خَامِدَةُ الْأَنْفَاسِ مِنْ أَسَفٍ  [.....] عَلَيْهِ وَالنَّهْرُ سَاهِّي الْعَيْنِ مِنْ سَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The sacred fire breathed its last from sorrow. Out of anxiety, the Euphrates lost its way.
wirds.transliteration: Wa an-naru khaamidatu al-anfaasi min asafin [.....] 'alayhi wa an-nahru saahī al-'ayni min sadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَسَاءَ سَاوَةَ أَنْ غَاضَتْ بُحَيْرَتُهَا [.....] وَرُدَّ وَارِدُهَا بِالْغَيْظِ حِيْنَ ظَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The city of Saawat in Persia endured the drying of its lake. The thirsty who sought water there returned in rage.
wirds.transliteration: Wa saaa saawata an ghadhat buhayratuhā [.....] wa rudd waāriduhā bil-ghaythi heena zameem

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّ بِالنَّارِ مَا بِالْمَاءِ مِنْ بَلَلٍ [.....] حُزْنًا وَبِالْمَاءِ مَا بِالنَّارِ مِنْ ضَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: As though fire itself, from grief, was as wet as water; while water blazed like fire.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annā bi-nnāri mā bi-al-ma'i min balalin [.....] huznan wa bi-al-ma'i mā bi-al-nāri min darami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْجِنُّ تَهْتِفُ وَالْأَنْوَارُ ساطِعَةٌ  [.....] وَالْحَقُّ يَظْهَرُ مِنْ مَعْنًى وَمِنْ كَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Jinn called out. Lights shone, dazzling. Truth was made manifest in word and in fact.
wirds.transliteration: Wal-jinnu tahtifu wal-anwaru saati'atun [.....] wal-haqqoo yazharo min ma'nan wa min kalimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَمُوْا وَصَمُّوْا فَاِعْلَانُ الْبَشَائِرِ لَمْ  [.....] تُسْمَعْ وَبَارِقَةُ الْاِنْذَارِ لَمْ تُشَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Blind and deaf were they, so the good news announced went unheard, while the lightening-flash of warning went unseen.
wirds.transliteration: Amū wa ṣammu fa'i'lānu al-bashā'iri lam [.....] tusma'u wa bāriqatul-inzāri lam tushamm

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا أَخْبَرَ الْأَقْوَامَ كَاهِنُهُمْ [.....]  بِأَنَّ دِيْنَهُمُ الْمُعْوَجَّ لَمْ يَقُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This even though the diviners had advised their people that their crooked religion could no longer stand.
wirds.transliteration: Min ba'di mā akhbara al-aqwāma kāhinuhum [.....] bi'annā dīnahum al-mu'awajja lam yaqumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبَعْدَ مَا عَايَنُوْا فِي الْأُفْقِ مِنْ شُهُبٍ  [.....] مُنْقَضَّةٍ وَفْقَ مَا فِي الْأَرْضِ مِنْ صَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And even though their eyes beheld on the horizon great meteors falling, as idols toppled on earth.
wirds.transliteration: Wa ba'da mā 'āyanū fī al-ufqi min shuhūbin [.....] munqaṭi'atin wafqa mā fī al-arḍi min ṣanam

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى غَدَا عَنْ طَرِيْقِ الْوَحْيِ مُنْهَزِمٌ  [.....] مِنَ الشَّيَاطِيْنِ يَقْفُوْ اِثْرَ مُنْهَزِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Until, sent flying from revelation’s road, demons fled after those who were overthrown.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥattā ghadā 'an ṭarīqi al-wahyī munhazimun [.....] min ash-shayāṭīn yaqfū 'ithra munhazim

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهُمْ هَرَبًا أَبْطَالُ أَبْرَهَةٍ  [.....] أَوْ عَسْكَرٌ بِالْحَصَى مِنْ رَاحَتَيْهِ رُمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Fleeing like the champions of Abraha; or like a host pelted with pebbles from his hand.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annahum haraban abṭālū Abraḥah [.....] aw 'askarun bil-ḥaṣā min rāḥatayhī rumī

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَبْذًا بِهِ بَعْدَ تَسْبِيْحٍ بِبَطْنِهِمَا  [.....] نَبْذَ الْمُسَبِّحِ مِنْ أَحْشَاءِ مُلْتَقِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They sang glory in his hand, and then were cast like the praising Jonah, cast from the whale’s belly.
wirds.transliteration: Nabhdan bihī ba'da tasbīḥin bibatnihimā [.....] nabhā al-musbihī min aḥshā'i multaqim

wirds.ar_wird_description: معجزات النبي ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Miracles of the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: Mu'jizātu an-Nabī ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: جَاءَتْ لِدَعْوَتِهِ الْأَشْجَارُ ساجِدَةً  [.....] تَمْشِيْ اِلَيْهِ عَلَى سَاقٍ بِلَا قَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Trees came prostrate to heed his call, their trunks walking to him though they had no feet.
wirds.transliteration: Jā'at li-da'watihi al-ashjāru sājidatan [.....] tamshī ilayhi 'alā sāqin bilā qadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّمَا سَطَرَتْ سَطْرًا لِمَا كَتَبَتْ [.....]  فُرُوْعُهَا مِنْ بَدِيْعِ الْخَطِّ فِي الَّلقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: It was as through their branches were writing lines as they came along, with the finest calligraphy!
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annamā saṭarat saṭran limā katabat [.....] furū'uhā min badī'i al-khaṭṭ fī al-laqam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِثْلَ الْغَمَامَةِ أَنَّى سَارَ سَائِرَةً [.....]  تَقِيْهِ حَرَّ وَطِيْسٍ لِلْهَجِيْرِ حَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like the cloud, how it moved about, to protect him from the midday heat, red-hot.
wirds.transliteration: Mithla al-ghamāmah annā sāra sā'irah [.....] taqīhī ḥarran waṭīsin lil-hajīri ḥamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَقْسَمْتُ بِالْقَمَرِ الْمُنْشَقِّ إِنَّ لَهُ  [.....] مِنْ قَلْبِهِ نِسْبَةً مَبْرُوْرَةَ الْقَسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By the moon split in twain, truly it has, I swear by an oath that is true, a link with his heart.
wirds.transliteration: Aqsamtu bil-qamari al-munshaqqi innā lahu [.....] min qalbihi nisbatan mabrūratil-qasam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَا حَوَى الْغَارُ مِنْ خَيْرٍ وَمِنْ كَرَمِ  [.....] وَكُلُّ طَرْفٍ مِنَ الْكُفَّارِ عَنْهُ عَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the goodness and nobility embraced by the cave when every unbelieving eye was too blind to see him.
wirds.transliteration: Wa mā ḥawā al-ghāru min khayrin wa min karamī [.....] wa kullu ṭarfin mina al-kuffāri 'anhu 'amī

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالصِّدْقُ فِي الْغَارِ وَالصِّدِّيْقُ لَمْ  [.....] يَرِمَا وَهُمْ يَقُوْلُوْنَ مَا بِالْغَارِ مِنْ أَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They were saying that none drew breath in the cave, while Belief in the cave and the Believer, did not waver.
wirds.transliteration: Fas-ṣidqu fī al-ghāri wa al-ṣiddīqu lam [.....] yarimā wa hum yaqūlūna mā bil-ghāri min arim

wirds.ar_wird_description: ظَنُّوا الْحَمَامَ وَظَنُّوا الْعَنْكَبُوْتَ عَلَى  [.....] خَيْرِ الْبَرِيَّةِ لَمْ تَنْسُجْ وَلَمْ تَحُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Imagining that for the Best of Creation, the spider had woven no web, and that the dove had found no perch.
wirds.transliteration: Ẓannū al-ḥamāma wa ẓannū al-'ankabūta 'alā [.....] khayri al-bariyyah lam tansuj wa lam taḥumm

wirds.ar_wird_description: وِقَايَةُ اللهِ أَغْنَتْ عَنْ مُضَاعَفَةٍ  [.....] مِنَ الدُّرُوْعِ وَعَنْ عَالٍ مِنَ الْأُطُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: God’s guardianship made extra armour needless, neither did they need lofty castles.
wirds.transliteration: Wiqāyatu Allāhi aghnat 'an muḍā'afatin [.....] mina ad-durū'i wa 'an 'ālin mina al-uṭumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا سَامَنِي الدَّهْرُ ضَيْمًا وَاسْتَجَرْتُ بِهِ  [.....] اِلَّا وَنِلْتُ جِوَارًا مِنْهُ لَمْ يُضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Never does this age oppress me, but that I seek his protection. His protection do I find, and the oppression is no more.
wirds.transliteration: Mā sāmanī ad-dahru ḍaymān wa istajartu bihī [.....] illā wa niltu jiwāran minhu lam yuḍamm

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا الْتَمَسْتُ غِنَى الدَّارَيْنِ مِنْ يَدِهِ  [.....] اِلَّا اسْتَلَمْتُ النَّدَى مِنْ خَيْرِ مُسْتَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Never do I seek from his hand the goods of both worlds without gaining my share from the best of all givers!
wirds.transliteration: Wa lā atlamastu ghinā ad-dāraynī min yadīhi [.....] illā istalamtu an-nadā min khayri mustalam

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا تُنْكِرِ الْوَحْيَ مِنْ رُؤْيَاهُ اِنَّ لَهُ [.....]  قَلْبًا اِذَا نَامَتِ الْعَيْنَانِ لَمْ يَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Deny not the revelation in his dream-visions, for his was a heart which slept not, though his eye slept.
wirds.transliteration: Lā tunki'ri al-wahyā min ru'yāhu innā lahu [.....] qalban idhā nāmatil-'aynānī lam yanam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَذَاكَ حِيْنَ بُلُوْغٍ مِنْ نُبُوَّتِهِ  [.....] فَلَيْسَ يُنْكَرُ فِيْهِ حَالُ مُحْتَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Thus it was at the outset of his Prophethood; so when adult, his dream-visions are not gainsaid.
wirds.transliteration: Wa dhāka ḥīna bulūghin min nubūwatihi [.....] falaysa yunkaru fīhi ḥālū muḥtālim

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَبَارَكَ اللهُ مَا وَحْيٌ بِمُكْتَسَبٍ  [.....] وَلَا نَبِيٌّ عَلَى غَيْبٍ بِمُتَّهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Blessed is God! Revelation may not be acquired. Nor is a prophet to be accused when he speaks of hidden things.
wirds.transliteration: Tabāraka Allāhu mā wahyun bimuktasabin [.....] walā nabiyyun 'alā ghaybin bimutahham

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ أَبْرَأَتْ وَصِبًا بِاللَّمْسِ رَاحَتُهُ  [.....] وَأَطْلَقَتْ أَرِبًا مِنْ رِبْقَةِ اللَّمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Many were the patients healed by his hand’s touch! Many madmen did he release from their chains!
wirds.transliteration: Kam abr'at wasiban bil-lamsi rahatuhu [.....] wa'atlaqat ariban min ribqat al-lamam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَحْيَتِ السَّنَةَ الشَّهْبَاءَ دَعْوَتُهُ  [.....] حَتَّى حَكَتْ غُرَّةً فِي الْأَعْصُرِ الدُّهُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: A time of drought was given new life by his call. After dull ages- a blaze of light.
wirds.transliteration: Wa ahyati as-sannata as-shahbaa da'watuhu [.....] hatta hakkat ghurratan fi al-asuri al-duhumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِعَارِضٍ جَادَ أَوْ خِلْتَ الْبِطَاحَ بِهَا  [.....] سَيْبٌ مِنَ الْيَمِّ أَوْ سَيْلٌ مِنَ الْعَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All by rain-giving cloud. Or you would think the valleys were thus engulfed by the sea, or by a flood of Arim’s dam-water.
wirds.transliteration: Bi'aridin jaada aw khilta al-bitaaha biha [.....] saybun mina al-yammi aw saylun mina al-arimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: معجزة القرآن الكريم
wirds.en_wird_description: Miracle of the Noble Quran
wirds.transliteration: Mu'jizatu al-Qur'an al-Kareem

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَعْنيِ وَوَصْفِي آيَاتٍ لَهُ ظَهَرَتْ [.....] ظُهُورَ نَارِ القِرَى لَيْلاً عَلَى عَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Allow me to describe his signs, which appeared like a hospitable fire lit by night on a hilltop.
wirds.transliteration: Da'ni wa wasfi ayatin lahu zaharat [.....] zuhura nari al-qira laylan 'ala 'alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالدُّرُّ يَزْدَادُ حُسْناً وَهْوَ مُنْتَظِمٌ  [.....] وَلَيْسَ يَنْقُصُ قَدْرًا غَيْرَ مُنْتَظِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Pearls glow more brightly when on a string, yet are no less precious when they are separate.
wirds.transliteration: Fad-durru yazdadu husnan wahuwa muntazimun [.....] wa laysa yanqusu qadran ghayra muntazimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَا تَطَاوُلُ آمَالِ الْمَدِيْحِ اِلَى [.....] مَا فِيْهِ مِنْ كَرَمِ الْأَخْلَاقِ وَالشِّيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The praise-giver reaches high, but cannot reach the noble qualities and graces which he displays.
wirds.transliteration: Fama tatawwulu amaali al-madihi ila [.....] ma fihi min karam al-akhlaaqi wa al-shiyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: آيَاتُ حَقٍّ مِنَ الرَّحْمَنِ مُحْدَثَةٌ  [.....] قَدِيْمَةٌ صِفَةُ الْمَوْصُوْفِ بِالْقِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Though they are renewed, signs of truth from the Gracious time itself; their quality is that of Him Who is Eternal.
wirds.transliteration: Aayatuhu haqqin mina ar-Rahman muhdathatun [.....] qadeematan sifat al-mawsuufi bil-qidami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمْ تَقْتَرِنْ بِزَمَانٍ وَهْيَ تُخْبِرُنا  [.....] عَنِ الْمَعَادِ وعَنْ عَادٍ وعَنْ اِرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Unlinked to time, they give us news of Judgement-Day, of old people of Ad and of Iram.
wirds.transliteration: Lam taqtarin bi-zamanin wahiya tukhbiroona [.....] 'ani al-ma'aadi wa'an 'aadin wa'an Iram

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَامَتْ لَدَيْنَا فَفَاقَتْ كُلَّ مُعْجِزَةٍ  [.....] مِنَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ اِذْ جَاءَتْ وَلَمْ تَدُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Constantly with us, above every miracle of prophets of old, which came but did not last.
wirds.transliteration: Damat ladayna fafaqat kulla mu'jizatan [.....] mina an-nabiyyina idh ja'at wa lam tadum

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَكَّمَاتٌ فَمَا تُبْقِينَ مِنْ شُبَهٍ  [.....] لِذِيْ شِقَاقٍ وَمَا تَبْغِينَ مِنْ حِكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Very clear, these signs leave no doubt to be stirred up by the mischievous, and need no arbiter.
wirds.transliteration: Muhkamatun fama tubqeen min shubhatin [.....] lidhi shiqaqin wama tabgeen min hikami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا حُوْرِبَتْ قَطُّ اِلَّا عَادَ مِنْ حَرَبٍ  [.....] أَعْدَى الْأَعَادِيْ اِلَيْهَا مُلْقِيَ السَّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Whenever attacked, the most bitter of their foes return from the fray begging to submit.
wirds.transliteration: Ma huribat qattu illa 'ada min harabin [.....] adaa al-a'adi ilaaha mulqiya as-salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَدَّتْ بَلَاغَتُهَا دَعْوَى مُعَارِضِهَا [.....]  رَدَّ الْغَيُورِ يَدَ الْجَانِيْ عَنِ الْحُرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their eloquence routs their enemy’s claims, as a zealous man protects his wife from an assailant.
wirds.transliteration: Raddat balagatuha da'waa mu'aridihā [.....] radd al-ghayoori yadi al-jaani 'ani al-hurami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَهَا مَعَانٍ كَمَوْجِ الْبَحْرِ فِيْ مَدَدٍ  [.....] وَفَوْقَ جَوْهَرِهِ فِي الْحُسْنِ وَالْقِيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Meanings they have like the wide ocean’s waves, their beauty and worth more precious than the ocean’s treasures.
wirds.transliteration: Laha ma'aanin kamawji al-bahri fi madadin [.....] wa fawqa jawaharihi fi al-husni wal-qiyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَا تُعَدُّ وَلَا تُحْصَى عَجَائِبُهَا  [.....] وَلَا تُسَامُ عَلَى الْاِكْثَارِ بِالسَّأَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their marvels stand beyond count and reckoning. None grows tired of them, however oft-repeated.
wirds.transliteration: Fama tu'add wa la tuhsaa 'aja'ibuhā [.....] wa la tusaamu 'ala al-ikthari bis-saami

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَرَّتْ بِهَا عَيْنُ قَارِيْهَا فَقُلْتُ لَهُ  [.....] لَقَدْ ظَفِرْتَ بِحَبْلِ اللهِ فَاعْتَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They delighted the soul and senses of one that recited them. So I told him: ‘Yours is God’s rope- so hold on tight!’
wirds.transliteration: Qarrat biha 'ayn qariyihā faqaltu lahu [.....] laqad zafarta bihabli Allah fa'atasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنْ تَتْلُهَا خِيْفَةً مِنْ حَرِّ نَارِ لَظَى  [.....] أَطْفَأْتَ حَرَّ لَظَى مِنْ وِرْدِهَا الشَّبِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: If you recite them in fear of a blazing Fire, their wellsprings shall extinguish that fire and heat.
wirds.transliteration: In tatluha kheefatan min harri naari lazā [.....] atfa'ta harr lazā min wardiha ash-shabimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهَا الْحَوْضُ تَبْيَضُّ الْوُجُوْهُ بِهِ  [.....] مِنَ الْعُصَاةِ وَقَدْ جَاؤُوْهُ كَالْحُمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like the Basin of Kauthar, they make sinners’ faces shine, though they had come to it as black as charcoal.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annaha al-hawd tubyiddu al-wujoohu bihi [.....] mina al-usaati wa qad ja'uuhu kal-humam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكَالصِّرَاطِ وَكَالْمِيْزَانِ مَعْدِلَةً  [.....] فَالْقِسْطُ مِنْ غَيْرِهَا فِي النَّاسِ لَمْ يَقُمْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like the Path and the Scale in justice. Justice without which among mankind cannot be true.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kalsiraati wa kal-mizani ma'dilatan [.....] fa al-qisṭu min ghayriha fi an-naasi lam yaqim

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا تَعْجَبَنْ لِحَسُوْدٍ رَاحَ يُنْكِرُهَا  [.....] تَجَاهُلًا وَهْوَ عَيْنُ الْحَاذِقِ الْفَهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Be not astonished at an envier who denies them, pretending unawareness though he has a deep understanding.
wirds.transliteration: La ta'jabanna li hasoodin raaha yunkiruhā [.....] tajahulan wahwa 'aynu al-haadhiqi al-fahimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَدْ تُنْكِرُ الْعَيْنُ ضَوْءَ الشَّمْسِ مِنْ رَمَدٍ  [.....] وَيُنْكِرُ الْفَمُ طَعْمَ الْمَاءِ مِنْ سَقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: A sick eye may deny the light of the sun; a sick tongue may even abhor the taste of water.
wirds.transliteration: Qad tunkiru al-'aynu dhaw'a ash-shamsi min ramadin [.....] wa yunkiru al-famu ta'ma al-ma'i min saqami

wirds.ar_wird_description: معراج النَّبِيّ ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ascension of the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: Mi'raaj al-Nabi ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ يَمَّمَ الْعَافُوْنَ سَاحَتَهُ  [.....] سَعْيًا وَفَوْقَ مُتُوْنِ الْأَيْنُقِ الرُّسُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O best of those whose courtyard is sought by the needy; they run, or ride the back of tireless camels.
wirds.transliteration: Yā khayra man yammama al-‘āfūna sāḥatahu [.....] sa‘yāan wafawqa mutūni al-aynuqi ar-rusumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَنْ هُوَ الْآيَةُ الْكُبْرَى لِمُعْتَبِرٍ  [.....] وَمَنْ هُوَ النِّعْمَةُ الْعُظْمَى لِمُغْتَنِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O greatest sign for those who reflect. O greatest grace for those who seek to gain.
wirds.transliteration: Wa man huwa al-āyatu al-kubrā limu‘tabirin [.....] wamān huwa an-ni‘matu al-‘uẓmā limuġtanimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: سَرَيْتَ مِنْ حَرَمٍ لَيْلًا اِلَى حَرَمٍ  [.....] كَمَا سَرَى الْبَدْرُ فِيْ دَاجٍ مِنَ الظُّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You traveled by night from one sanctuary to another, as the full moon travels through intense darkness.
wirds.transliteration: Sarayta min ḥaramin laylan ilā ḥaramin [.....] kamā sarā al-badru fī dājim mina az-ẓulami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبِتَّ تَرْقَى اِلَى أَنْ نِلْتَ مَنْزِلَةً  [.....] مِنْ قَابِ قَوْسَيْنِ لَمْ تُدْرَكْ وَلَمْ تُرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And through the night you rose until you gained a stage so close never attained or hoped for.
wirds.transliteration: Wa bitta tarqā ilā an nilta manzilatan [.....] min qābi qawsayni lam tudrak wa lam turami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقَدَّمَتْكَ جَمِيْعُ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ بِهَا  [.....] وَالرُّسْلِ تَقْدِيْمَ مَخْدُوْمٍ عَلَى خَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All of the Prophets gave you precedence. The Messengers too, as servants give way to their master.
wirds.transliteration: Waqaddamatka jamī‘u al-anbiyā’ bihā [.....] wa ar-rusuli taqdīma makhdūmin ‘alā khadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَنْتَ تَخْتَرِقُ السَّبْعَ الطِّبَاقَ بِهِم  [.....] فِيْ مَوْكِبٍ كُنْتَ فِيْهِ صَاحِبَ الْعَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You passed through the seven-tiered skies with them behind you, in a procession where you were the banner bearer.
wirds.transliteration: Wa anta takhtariqu as-sab‘a at-ṭibāqa bihim [.....] fī mawkibin kuntu fīhi ṣāḥiba al-‘alami

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى اِذَا لَمْ تَدَعْ شَأْوًا لِمُسْتَبِقٍ  [.....] مِنَ الدُّنُوِّ وَلَا مَرْقًى لِمُسْتَنِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Until your closeness left no space for others on the quest; nor summit for others to attain.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥattā idhā lam tada‘ shā’an limustabiqin [.....] mina ad-dunūwi walā marqan limustanimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: خَفَضْتَ كُلَّ مَقَامٍ بِالْاِضَافَةِ اِذْ [.....]  نُودِيْتَ بِالرَّفْعِ مِثْلَ الْمُفْرَدِ الْعَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All other ranks lay beneath you in conjunction, when see! you are addressed directly, your noun alone His object.
wirds.transliteration: Khafaḍta kulla maqāmin bil-iḍāfati idh [.....] nūdtīta bir-raf‘i mithla al-mufradi al-‘alami

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَيْمَا تَفُوْزَ بِوَصْلٍ أَيِّ مُسْتَتِرٍ  [.....] عَنِ الْعُيُوْنِ وَسِرٍّ أَيِّ مُكْتَتِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All this that you should triumph through Arrival. Hidden from sight-how hidden a secret!
wirds.transliteration: Kaymā tafūza bi-waṣlin ayy mustatirīn [.....] ‘ani al-‘uyūni wa sirrin ayy mukattimī

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَحُزْتَ كُلَّ فَخَارٍ غَيْرَ مُشْتَرَكٍ  [.....] وَجُزْتَ كُلَّ مَقَامٍ غَيْرَ مُزْدَحَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Unrivalled were the proud honors you received. None other was with you as you gained each degree.
wirds.transliteration: Faḥuzta kulla fakārin ghayra mushtarakīn [.....] wa juzta kulla maqāmin ghayra muzdaḥamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَجَلَّ مِقْدَارُ مَا وُلِّيْتَ مِنْ رُتَبٍ [.....]  وَعَزَّ اِدْرَاكُ مَا أُوْلِيْتَ مِنْ نِعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How glorious, the precious ranks you were granted! How hard to list the graces you received!
wirds.transliteration: Wajalla miqdāru mā wulīyta min rutabin [.....] wa ‘azza idrāku mā ūlīta min ni‘ami

wirds.ar_wird_description: بُشْرَى لَنَا مَعْشَرَ الْاِسْلَامِ اِنَّ لَنَا [.....]  مِنَ الْعِنَايَةِ رُكْنًا غَيْرَ مُنْهَدِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Good news for us, o people of Islam! For we possess a pillar of God’s care that shall not be overthrown.
wirds.transliteration: Bushrā lanā ma‘shara al-Islāmi innal lanā [.....] mina al-‘ināyati ruknan ghayra munhādimī

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمَّا دَعَا اللهُ دَاعِيْنَا لِطَاعَتِهِ  [.....] بِأَكْرَمِ الرُّسْلِ كُنَّا أَكْرَمَ الْأُمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: When God, our Summoner, called us to serve Him through the Noblest of Messengers, we became the noblest of nations.
wirds.transliteration: Lammā da‘ā Allāhu dā‘īnā li-ṭā‘atihi [.....] bi-akrami ar-rusli kunna akrama al-umami

wirds.ar_wird_description: جهاد النَّبِيّ ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Jihad of the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: Jihād an-Nabī ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَاعَتْ قُلُوْبَ الْعِدَا أَنْبَاءُ بِعْثَتِهِ  [.....] كَنَبْأَةٍ أَجْفَلَتْ غُفْلًا مِنَ الْغَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: News that he was sent made foemen quake, just as a lion’s roar shakes heedless sheep.
wirds.transliteration: Rā‘at qulūba al-‘idā’ anbā’u bi‘thatihi [.....] kanabā’atin ajfālat ghuflan mina al-ghanami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا زَالَ يَلْقَاهُمُ فِيْ كُلِّ مُعْتَرَكٍ  [.....] حَتَّى حَكَوْا بِالْقَنَا لَحْمًا عَلَى وَضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: On every battlefield he did not shy to meet them, until lances made them seem like flesh upon a butcher’s block.
wirds.transliteration: Mā zāla yalqāhum fī kulli mu‘tārikin [.....] ḥattā ḥakawā bil-qanā laḥman ‘alā waḍami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَدُّوا الْفِرَارَ فَكَادُوْا يَغْبِطُونَ بِهِ  [.....] أَشْلَاءَ شَالَتْ مَعَ الْعُقْبَانِ وَالرَّخَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They longed to run away, almost jealous of the carrion borne away by hawks and vultures.
wirds.transliteration: Waddū al-firāra fakādū yaġbiṭūna bihi [.....] ashlā’ā shālata ma‘a al-‘uqbāni wa ar-raḥami

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَمْضِي اللَّيَالِيْ وَلَا يَدْرُوْنَ عِدَّتَهَا  [.....] مَا لَمْ تَكُنْ مِنْ لَيَالِي الْأَشْهُرِ الْحُرُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The nights kept passing, but they forgot how many, apart from the nights of the Sacrosanct Months.
wirds.transliteration: Tamḍī al-layālī walā yadrūna ‘iddatihā [.....] mā lam takun min layālī al-ashhuri al-ḥurumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّمَا الدِّيْنُ ضَيْفٌ حَلَّ سَاحَتَهُمْ  [.....] بِكُلِّ قَرْمٍ اِلَى لَحْمِ الْعِدَا قَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: As though Religion were a guest come upon their gate, met by voracious foes hungry for their flesh.
wirds.transliteration: Ka-annamā ad-dīnu ḍayfun ḥalla sāḥatahum [.....] bikulli qarmin ilā laḥmi al-‘idā qārimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَجُرُّ بَحْرَ خَمِيْسٍ فَوْقَ سَابِحَةٍ [.....]  يَرْمِيْ بِمَوْجٍ مِنَ الْأَبْطَالِ مُلْتَطِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: A sea-like host riding swift steeds, casting forth a wave of surging heroes.
wirds.transliteration: Yajurru baḥra khamīsin fawqa sābiḥatin [.....] yarmī bimumjin mina al-abṭāli multaṭimī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِنْ كُلِّ مُنْتَدِبٍ لِلهِ مُحْتَسِبٍ  [.....] يَسْطُوْ بِمُسْتَأْصِلٍ لِلْكُفْرِ مُصْطَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Volunteers for God, hoping for His reward, heroic and bold in uprooting unbelief.
wirds.transliteration: Min kulli muntadibin lillāhi muḥtasibīn [.....] yasto bimumstaṣilin lil-kufri muṣṭalimī

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى غَدَتْ مِلَّةُ الْاِسْلَامِ وَهْيَ بِهِمْ  [.....] مِنْ بَعْدِ غُرْبَتِهَا مَوْصُوْلَةَ الرَّحِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Until the faith of Islam became, through them, as one flesh, having once been exiled and apart.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥattā ḡadati millatu al-Islāmī wahīya bihim [.....] min ba‘di gurbatihā mawṣūlatā ar-raḥimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَكْفُوْلَةً أَبَدًا مِنْهُمْ بِخَيْرِ أَبٍ [.....] وَخَيْرِ بَعْلٍ فَلَمْ تَيْتَمْ وَلَمْ تَئِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shielded for all time from evildoers by the best of fathers and husbands, so that no longer were they orphans or widow.
wirds.transliteration: Makfulatan abadan minhum bikhayri abin [...] wa khayri ba'lin falam taytam wa lam ta'im

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُمُ الْجِبَالُ فَسَلْ عَنْهُمْ مُصَادِمَهُمْ  [.....] مَاذَا رَأَوْا مِنْهُمُ فِيْ كُلِّ مُصْتَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Mountains were they! Ask those who collided with them what they saw in them on every field of honor.
wirds.transliteration: Humu aljibalu fasal 'anhum musadimahum [...] maza ra'u minhum fi kuli musdama

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَسَلْ حُنَيْنًا وَسَلْ بَدْرًا وَسَلْ أُحُدًا  [.....] فُصُوْلَ حَتْفٍ لَهُمْ أَدْهَى مِنَ الْوَخَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ask Huneyn. Ask Uhud. Fateful seasons, against evil worse than the plague.
wirds.transliteration: Wasal Hunaynan wasal Badran wasal Uhudan [...] fusula hatfin lahum adha min al-wakham

wirds.ar_wird_description: اَلْمُصْدِرِي الْبِيْضِ حُمْرًا بَعْدَ مَا وَرَدَتْ [.....] مِنَ الْعِدَا كُلَّ مُسْوَدٍّ مِنَ الِّلمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: White swords shone red after their encounter with the black heads of the foemen.
wirds.transliteration: Almusadiri al-baydi humran ba'da ma waradat [...] mina al-'ida kull muswad min al-lamam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْكَاتِبِيْنَ بِسُمْرِ الْخَطِّ مَا تَرَكَتْ  [.....] أَقْلَامُهُمْ حَرْفَ جِسْمٍ غَيْرَ مُنْعَجِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like scribes whose pens, tracing with brown ink, left no body devoid of points and vowels.
wirds.transliteration: Wa al-katibina bi-sumri al-khatti ma tarakat [...] aqlamuhum harfa jismin ghayra mun'ajim

wirds.ar_wird_description: شَاكِي السِّلَاحِ لَهُمْ سِيْمَى تُمَيِّزُهُمْ  [.....] وَالْوَرْدُ يَمْتَازُ بِالسِّيْمَا عَنَ السَّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In shining armor, theirs was a sign which set them apart, just as a rosebush may be distinguished from an acacia.
wirds.transliteration: Shaki al-silah lahum sima tumayyizuhum [...] walwardu yamtazu bi-sima 'an al-salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: تُهْدِيْ اِلَيْكَ رِيَاحُ النَّصْرِ نَشْرَهُمُ  [.....] فَتَحْسَبُ الزَّهْرَ فِي الْأَكْمَامِ كُلَّ كَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Winds of victory honor you with their perfume. You’d think the brave heroes blooms ripe to come from the spathe.
wirds.transliteration: Tuhdi ilayka riyahu al-nasri nashrahumu [...] fatahsabu al-zahra fi al-akmami kulla kami

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهُمْ فِيْ ظُهُوْرِ الْخَيْلِ نَبْتُ رُبًا  [.....] مِنْ شِدَّةِ الْحَزْمِ لَا مِنْ شِدَّةِ الْحُزُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In the saddle they were as flowers on a hilltop, their strength from resolve, not from strap and stirrup.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annahum fi zuhuri al-khayli nabtu ruban [...] min shiddati al-hazmi la min shiddati al-huzumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: طَارَتْ قُلُوْبُ الْعِدَا مِنْ بَأْسِهِمْ فَرَقًا  [.....] فَمَا تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْبَهْمِ وَالْبُهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their boldness put their enemies’ hearts to flight, until you could not tell herd from host.
wirds.transliteration: Tarat qulub al-'ida min b'asihim faraqan [...] fama tufarriqu bayna al-bahmi wa al-bahmi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَنْ تَكُنْ بِرَسُوْلِ اللهِ نُصْرَتُهُ  [.....] اِنْ تَلْقَهُ الْأُسْدُ فِيْ آجَامِهَا تَجِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lions in their abode stand humbled and dazed by him whose victory comes through God’s Messenger.
wirds.transliteration: Wa man takun bi-rasulillahi nusratuhu [...] in talqahu al-usudu fi ajamihā tajim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَنْ تَرَى مِنْ وَلِيٍّ غَيْرَ مُنْتَصِرٍ  [.....] بِهِ وَلَا مِنْ عَدُوٍّ غَيْرَ مُنْقَصِم
wirds.en_wird_description: You shall see no saint that is not helped through him, and no foe that is not overwhelmed.
wirds.transliteration: Wa lan tara min waliyyin ghayra muntasirin [...] bihi wa la min aduwwin ghayra munqasimin

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَحَلَّ أُمَّتَهُ فِيْ حِرْزِ مِلَّتِهِ  [.....] كَاللَّيْثِ حَلَّ مَعَ الْأَشْبَالِ فِيْ أَجَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The stronghold of his faith is where he set his people, like a lion which places its cubs in the safest place.
wirds.transliteration: Ahlal ummatahu fi hirzi millatihi [...] kallaythi halla ma'a al-ashbali fi ajam

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ جَدَّلَتْ كَلِمَاتُ اللهِ مِنْ جَدَلٍ  [.....] فِيْهِ وَكَمْ خَصَمَ الْبُرْهَانُ مِنْ خَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How often have God’s words felled those who oppose him, and how many a debater has been defeated by His Proof!
wirds.transliteration: Kam jaddalat kalimatu allahi min jadalin [...] fihi wa kam khasama al-burhanu min khasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَفَاكَ بِالْعِلْمِ فِي الْأُمِّيِّ مُعْجِزَةً  [.....] فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ وَالتَّأْدِيْبِ فِي الْيُتُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Erudition in an unlettered one is miracle enough, in an Age of Ignorance; as is knowledge in an orphan.
wirds.transliteration: Kafaka bil-'ilmi fi al-umiyy mu'jizatan [...] fi al-jahiliyyati wa al-ta'dibi fi al-yutumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: الخوف والرجاء
wirds.en_wird_description: Lament and Hope
wirds.transliteration: Al-khawf wal-rajā'

wirds.ar_wird_description: خَدَمْتُهُ بِمَدِيْحٍ أَسْتَقِيْلُ بِهِ  [.....] ذُنُوْبَ عُمْرٍ مَضَى فِي الشِّعْرِ وَالْخِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By this eulogy have I served him, hoping to be redeemed from the sins of a life of odes and patronage.
wirds.transliteration: Khadamtuhu bimadhi'in astaqilu bihi [...] dhunuba 'umrin mada fi al-shi'ri wa al-khidami

wirds.ar_wird_description: اِذْ قَلَّدَانِيَ مَا تُخْشَى عَوَاقِبُهُ  [.....] كَأَنَّنِيْ بِهِمَا هَدْيٌ مِنَ النَّعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: That life yoked me with collars of ominous portent as though I were a ritual lamb destined for slaughter.
wirds.transliteration: Ith qalladani ma tukhsā 'awāqibuhu [...] ka'annani bihima hadyun mina al-na'am

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَطَعْتُ غَيَّ الصِّبَا فِي الْحَالَتَيْنِ وَمَا  [.....] حَصَلْتُ اِلَّا عَلَى الْآثَامِ وَالنَّدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In both did I obey the wild folly of youth, but reaped nothing but sins and sorrow.
wirds.transliteration: A'ta'tu ghayya al-siba fi al-halatayn wama [...] hasaltu illa 'ala al-athami wal-nadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَيَا خَسَارَةَ نَفْسٍ فِيْ تِجَارَتِهَا  [.....] لَمْ تَشْتَرِ الدِّيْنَ بِالدُّنْيَا وَلَمْ تَسُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Such a loss to my soul was the deal that it struck! It didn’t buy, or even seek to buy, the next world at this world’s price.
wirds.transliteration: Faya khasaarata nafsin fi tijaaratihaa [.....] lam tashtari ad-deena bid-dunya wa lam tasumm

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَنْ يَبِعْ آجِلًا مِنْهُ بِعَاجِلِهِ  [.....] يَبِنْ لَهُ الْغَبْنُ فِيْ بَيْعٍ وَفِيْ سَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Those who sell their property for short-term gain shall be deceived in their  deals and in their dealings.
wirds.transliteration: Wa man yabii ajilan minhu bi aajilihi [.....] yabin lahu al-ghabnu fi bay'in wa fi salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنْ آتِ ذَنْبًا فَمَا عَهْدِيْ بِمُنْتَقِضٍ  [.....] مِنَ النَّبِيِّ وَلَا حَبْلِيْ بِمُنْصَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Yet despite my sin, my pledge with the Prophet ﷺ is unbroken, and the cord which binds me to him has not been cut.
wirds.transliteration: In aati dhanban fama 'ahdi bimuqatti' [.....] mina an-nabee wa la habli bimusarim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّ لِيْ ذِمَّةً مِنْهُ بِتَسْمِيَتِيْ مُحَمَّدًا  [.....] وَهْوَ أَوْفَى الْخَلْقِ بِالذِّمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By him I have a safe-conduct, having been named Muhammad, he who is most faithful in safe-conduct.
wirds.transliteration: Fa innali dhimmatan minhu bitasmiyaati Muhammadan [.....] wa huwa awfa al-khalqi bil dhimam

wirds.ar_wird_description: اِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيْ مَعَادِيْ آخِذًا بِيَدِي  [.....] فَضْلًا وَاِلَّا فَقُلْ يَا زَلَّةَ الْقَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In the afterlife, if he takes not my hand kindly, then my feet will slip; alas for such misfortune!
wirds.transliteration: In lam yakun fi ma'aadi akhdhan biyadi [.....] fadlan wa illa faqul ya zalata al-qadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَاشَاهُ أَنْ يُحْرِمَ الرَّاجِيْ مَكَارِمَهُ  [.....] أَوْ يَرْجِعَ الْجَارُ مِنْهُ غَيْرَ مُحْتَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Far be it from him to deprive the hopeful of his gifts. Or that a neighbor seeking safety should return without being honored.
wirds.transliteration: Hashaahu an yuhrimar raaji makaarimahu [.....] aw yarji' al-jaaru minhu ghayra muhtaram

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمُنْذُ أَلْزَمْتُ أَفْكَارِيْ مَدَائِحَهُ  [.....] وَجَدْتُهُ لِخَلَاصِيْ خَيْرَ مُلْتَزِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ever since I devoted my thoughts to praising him I have found him to be the best assurance of my salvation.
wirds.transliteration: Wa mundhu alzamtu afkaari madaaihahu [.....] wajadtuhoo likhalaasi khayra multazim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَنْ يَفُوْتَ الْغِنَى مِنْهُ يَدًا تَرِبَتْ  [.....] اِنَّ الْحَيَا يُنْبِتُ الْأَزْهَارَ فِي الْأَكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: His wealth will not ignore a dusty hand. Showers bring flowers to arid hilltops.
wirds.transliteration: Wa lan yafuut al-ghinaa minhoo yadan taribat [.....] inna al-hayaa yunbitu al-azhaara fi al-akami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَمْ أُرِدْ زَهْرَةَ الدُّنْيَا الَّتِي اقْتَطَفَتْ  [.....] يَدَا زُهَيْرٍ بِمَا أَثْنَى عَلَى هَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And yet I crave not the worldly flowers which the hands of Poet Zuhaiyr once picked by praising King Herem.
wirds.transliteration: Wa lam uridh zahraata ad-dunya al-latii aqatafat [.....] yadaa Zuhayrin bimaa athnaaa 'alaa Harim

wirds.ar_wird_description: في المناجاة وعرض الحاجات على النَّبِيّ ﷺ
wirds.en_wird_description: Soft talk with the Prophet ﷺ
wirds.transliteration: Fi al-munajaat wa 'ardh al-haajaat 'ala an-nabee ﷺ

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا أَكْرَمَ الْخَلْقِ مَا لِيْ مَنْ أَلُوْذُ بِهِ  [.....] سِوَاكَ عِنْدَ حُلُوْلِ الْحَادِثِ الْعَمِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Most noble of mankind! To whom but you shall I turn, when the Biggest Calamity befalls?
wirds.transliteration: Ya akramal khalqi maa li man aloozoo bih [.....] siwaaka 'inda hulooli al-haadithi al-ammim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَنْ يَضِيْقَ رَسُوْلَ اللهِ جَاهُكَ بِيْ  [.....] اِذَا الْكَرِيْمُ تَجَلَّى بِاسْمِ مُنْتَقِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: God’s Messenger! Your merit shall not shrink on my account when the Generous God appears with the name Avenger.
wirds.transliteration: Wa lan yadhīqa Rasūlallāhi jāhuka bī [.....] idhā al-karīmu tajallā bismī muntasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَإِنَّ مِنْ جُوْدِكَ الدُّنْيَا وَضَرَّتَهَا  [.....] وَمِنْ عُلُوْمِكَ عِلْمَ اللَّوْحِ وَالْقَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For this world and the next are from your bounty; and knowledge of Pen and Tablet are of what you know.
wirds.transliteration: Fa inna min jūdika ad-dunyā wa darrahā [.....] wa min 'ulūmika 'ilm al-lawhi wal-qalam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا نَفْسُ لَا تَقْنَطِيْ مِنْ زَلَّةٍ عَظُمَتْ [.....]  اِنَّ الْكَبَائِرَ فِي الْغُفْرَانِ كَالَّلمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O soul! Despair not due to a major fault! Capital sins resemble minor ones, in God’s forgiveness.
wirds.transliteration: Yā nafsu lā taqnati min zallatin 'aẓumat [.....] inna al-kabā'ira fī al-ghufrāni kallamam

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَعَلَّ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّيْ حِيْنَ يَقْسِمُهَا [.....]  تَأْتِيْ عَلَى حَسَبِ الْعِصْيَانِ فِي الْقِسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: It may be, when my Lord distributes His mercy, that it will come in proportion equal to our sins.
wirds.transliteration: La'allā raḥmata rabbī ḥīna yaqsimuhā [.....] ta'tī 'alā ḥasab al-'iṣyāni fī al-qisam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ وَاجْعَلْ رَجَائِيْ غَيْرَ مُنْعَكِسٍ  [.....] لَدَيْكَ وَاجْعَلْ حِسَابِيْ غَيْرَ مُنْخَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Lord! Let not my hope in You be overthrown, nor let my credit with You be void of worth.
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī wa-jil 'rajā'ī ghayra mun'akisīn [.....] ladayka wa-jil ḥisābī ghayra mun'harim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْطُفْ بِعَبْدِكَ فِي الدَّارَيْنِ اِنَّ لَهُ  [.....] صَبْرًا مَتَى تَدْعُهُ الْأَهْوَالُ يَنْهَزِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Be kind to Your slave in both the worlds, for when terror call to him, his patience is weak.
wirds.transliteration: Walṭuf bi'abdika fī ad-dārayn inna lahu [.....] ṣabran matā tad'uhu al-ahwālu yanhasim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَائْذَنْ لِسُحْبِ صَلَاةٍ مِنْكَ دَائِمَةٍ  [.....] عَلَى النَّبِيِّ بِمُنْهَلٍّ وَمُنْسَجِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: From You, let a cloud of constant blessings rain upon the Prophet ﷺ forever coming down.
wirds.transliteration: Wa'idhan lisuhbi ṣalātin minka dā'imatin [.....] 'alā an-nabīyi biminhalin wa-munsajim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا رَنَّحَتْ عَذَبَاتِ الْبَانِ رِيْحُ صَبَا  [.....] وَأَطْرَبَ الْعِيْسَ حَادِي الْعِيْسِ بِالنَّغَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For as long as the east breeze stirs the willow-branches, and camel-drivers rejoice their grey steeds with songs.
wirds.transliteration: Mā rannahat 'aẓabāt al-bāni rīḥu ṣabā [.....] wa-aṭraba al-‘īsa ḥādī al-‘īsi bin-nagham

wirds.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِيْ بَكْرٍ وَعَنْ عُمَرٍ  [.....] وَعَنْ عَلِيٍّ وَعَنْ عُثْمَانَ ذِي الْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Then be pleased with Abu-bakr and Omar (Radiyallahu Anhuma)- And Ali and Uthman (Radiyallahu Anhuma), the people of nobility.
wirds.transliteration: Thumma ar-riḍā 'an Abī Bakrin wa 'an 'Umarin [.....] wa 'an 'Alīyin wa 'an 'Uthmānin dhī al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْآلِ وَالصَّحْبِ ثُمَّ التَّابِعِيْنَ فَهُمْ  [.....] أَهْلُ التُّقَى وَالنَّقَى وَالْحِلْمِ وَالْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And upon his Family, Companions, and Followers. The people of piety, knowledge, clemency and generosity.
wirds.transliteration: Wal-āli waṣ-ṣaḥbi thumma at-tābi'īn fahum [.....] ahlu at-taqā wa an-naqā wa al-ḥilm wa al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَبِّ بالمُصْطَفَى بَلِّغْ مَقَاصِدَنَا  [.....] وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا مَا مَضَى يا واسِعَ الْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O Allah, by the Chosen, let us reach our aspirations, - and forgive us the past; Your generosity is so vast.
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī bil-muṣṭafā balligh maqāṣidanā [.....] waghfir lanā mā maḍā yā wāsi'a al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاغْفِرْ إِلَهِيْ لِكُلِّ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ بِمَا [.....]  يَتْلُوْهُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْأَقْصَى وَفِي الْحَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Forgive, my God all Muslims by – that they recite in the Al-Aqsa Mosque and in Mecca
wirds.transliteration: Waghfir ilāhī likulli al-muslimīn bimā [.....] yatlūhu fī al-masjid al-aqsā wa fī al-ḥaram

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِجَاهِ مَنْ بَيْتُهُ فِيْ طَيْبَةٍ حَرَمٌ [.....]  وَاِسْمُهُ قَسَمٌ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْقَسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By the one whose house in Madinah is a sanctuary, - And his name is one of the greatest oaths.
wirds.transliteration: Bijāhi man baytuhu fī ṭayyibatin ḥaramun [.....] wa ismuhu qasamun min a'ẓami al-qasam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَهَذِهِ بُرْدَةُ الْمُخْتَارِ قَدْ خُتِمَتْ  [.....] وَالْحَمْدُ لِلهِ فِيْ بَدْءٍ وَفِيْ خَتَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This is the end of the Burdah – Thanks God in the beginning and in the end.
wirds.transliteration: Wa hādhihi burdat al-mukhtār qad khutimāt [.....] wal-ḥamdu lillāhi fī bad'in wa fī khatam

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَبْيَاتُهَا قَدْ أَتَتْ سِتِّيْنَ مَعْ مِائَةٍ  [.....] فَرِّجْ بِهَا كَرْبَنَا يَا وَاسِعَ الْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Its verses have reached one hundred and sixty – Ease our concerns by it, You are the Most Generous.
wirds.transliteration: Abyaatuhā qad atat sittīn ma'a mi'atin [.....] farrij bihā karbanā yā wāsi'a al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: ياَ رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلَى الْمُخْتَارِ مِنْ مُضَرِ  [.....] وَالْأَنْبِياَ وَجَمِيْعِ الرُّسْلِ مَا ذُكِرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh Allah send blessings upon the Chosen One from the tribe of Mudar, And upon all Messengers and Prophets as they are mentioned.
wirds.transliteration: Ya rabbi salli 'ala al-mukhtari min mudarrin [.....] wa al-anbiya' wa jami'i al-rusuli ma dhukiru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَصَلِّ رَبِّ عَلَى الْهَادِي وَشِيْعَتِهِ  [.....] وَصَحْبِهِ مَنْ لِطَيِّ الدِّيْنِ قَدْ نَشَرُوْا
wirds.en_wird_description: Send blessings, O my Lord, upon the Guide and his followers, And upon his companions who propagated the faith.
wirds.transliteration: Wa salli rabbi 'ala al-hadi wa shi'atihi [.....] wa sahbihi man li tayyidi al-dini qad nasharu

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَجَاهَدُوا مَعَهُ فيِ اللهِ وَاجْتَهَدُوا  [.....] وَهَاجَرُوا وَلَهُ آوَوْا وَقَدْ نَصَرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: Fought with him, strove for Allah, Migrated, sheltered and supported.
wirds.transliteration: Wa jahadu ma'ahu fi Allah wa ijtahadu [.....] wa hajaru lahu awa wa qad nasaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبَيَّنُوا الْفَرْضَ وَالْمَسْنُونَ وَاعْتَصَبُوا  [.....] لِلَّهِ وَاعْتَصَمُوْا بِاللهِ فَانْتَصَرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: They clarified what is obligatory and what is Sunna, sought refuge in Allah and thus triumphed.
wirds.transliteration: Wa bayyanu al-farda wa al-masnuna wa i'tasabu [.....] lillahi wa i'tasamu billahi fan tasaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَزْكَى صَلَاةٍ وَأَنْمَاهَا وَأَشْرَفَهَا [.....]  يُعَطِّرُ الْكَوْنَ رَيَّا نَشْرُهَا الْعَطِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: May it be the purest, most flourishing and most noble blessing one that fragrances the universe.
wirds.transliteration: Azka salatan wa anmaha wa ashradaha [.....] yu'attiro al-kawna rayyan nashruha al-'atiru

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَعْبُوْقَةً بِعَبِيْقِ الْمِسْكِ زَاكِيَةً  [.....] مِنْ طِيْبِهَا أَرْجُ الرِضْوَانِ يَنْتَشِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Diffusing the pure fragrance of musk and from its fragrance may the scent of pleasure spread.
wirds.transliteration: Ma'bouqatan bi'abiqu al-miski zakiatan [.....] min taybiha arju al-ridwani yantashiru

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَدَّ الْحَصَى وَالثَّرَى وَالرَّمْلِ يَتْبَعُهَا  [.....] نَجْمُ السَّمَا وَنَبَاتُ الْأَرْضِ وَالْمَدَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: May it be multiplied by the number of stones, the grains of soil and sand, followed by the stars in the sky, and the vegetation on the earth!
wirds.transliteration: Adda al-hasa wa al-thara wa al-ramli yatba'uha [.....] najmu al-sama' wa nabatu al-ardi wa al-madar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ وَزْنِ مَثَاقِيْلِ الْجِبَالِ كَمَا [.....]  يَلِيْهِ قَطْرُ جَمِيْعِ الْمَاءِ وَالْمَطَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the weight of the mountains, followed by the drops of water and rain
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'adda wazni mathaqeeli al-jibali kama [.....] yalihi qatru jami'i al-ma'i wa al-matar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ مَا حَوَتِ اْلأَشْجَارُ مِنْ وَرَقٍ  [.....] وَكُلِّ حَرْفٍ غدَا يُتُلَى وَيَسْتَطَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: May it be multiplied by the number of leaves that the trees hold,
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'adda ma hawati al-ashjaru min waraqin [.....] wa kulli harfin ghada yutla wa yastatar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْوَحْشِ وَالطيْرِ وَاْلأَسْمَاكِ مَعْ نَعَمِ [.....]  يَلِيْهِمُ الْجِنُّ وَاْلأَمْلَاكُ وَالْبَشَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And every letter ever to be uttered read and scribed. And (by the number) of beasts, birds, fish and animals, and by the Jinn, the Angels and humans
wirds.transliteration: Wa al-wahshi wa al-tayri wa al-asmaki ma'a na'ami [.....] yalihim al-jinnu wa al-amlaku wa al-basharu

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالذَّرُ وَالنَّمْلُ مَعْ جَمْعِ الْحُبُوْبِ كَذَا  [.....] وَالشَّعْرُ وَالصُوْفُ وَاْلأَرْيَاشُ وَالْوَبَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the number of atoms, ants and all the grains and also by the numbers of hair, wool feather and fur.
wirds.transliteration: Wa al-dharu wa al-namlu ma'a jami'i al-hububi katha [.....] wa al-sha'ru wa al-sufu wa al-aryashu wa al-wabaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَا أُحَاطَ بِهِ الْعِلْمُ المُحِيْطُ وَمَا  [.....] جَرَى بِهِ الْقِلَمُ الْمأَمُوْرُ وَالْقَدَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the amount of knowledge that Allah encompasses and by what the pen of decree and destiny has written
wirds.transliteration: Wa ma uhita bihi al-ilmu al-muhiitu wa ma [.....] jara bihi al-qalamu al-ma'muru wa al-qadaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ نَعْمَائِكَ اللاَّتِي مَنَنْتَ بِهَا [.....]  عَلَى الْخَلاَئِقِ مُذْ كَانُوْا وَمُذْ حُشِرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the number of all the blessings that Allah has bestowed upon the creation from the time of their creation to the time of their resurrection.
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'adda ni'ma'ika allati mananta biha [.....] 'ala al-khala'iqi muz kanu wa muz hushu'ru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ مِقْدَارِهِ السَّامِي الَّذِي شَرُفَتْ  [.....]  بِهِ النَّبِيُّوْنَ وَاْلأَمْلَاكُ وَافْتَخَرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the magnitude of the sublime that honoured the Prophets and the Angels and gave them glory.
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'adda miqdarihi al-sami alladhi sharufat [.....] bihi al-nabiyyuuna wa al-amlaku wa ftakhiru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ مَا كَانَ فيِ اْلأَكْوَانِ يَا سَنَدِي [.....]  وَمَا يَكُونُ إِلَى أَنْ تُبْعَثَ الصُّوَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the number of all the things in the universes, O my Helper, and by everything that will be until the horn blows.
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'adda ma kana fi al-akwani ya sandi [.....] wa ma yakoonu ila an tub'atha al-suwar

wirds.ar_wird_description: فيِ كُلِّ طَرْفَةِ عَيْنٍ يَطْرِفُوْنَ بِهَا  [.....] أَهْلُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَاْلأَرْضِيْنَ أَوْ يَذَرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: And with every blinking of the eyes of the people in the heavens and the earth and in their moments of stillness
wirds.transliteration: Fi kulli tarafati 'ayni yatrifoona biha [.....] ahlu al-sama'ati wa al-ardiyani aw yadharu

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِلْءَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَاْلأَرْضِيْنَ مَعْ جَبَلٍ  [.....] وَالْفَرْشِ وَالْعَرْشِ وَالْكُرْسِي وَمَا حَصَرُوا
wirds.en_wird_description: And multiply it by everything that the heavens and the earth contains, including the mountains, and the lands, the Throne, the Chair , and whatever they encompass,
wirds.transliteration: Mil'a al-sama'ati wa al-ardiyani ma'a jabalin [.....] wa al-farshi wa al-'arshi wa al-kursiy wa ma hasaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا أَعْدَمَ اللهُ مَوْجُوْداً وَأَوْجَدَ مَعْـ ــدُوْماً  [.....] صَلَاةً دَوَاماً لَيْسَ تَنْحَصِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And may the blessings be by the number of what Allah has not created, and by that that which He has created, with a continual blessing that does not end.
wirds.transliteration: Ma a'dama Allahu mawjudan wa awjada ma'dooman [.....] salatan dawamana laysat tanhasiru

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَسْتَغْرِقُ الْعَدَّ مَعْ جَمْعِ الدُّهُورِ  [.....] كَمَا تُحِيْطُ بِالْحَدِّ لاَ تُبْقِي وَلاَ تَذَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: May it encompass the number of all things that have passed throughout the ages
wirds.transliteration: Tastaghriqu al-'adda ma'a jami'i al-duhoori [.....] kama tuheetu bil-hadi la tubqi wa la tadharu

wirds.ar_wird_description: لاَ غَايَةً وَانْتِهَاءً يَا عَظِيْمُ لَهَا  [.....] وَلاَ لَهَا أَمَدٌ يُقْضَى فَيُعْتَبَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: May it have no end or limitation, O Great One, nor a period that is concluded or contained
wirds.transliteration: La ghayatan wa intiha'an ya azimu laha [.....] wa la laha amadun yuqda fayu'tabaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ أَضْعَافِ مَا قَدْ مَرَّ مِنْ عَدَدٍ  [.....] مَعْ ضَعْفِ أَضْعَافِهِ يَامَنْ لَهُ الْقَدَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And double the amount that has been enumerated, doubled again, and multiplied, O The One who is Most Able,
wirds.transliteration: Wa'adda ad'afa ma qad marra min 'adadin [.....] ma'a da'fi ad'afi-hi yā man la-hu al-qadar

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَى سَيِّدِيْ وَكَمَا [.....]  أَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ نُصَلِّيْ أَنْتَ مُقْتَدِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: As you are happy and pleased, my master as your request for us to salute, for You are most able
wirds.transliteration: Kamā tuhibbu wa tardā sayyidī wa kamā [.....] amartanā an nusallī anta muqtadir

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَعَ السَّلاَمِ كَمَا قَدْ مَرَّ مِنْ عَدَدٍ [.....]  رَبِّي وَضَاعِفْهُمَا وَالْفَضْلُ مُنْتَشِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And send blessings with peace, by the number of all that has been mentioned my Lord, and multiply it, so that the blessings are spread far and wide.
wirds.transliteration: Ma'a as-salāmi kamā qad marra min 'adadin [.....] rabbi wada'ifhumā wal-fadlu muntashir

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ ذَلِكَ مَضْرُوْبٌ بِحَقِّكَ فيِ [.....]  أَنْفَاسِ خَلْقِكَ إِنْ قَلُّوْا وَإِنْ كَثُرُوْا
wirds.en_wird_description: And may it all be multiplied by Your worth and by the breaths of Your creation whether it be much or little
wirds.transliteration: Wa kullu dhālika maḍrūbun biḥaqqika fī [.....] anfāsi khalqika in qallu wa in kathurū

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ وَاغْفِرْ لِقَارِبْهَا وَسَامِعِهَا [.....]  وَالْمُسْلِمِيْنَ جَمِيْعًا أَيْنَمَا حَضَرُوْا
wirds.en_wird_description: And my Lord, forgive all those who recite it, listen to it, and all the Muslims wherever they may be.
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī waghfir liqāribihā wa sāmi'ihā [.....] wal-muslimīn jami'an aynamā ḥaḍarū

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَوَالِدِيْناَ وَأَهْلِيْنَا وَجِيْرَتِنَا  [.....] وَكُلُّنَا سَيِّدِي لِلْعَفْوِ مُفْتَقِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And forgive our Parents, our families, our Neighbours and all of us, Oh my Master we are in need of your forgiveness
wirds.transliteration: Wa wālidīnā wa ahlīnā wa jīratinā [.....] wa kullunā sayyidī lil-‘afwi muftaqar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقَدْ أَتَيْتُ ذُنُوْباً لاَ عِدَادَ لَّهَا  [.....] لَكِنَّ عَفْوَكَ لاَ يُبْقِي وَلاَ يَذَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have come with sins that are innumerable, but your forgiveness does not end or perish
wirds.transliteration: Wa qad ataytu dhunūban lā 'idād lahā [.....] lakinna 'afwaka lā yubqī walā yadharu

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْهَمُّ عَنْ كُلِّ مَا أَبْغِيْهِ أَشْغَلَنِي  [.....] وَقَدْ أتى خَاضِعاً وَالْقَلْبُ مُنْكَسِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And with grief that occupies me from all that I aspire to, and I come with humility and heartbroken
wirds.transliteration: Wal-hammu 'an kulli mā abghīhi ashghalanī [.....] wa qad atā ḵāḍi'an wal-qalbu munkasir

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَرْجُوْكَ يَا رَبِّ فيِ الدَّارَيْنِ تَرْحَمُنَا  [.....] بِجَاهِ مَنْ فيِ يَدَيْهِ سَبَّحَ الْحَجَرُ
