wirds.en_wird_description: I beg You, Oh Lord, In both worlds to have mercy on us, by his in whose hands the stones glorified Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Arjūkā yā rabbī fī ad-dārayn tarḥamunā [.....] bijāhi man fī yadīhi sabbaha al-ḥajar

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ أَعْظِمْ لَنَا أَجْراً وَمَغْفِرَةً [.....]  فَإِنَّ جُوْدَكَ بَحْرٌ لَيْسَ يَنْحَصِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh Lord, increase the good favour upon us and forgive us for indeed Your generosity is an ocean unlimited
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī a'ẓim lanā ajran wa maghfiratan [.....] fa'inna jūdaka baḥrun laysā yanḥaṣir

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاقْضِ دُيُوْناً لَهَا الْأَخْلاَقُ ضَائِقَةٌ  [.....] وَفَرِّجِ الْكَرْبَ عَنَّا أَنْتَ مُقْتَدِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And alleviate the anxieties of a distressing nature, and relieve us of sorrow, You are Most Able.
wirds.transliteration: Waqḍī duyūnan lahā al-akhlāqu ḍā'iqah [.....] wafarriji al-karba 'annā anta muqtadir

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَطِيْفًا بِنَا فيِ كُلِّ نَازِلَةٍ  [.....] لُطْفًا جَمِيْلاً بِهِ اْلأَهْوَالُ تَنْحَسِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And be kind with us in every calamity with a beautiful kindness by which distress is no more
wirds.transliteration: Wa kun laṭīfan binā fī kulli nāzilatin [.....] luṭfan jamīlan bihi al-ahwālu tanḥasir

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِالْمُصْطَفَى الْمُجْتَبَى خَيْرِ اْلأَنَامِ وَمَنْ  [.....] جَلاَلَةً نَزَلَتْ فِي مَدْحِهِ السُّوَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: By the honour of Mustafa, the chosen one, the best of creation. In his praise the chapters of the Quran was revealed.
wirds.transliteration: Bil-muṣṭafā al-mujtabā khayri al-anāmī waman [.....] jalālatan nazalat fī madḥihi as-suwar

wirds.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الصَّلاَةُ عَلَى الْمُخْتَارِ مَا طَلَعَتْ [.....]  شَمْسُ النَّهَارِ وَمَا قَدْ شَعْشَعَ الْقَمَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And blessing be upon the chosen one for as long as the sun rises and the moon shines
wirds.transliteration: Thumma aṣ-ṣalāṭu 'alā al-mukhtārī mā ṭala'at [.....] shamsu an-nahāri wamā qad sha'asha'a al-qamar

wirds.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ خَلِيْفَتِهِ  [.....] مَنْ قَامَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ لِلدِّيْنِ يَنْتَصِرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And may Your pleasure be on Abu-Bakr, his Khalifa, who maintained the religion after him victoriously.
wirds.transliteration: Thumma ar-riḍā 'an Abī Bakrin khalīfatihi [.....] man qāmā min ba'dihi lid-dīnī yantasiru

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَنْ أَبِيْ حَفْصٍ الْفَارُوْقِ صَاحِبِهِ  [.....] مَنْ قَوْلُهُ الْفَصْلُ فيِ أَحْكَامِهِ عُمَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And Upon Abi-Hafs, Al Faruq, his companion Umar, who had the final word by his judgement
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'an Abī Ḥafṣin al-Fārūqi ṣāḥibihi [.....] man qawluhu al-faṣlu fī aḥkāmihi 'Umar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَجُدْ لِعُثْمَانَ ذِي النُّوْرَيْنِ مَنْ كَمُلَتْ  [.....] لَهُ الْمَحَاسِنُ فيِ الدَّارَيْنِ وَالظَّفَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And grant Othman, the possessor of the two lights, whose good qualities were accomplished with victory in both abodes
wirds.transliteration: Wa jud li'Uthmāna dhī an-nūrīn man kamulat [.....] lahu al-maḥāsinu fī ad-dārayn wa azh-zaffaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَذَا عَلِيٌّ مَعَ ابْنَيْهِ وَأُمِّهِمَا [.....]  أَهْلُ الْعَبَاءِ كَمَا قَدْ جَاءَنَا الْخَبَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And likewise to Ali with his two sons and upon their mother, the people of the mantle as has been related in the Hadith
wirds.transliteration: Kadhā 'Alīyyun ma'a ibnayhi wa ummihimā [.....] ahlu al-‘abā'i kamā qad jā'anā al-khabaru

wirds.ar_wird_description: سَعْدٌ سَعِيْدُ بْنُ عَوْفٍ طَلْحَةٌ وَأَبُوْ  [.....] عُبَيْدَةٍ وَزُبَيْرٌ سَادَةٌ غُرَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And upon Sa’d and Saeed, ibn-Auf, Talha, Abu Ubaida and Zubayr, all nobles.
wirds.transliteration: Sa'dun Sa'īdu bnu 'Awfin Ṭalḥatun wa Abū [.....] 'Ubaydatin wa Zubayrun sādatun ghrarar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَحَمْزَةٌ وَكَذَا الْعَبَّاسُ سَيِّدُنَا [.....]  وَنَجْلُهُ الْحَبُرُ مِنْ زَالَتْ بِهِ الغِيَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And upon Hamza and our master Abbas and upon his son, the scholar through whom obscurities were no more
wirds.transliteration: Wa Ḥamzah wa kathā al-‘Abbāsu sayyidunā [.....] wa najluhu al-ḥabru min zālat bihī al-ghiyar

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاْلآلُ وَالصَّحْبُ وَاْلأَتْبَاعُ قَاطِبَةً  [.....] مَاجَنَّ لَيْلُ الدَّيَاجِي أَوْ بَدَا السَّحَرُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And upon all the family, companions and followers for as long as the dark night covers the day and dawn appears.
wirds.transliteration: Wa 'ālū wa aṣ-ṣahbu wa al-atbā'u qāṭibatan [.....] mājanna laylu ad-dayājī aw badā as-sahar

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَيَا مُرِيدَ اللَه نُعِيْدْ لَكْ قَولِي اصْغَهُ  [.....] إذَا تَفْهَمْ قَوْلِيْ بِهِ تَصِلْ لله
wirds.en_wird_description: O, the seeker of Allah, I repeat to you my say. Listen carefully. If you understand it, you get to Allah
wirds.transliteration: Aya mureed Allah nu'id lak qawli asghahu [.....] idha tafham qawli bihi tasil lillah

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَلَيْكَ يَا مُرِيْدْ بِخَمْرَةِ التَّوْحِيْدْ  [.....] وَإِنْ تَبْغِ الـْمَزيدْ فَالغَيْرُ عَنْكَ انْسَاْهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: O seeker of Allah, drink from the wine of oneness If you need more, forget any other.
wirds.transliteration: Alayka ya mureed bikhamrat at-tawhid [.....] wa in tabghi al-mazeed falghayru anka insah

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاذْكُرْ الاسْمَ الأَعْظَمْ واطْوِ الكَوْنَ تَغْنَمْ  [.....] وَخُضْ بَـحْرَ القِدَمْ فَذَاكَ بـَحْرُ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Mention the Greatest Name, and fold away the universe, you win. Dive in the Ocean of Eternity. This is the ocean of Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Fadhkur al-ism al-'azham watwi al-kawn taghnam [.....] wakhudh bahr al-qadam fathaka bahr Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَخُضْ بَـحْرَ الأَنْوَاْرْ وَالـمَعْنَى وَالأَسْرَاْرْ  [.....] وَافْنِ هَذِيْ الـدِّيَار يَبْلُغْ قَلبُكْ مُنَاهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Dive in the ocean of lights, meaning, and secrets. Annihilate these worlds, your heart will get to its target.
wirds.transliteration: Wakhudh bahr al-anwar wal-ma'na wal-asrar [.....] wafni hadhihi al-diyar yablugh qalbuk munah

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلْتَفْنَ فِيْ المـَعْبُودْ تَذُقْ مَعْنَىْ الشُّهُوْدْ  [.....] إِذْ لَيْسَ ذَاْ الوُجُوْدْ إِلَّا مِنْ نُوْرِ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Get annihilated in the Worshipped, you will taste the meaning of witnessing. This universe is but from the light of Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Waltafna fi al-ma'bud tadhuq ma'na al-shuhud [.....] idh laysa dha al-wujud illa min noor Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: الـمُلْكُ والمـَلَكُوتْ كَذَاْكَ الـْجَبَرُوْتْ  [.....] فَكُلُّهَا نُعُوتْ والذَّاتُ مُسَمَّاه
wirds.en_wird_description: The Seen and the Unseen worlds, together with the World of the Truth, All are just descriptions; the Essence is the Named.
wirds.transliteration: Al-mulk wal-malakut kadhalika al-jabarut [.....] fakulluha nu'ut wal-dhat musammah

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَغِبْ عَنِ الصّـِـفَاتْ وافْنَ فِيْ ذَاْتِ الذَّاْتْ  [.....] هَذِيْ تَلَوُّنَاتْ مَصِيْرُهَا لِله
wirds.en_wird_description: Get absented from the attributes, and get annihilated in the Essence itself. These are just colours, the destination of which are to Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Faghid an al-sifat wafna fi dhat al-dhat [.....] hadhi talawwinat maseeruha lillah

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِلَيْهِ الـْمُنْــتَهَىْ وَمِنْهُ الـْمُبْتَدَاْ  [.....] والْآنَ قَدْ بَدَاْ وَالْكَوْنُ فِيْ حُلَاْهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: To Him is the end. From Him was the start. Now He appeared and the universe is in full beauty.
wirds.transliteration: Ilayhi al-muntaha wa minhu al-mubtada [.....] wal-an qad bada wa al-kawn fi hulaah

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَهُ الْكَوْنُ مِرآةْ وَمَظْهَرُ الْصِّفَاْتْ  [.....] مُـحَمَّدْ نُوْرُ الَّذَاْتْ عَلَيْهِ صَلَّىْ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Universe is just a mirror of Him, and a reflection of His attributes. Mohammad is the light of the Essence, prayers of Allah be on him.
wirds.transliteration: Lahu al-kawn mira'at wa mazharu al-sifat [.....] Muhammad noor al-dhat alayhi sallallahu

wirds.ar_wird_description: الْعَلَاْوِيْ يَقُوْلْ قَوْلَاً مِنْهُ مَقْبُوْلْ  [.....] تـَهِمْ بِهِ العُقُوْلْ تَغِيْبْ فِيْ ذِاْتِ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Al-Alawi says something that is reasonable; By this say, the intellect is bewildered and get absented in the Essence of Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Al-Alawi yaqul qawlan minhu maqboul [.....] tahimm bihi al-'uqool tagheeb fi dhat Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ [,] لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدُ رَسُوْلُ اللهِ [,] عَلَيْهِ صَلاةُ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: No god but Allah , No god but Allah , Mohammad is the Prophet of Allah , Prayers of Allah are on him
wirds.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāh, Lā ilāha illā Allāh [.....] Muḥammadur Rasūlullāh, ʿalayhī ṣalātu Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِهَا يَثْبُتُ الإِيْمَان [,] بِهَا يَحْصُلُ الأَمَانِ  [.....] كَرِّرْ أَيُّهَا الإِنْسَانْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It establishes the faith , It brings security , Repeat, o man , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Bihā yathbatu al-īmān, bihā yaḥṣulu al-amān [.....] Karrir ayyuha al-insān, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: تِكْرَارُهَا مَا أَحْلاهُ [,] مَا أَبْهَاهُ مَا أَعْلاهُ  [.....] تُدْنِي الْعَبْدَ مِنْ مَوْلاهْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: How sweet to repeat it , How beautiful , How high It brings slave closer to Master , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Tikrāruhā mā aḥlāhū, mā abhāhū mā aʿlāhū [.....] Tudnī al-ʿabda min mawlāh, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَدْ أَتَانَا فِيْ الأَخْبَارِ [,] عَنِ الْنَّبِي الْمُخْتَارِ  [.....] أَنَّ أَفْضَلَ الأَذْكَارْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: We have received news , From the Chosen Prophet , That the best Dhikr is , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Qad atānā fī al-akhbār, ʿani al-Nabī al-Mukhtār [.....] Ann afḍala al-adhkār, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: جَمَعَتْ مَعْنَى الْتَّوْحِيدِ [,] وَدَلَّتْ بِلا مَزِيْد  [.....] كَرِّرْ أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيْدْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It included the meaning of oneness , It has truly guided us Repeat , O seeker of Allah , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Jamaʿat maʿnā al-tawḥīd, waddalat bilā mazyd [.....] Karrir ayyuha al-murīd, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: ذَاكِرُهَا لا يَشْقَى [,] لا يَنَالُ فَرَقـًا  [.....] هِيَ الْعُرْوَةِ الْوُثْقَى [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: The repeater will never lose , Nothing will scare him , It is the strongest bond , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Dhākiruhā lā yashqā, lā yanālu faraqan [.....] Hiya al-ʿurwa al-wuthqā, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هِيَ حِصْنُكَ الْحَصِينُ [,] هِيَ دِرْعُكَ الْمَتِيْنُ  [.....] ذِكْرُ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It is your strong fortress , It is your robust shield , Mentioning the Lord of worlds , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hiya ḥiṣnuka al-ḥaṣīn, hiya dirʿuka al-matīn [.....] Dhikr rabbī al-ʿālamīn, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِهَا الْفَوْزُ والْنَجَاةُ [,] فِيْهَا كُلُّ الْبَرَكَاتِ  [.....] تُنْجِي مِنْ كُلِّ الآفَاتْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It carries winning and safety , It carries all blesses , It saves from all anxieties , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Bihā al-fawzu wal-najāh, fīhā kullu al-barakāt [.....] Tunjī min kulli al-āfāt, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِهَا تُمْحَى الْسَّيِئَاتُ [,] بِهَا تَنْمُو الْحَسَنَاتُ  [.....] بِهَا تَنْهَلُّ الْخَيْرَاتْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It wipes out sins , It increases hasanat , It brings goodness , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Bihā tumḥā al-sayyi'āt, bihā tanmū al-ḥasanāt [.....] Bihā tanhallu al-khayrāt, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: فِيْهَا للْسُقْمِ دَوَاء [,] فِيْهَا لِلْضَعْفِ قِوَّى  [.....] هِيَ كَلِمَةُ الْتَّقْوَى [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It has healing for illness , It has strength for weakness , It is the Kalema of piety , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Fīhā lil-suḫmī dawā', fīhā lil-ḍaʿfī qiwā [.....] Hiya kalimat al-taqwā, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هِيَ شِفَاءُ الْصُّدُورِ [,] هِيَ نُوْرٌ عَلَى نُوْرْ  [.....] ذِكْرُ رَبِّكَ الْغَفُورْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It has healing for the chest , It is light over light , Mention of your Forgiving Lord , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hiya shifā'u al-ṣudūr, hiya nūrun ʿalā nūr [.....] Dhikr rabbika al-ghafūr, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هِيَ الْنِّعْمَةُ الْعُظْمَى [,] هِيَ الْمَقَامُ الأَسْمَى  [.....] لَيْسَ تُبْقِي أَلَما [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It is the greatest bless , It is the highest status , It never leaves any pain , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hiya al-niʿmatu al-ʿuẓmā, hiya al-maqāmu al-asmā [.....] Laysa tubqī alaman, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هِيَ شِفَاءُ الْعِلَلْ [,] فِيْهَا إِصْلاحُ الْخَلَلْ  [.....] فَاَذْكُرْ لا تَخْشَى الْمَلَلْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It heals illnesses , It corrects faults , Invoke relentlessly , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hiya shifā'u al-ʿilal, fīhā iṣlāḥu al-ḫalal [.....] Fa-adhkur lā takhsha al-malal, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: لازِمُوهَا يَا إِخْوَان [,] نَوِّرُوا بِهَا الْجَنَانْ  [.....] إِنَّ مِفْتَاحُ الْجِنَانْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Keep it brothers , Enlighten hearts with it , The Key to Paradise is , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Lāzimūhā yā ikhwān, nawwirū bihā al-janān [.....] Inna miftāḥu al-janān, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: لازِمُوهَا بِالأَسْحَار [,] وَالْعَشِيِّ وَالإِبْكَارْ  [.....] تَسْتَمِدُّوا مِنَ أَنْوَار [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Keep it during the small hours , At twilight, day and night , To receive the light of , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Lāzimūhā bil-ashār, wal-ʿashī wa al-ibkār [.....] Tastaṁiddu min anwar, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَوِّرُوا بِهَا الْقُلُوْبْ [,] مَحِّصُوْا بِهَا الْذُنُوبْ  [.....] إِنَّ أَعْظَمُ الْمَطْلُوبْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Enlighten hearts with it , Wipe out sins , The greatest target is , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Nawwirū bihā al-qulūb, maḥḥiṣū bihā al-dhunūb [.....] Inna aʿẓamu al-maṭlūb, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هِيَ الْرَّحْمَةُ الْكُبْرَى [,] فِيْ الْدُنْيَا وفِيْ الأُخْرَى  [.....] أَعْلَى الأَذْكَارِ أَجْرًا [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It is the greatest mercy , At this world and the Afterlife , The most highly rewarded Dhikr , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hiya al-raḥmatu al-kubrá, fī al-dunyā wa fī al-ākhirah [.....] Aʿlā al-adhkār ajran, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: لا تَغْفَلْ عَنْهَا وَلا [,] تَتْرُكْ تَنْزِيْهَ الْمَوْلَى  [.....] إِنَّ الْمَثَلَ الأَعْلَى [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Do not forget it, nor , Leave transcendence of Master , The highest principle is , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Lā tighfal ʿanhā walā, tatruk tanzīh al-mawlā [.....] Inna al-mathala al-ʿālā, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَافِظُوا عَلَى الْصَّلَوَات [,] دَاوِمُوا عَلَى الْطَّاعَاتِ  [.....] تُنْجِيْكُمْ مِنَ الآفَات [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Keep prayers on time , Keep devotions , It saves you from anxieties , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Ḥāfiẓū ʿalā al-ṣalawāt, dāwimū ʿalā al-ṭāʿāt [.....] Tunjīkum mina al-āfāt, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: يُقَارِنُهَا الإِقْرَارْ [,] بِرِسَالَةِ الْمُخْتَارْ  [.....] مَنْ حَبَانَا مِنْ أَنْوَارْ [,] لَا إِلَــــهَ إِلَّا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: It is tied to acknowledgement of , The Message of the Chosen , Who gave us the lights of , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Yuʿārinu-hā al-iqrār, birisālati al-mukhtār [.....] Man ḥabānā min anwār, Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: خَيْرُ الْخَلْقِ عِنْـدَ اللهْ [,] صَاحِبُ الْعِزِّ وَالْجَاهْ  [.....] خَـاتَـمُ رُسْلِ الإلَه [,] مُحَمَّدْ رَسُوْلُ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: The best people of Allah , The Owner of honour and dignity , The Seal of Prophets , There is no god but Allah
wirds.transliteration: Khayru al-khalqi ʿinda Allāh, ṣāḥibu al-ʿizz wa al-jāh [.....] Khātamu rusuli al-ilāh, Muḥammadu Rasūlullāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] زَيْنَ الأَنْبِيَاْءِ   [.....] السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] أَصْفَىْ الأَصْفِيَاْءِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on you, Best of Prophets Salam on you, the purest of all.
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayka, zayna al-anbiyāʾi [.....] As-salāmu ʿalayka, aṣfā al-ṣafiyāʾi

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] أَتْقَىْ الأَتْقِيَاْءِ   [.....] السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] أَزْكَىْ الأَزْكِيَاْءِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on you, the Most Pious. Salam on you, the Best Mannered.
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayka, atqā al-atqiyāʾi [.....] As-salāmu ʿalayka, azkā al-azkiyāʾi

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] مِنْ رَبِّ السَّمَاْءِ   [.....] السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] دَاْئِمْ بِلَاْ انْقِضَاْءِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on you, from the Lord of heavens. Salam on you without end
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayka, min rabbī as-samāʾi [.....] As-salāmu ʿalayka, dāʾiman bilā anqiḍāʾi

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] أَحْمَدْ يَاْ حَبِيْبِـيْ   [.....] السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] طَهَ يَا طَبـِيـْبـِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on you Ahmad, my beloved. Salam on you, Taha, my healing.
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayka, Aḥmad yā ḥabībī [.....] As-salāmu ʿalayka, Ṭahā yā ṭabībī

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَيْكَ [,] يا مِسْكِيْ وَطِيْـــبـِيْ   [.....] السَّلَاْمُ عَلَىْ  [,] الـْمُقَدَّمْ فيْ الإِمَامَة
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on you, my musk and perfume. Salam on the Imam of Prophets
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayka, yā miskī wa ṭībī [.....] As-salāmu ʿalā, al-muqaddam fī al-imāmah

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَىْ  [,] الـْمُظَلَّلِ بِالغَمَامَةْ   [.....] السَّلَاْمُ عَلَىْ  [,] الـْمُشَفَّعِ في القِيَامَة
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on the one who the cloud shaded. Salam on you the Saviour on the Hereafter
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalā, al-muẓallalī bil-ghamāmah [.....] As-salāmu ʿalā, al-mushafīʿi fī al-qiyāmah

wirds.ar_wird_description: السَّلَاْمُ عَلَىْ  [,] الـمُتَوَّجْ بِالكَرَامَة   [.....] اللَّهُمَّ صَّلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَيْه
wirds.en_wird_description: Salam on the one crowned with honour. O Allah, have your prayers, salam and blessings on him
wirds.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalā, al-mutawajji bi al-karāmah [.....] Allāhumma ṣalli wa sallim wa bārīk ʿalayh

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَايَ صَلِّ وَسَـلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَا [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O Lord extend everlasting Blessing and Peace on Your Beloved, Best of Creation.
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya, ṣalli wa sallim dāʾimān abadan [.....] ʿalā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ أَشْرَفُ الأعْرَابِ والعَجَمِ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ مَنْ يَمْشِي عَلَى قَدَم
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the noblest of the Arabs and the non-Arabs. Muhammad is the best of all those who walk on feet.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ashrafu al-ʿarabī wal-ʿajamī [.....] Muḥammadun khayru man yamshī ʿalā qadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ بَاسِطُ الـمَــعْرُوْفِ جَاْمِعُهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ صاحبُ الإِحْسَانِ والْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the most expansive giver of all good things, Muhammad is the master of excellence and generosity.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun bāsiṭu al-maʿrūfi jāmiʿuhu [.....] Muḥammadun ṣāḥibu al-ḥisāni wal-karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ تَاْجُ رُسْلِ اللهِ قَاطِبَة ً [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ صَاْدِقُ الأَقْوَالِ والْكَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the crown of all Messengers of God,  Muhammad, is most truthful in speech and word.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun tāju rusuli Allāhi qāṭibatun [.....] Muḥammadun ṣādiqu al-aqwāli wal-kalimī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ثَابِتُ الـْمِيْثَاقِ حَافِظُهُ ُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ طَيِّبُ الأَخْلَاقِ وَالشِّيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is utterly reliable in keeping pledges, Muhammad has the best character and qualities.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun thābitu al-mīthāqi ḥāfiẓuhu [.....] Muḥammadun ṭayyibu al-akhlāqi wa-sh-shiyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ حَاْكِمٌ بالْعَدْلِ ذُو شَرَفٍ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مَعْدِنُ الإِنْعَاْمِ وَالْـحِكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is fair and wise in judgment, with nobleness. Muhammad is the source of kindness and wisdom.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ḥākimun bil-ʿadli dhu sharafin [.....] Muḥammadun maʿdinul inʿāmi wal-ḥikami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ جُبِلَتْ بالنُّورِ طِينَتُهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ لـَمْ يَزَلْ نُوْرَاً مِنَ القِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, his substance was watered with light, Muhammad has always been light from eternity.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun jubilat bin-nūri ṭīnatuhoo [.....] Muḥammadun lam yazal nūran min al-qadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ خَلْقِ الله مِنْ مُضَرٍ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ رُسْلِ الله كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the finest of God’s creation, from the tribe of Mudar, Muhammad is the best of all God’s Messengers.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun khayru khalqi Allāhi min Muḍarīn [.....] Muḥammadun khayru rusuli Allāhi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ دِينُهُ حَقٌّ نَدِينُ بِهِ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مُـشْرِقٌ حَقَّاً عَلَى عَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad – his creed is true, by it we profess our faith, Muhammad is eminent, the embodiment of truth.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun dīnuhoo ḥaqqon nadīnu bihī [.....] Muḥammadun mushriqun ḥaqqan ʿalā ʿalamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ذِكْـرُهُ رَوْحٌ لِأَنْفُسِنَا [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ شُكْرُهُ فَرْضٌ عَلَى الأُمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad – to mention him brings life to our souls, Muhammad – praising him is a duty upon all peoples.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun dhikrūhoo rawḥun li-anfusinā [.....] Muḥammadun shukruhoo farḍon ʿalā al-umamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ رَحِمَ اللهُ العِبَادَ بِهِ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ سَبَبُ الإِنْشَاء مِنْ عَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, Allah has provided mercy to people through him. Muhammad is the means for creation from nothing.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun raḥima Allāhu al-ʿibāda bihī [.....] Muḥammadun sababul inshāʾi min ʿadamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ زِيْنَة ُالدُّنْيَا وَبَهْجَتُهَا [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ كَاشِفُ الغُمَّاتِ والظُّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad – the beauty of the world and its splendor, Muhammad lifts the veils of darkness and distress.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun zīnatu ad-dunyā wa-bahjatuhā [.....] Muḥammadun kāshifu al-ghumāti wal-ẓulami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ سَيِّدٌ طَابَتْ مَنَاقِبُهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ صَاْغَهُ الرَّحْمَنُ بِالنِّعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is a master, whose virtues bring delight Muhammad is the Most Merciful fashioned him from grace
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun sayyidun ṭābat manāqibuhu [.....] Muḥammadun ṣāghahu ar-raḥmānu bin-niʿamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ شَرَّفَ البَارِي مَرَاتِبَه [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَصَّهُ الرَّحْمَنُ بِالنِّعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, the Creator has elevated his ranks. Muhammad, the Gracious has allocated blessings to him.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun sharrafa al-bārī marātibahu [.....] Muḥammadun khaṣṣahu ar-raḥmānu bin-niʿamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ صَفْوَة ُالبَّارِيْ وَخِيْرَتُهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ طَاْهِرٌ مِنْ سَائِرِ التُّهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad – the flower of the Creator, and His elect Muhammad – pure beyond all suspicion
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ṣafwatu al-bārī wa-khīratuhu [.....] Muḥammadun ṭāhirun min sā'ir at-tuhami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ضَاْحِكٌ لِلضَّيْفِ مُكْرِمُهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ جَارُهُ وَالله لَمْ يُضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is smiling and cheerful to his guest to honor him. Muhammad – by God, no neighbor of his was ever wronged.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ḍāḥikun lil-ḍayfi mukrimuhu [.....] Muḥammadun jārūhoo wa-Allāhu lam yuḍammī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ طَاْبَتِ الدُّنْيَا بِبِعْثَتِهِ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ جَاْءَ بِالآيَاتِ والحِكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad – this world was made delightful by his being sent, Muhammad – he came with signs and with wisdom.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ṭābatid-dunyā bibīʿthatihi [.....] Muḥammadun jā'a bil-āyāti wal-ḥikami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ظَهَرَتْ فِينَا هِدايَتُه [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ هَدْيُهُ نُورٌ لِكُلِّ عَمِيّْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, his guidance has appeared in us. Muhammad, his guidance is light for every blind.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ẓaharat fīnā hidāyatuhu [.....] Muḥammadun hadyuhu nūrun likulli ʿamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ عَمَّنَا إحْسَانُ نِعْمَتِهِ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ سِرُّ عِلْمِ اللَّوْحِ وَالقَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we have been overshadowed by his blessings. Muhammad is the means for knowledge in the Tablet and the Pen.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ʿammānā iḥsānu niʿmatihi [.....] Muḥammadun sirru ʿilmi al-lawḥi wal-qalami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ غَيْثُ مَعْرُوفٍ يَدُوْمُ لَنَا [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مَدْحُهُ يَشْفِي مِنَ السَّقَم
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is a relief that lasts for us. Muhammad, his praise is a cure of ailments.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun ghaythu maʿrūfin yadūmu lanā [.....] Muḥammadun madḥuhu yashfī mina as-saqami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ فَاقَ كُلَّ الأنْبِيَا شَرَفَاً [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ قَدْ أَحَلَّ الدِّيْنَ فِيْ حَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, he has surpassed all prophets in honour. Muhammad, he has made a sanctuary of the faith.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun fāqa kulla al-anbiyā'i sharafān [.....] Muḥammadun qad aḥalla ad-dīna fī ḥaram

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ قَاْئِمٌ للهِ ذُوْ هِمَمٍ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ كُلُّ إحْسَانٍ إلَيْهِ نُمِي
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad stands for Allah, with high determination. Muhammad, all kindness belongs to him.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun qā'imun lillāhi dhū himamin [.....] Muḥammadun kulla iḥsānin ilayhi numī

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ كُلُّ مَا فِي الكَوْنِ مَظْهَرُهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ فِيْ البَرَايَا خَيْرُ مُعْتَصَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, all in universe is a presentation of him. Muhammad is the best refuge among people.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun kulla mā fī al-kawni maẓharuhu [.....] Muḥammadun fī al-barāyā khayru muʿtaṣami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ لَمْ نَجِدْ عَنْ حُبِّهِ بَدَلَاً [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ نَرْتَجِيْهِ عِنْدَ مُضْطَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we cannot find a substitute to his love. Muhammad, we hope for him on turbulence.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun lam najid ʿan ḥubbihi badalān [.....] Muḥammadun nartajīhi ʿinda muḍṭarim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ مَنْ رَجَاهُ نَالَ غَايَتَهُ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ يُسْعِفُ المَلْهُوفَ عَنْ أَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, whoever hope for him gets his desire. Muhammad rescues the desperate very closely.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun man rajāhu nāla ghāyatuhu [.....] Muḥammadun yusʿifu al-malḥūfa ʿan umam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ نِعْمَةٌ كُبْرَى لَنَا شَمِلَتْ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مَنْشَأُ الخَيْرَاتِ وَالنِّعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is a great inclusive blessing for us. Muhammad is the source of goodness and blessings.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun niʿmatun kubrā lanā shamilat [.....] Muḥammadun manša'u al-khayrāti wa an-niʿami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ وَاصَلَ الدُّنْيَا بِأنْعُمِه [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ قَدْ تَسَامَى كُلَّ ذِيْ كَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad has reached out the world with his blessings. Muhammad has ranked above the nobility of any human.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun wāṣala ad-dunyā bi anʿumihi [.....] Muḥammadun qad tasāmā kulla dhī karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ هَدْيُهُ فُزْنَا بِغَايَتِهِ [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ قَدْ وَفَى لِلهِ مِنْ قِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we have gained the benefit of his guidance. Muhammad has fulfilled his promise to Allah since eternity.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun hadyuhu fuznā bighāyatihi [.....] Muḥammadun qad wafā lillāhi min qidami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ لا نَرَى إلا شَفَاعَتَه [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ دَاعٍ عِنْدَ مُزْدَحَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we do not see except his intercession. Muhammad is the best caller on crowdy places.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun lā narā illā shafāʿatahu [.....] Muḥammadun khayru dā'in ʿinda muzdahimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ يَوْمَ بَعْثِ النَّاسِ شَافِعُنَا [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَاتَمٌ لِلرُّسْلِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is our intercessor on the Day mankind is resurrected. Muhammad – his light is the guide out of darkness.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun yawma baʿthi an-nāsi shāfiʿunā [.....] Muḥammadun khātamun li-r-rusuli kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَايَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَائِماً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَى حَبِيبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lord, send your Blessing and Peace always for ever on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlaya ṣalli wa sallim dā'iman abadan [.....] ʿalā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَبِّ بالمُصْطَفَى بَلِّغْ مَقَاصِدَنَا [.....] واغْفِرْ لَنَا مَا مَضَى يا واسِعَ الكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lord, we ask you by Your Chosen Servant to let us reach our aspirations and to forgive us our past; O, the Most Generous
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī bil-muṣṭafā balligh maqāṣidanā [.....] waghfir lanā mā maḍā yā wāsiʿa al-karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَبِّ بالمُصْطَفَى بَلِّغْ مَقَاصِدَنَا [.....] واشْفِ لَنَا مَرْضَانا يا واسِعَ الكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lord, we ask you by Your Chosen Servant to let us reach our aspirations and to heal our sick; O, the Most Generous
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī bil-muṣṭafā balligh maqāṣidanā [.....] wa-shfi lanā marḍānā yā wāsiʿa al-karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَبِّ بالمُصْطَفَى بَلِّغْ مَقَاصِدَنَا [.....] وانْصُرْ لَنَا دِينَنَا يا واسِعَ الكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lord, we ask you by Your Chosen Servant to let us reach our aspirations and to support our faith; O, the Most Generous
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī bil-muṣṭafā balligh maqāṣidanā [.....] wa-nṣur lanā dīnānā yā wāsiʿa al-karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مــَا لَــذَّةُ الـعَـيْشِ إلاَّ صُـحْبَةُ الـْفُـقَرَا [.....] هُــمُ الـسَّـلَاطِيْنُ والـسَّـادَاتُ والأُمَـرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: There is no pleasure in life except accompanying the needy [fuqara]; for they are the sultans and the masters and the princes [umara]
wirds.transliteration: Mā laḏḏatu l-ʿayši illā ṣuḥbatu l-fuqarā' [.....] humu s-salāṭīn wa-s-sādāt wa-l-umara

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَـاصْـحَبْهُمُوْ وَتَـأَدَّبْ فِـيْ مَـجَاْلِسِهِمْ [.....] وَخَــلِّ حَـظَّـكَ مَـهْـمَـا قَـدَّمُوْكَ وَرَاْ
wirds.en_wird_description: So accompany them and show proper manners in their councils; and leave your fortunes behind, no matter how much they offer to bring you upfront
wirds.transliteration: Faṣḥabhumu wa-ta'adab fī majālisi-him [.....] wa-ḫalli ḥaẓẓaka mahmā qaddamūka warā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاسْتَغْنِمِ الوَقْتَ واحْضُرْ دَاْئِمَاً مَعَهُمْ [.....] وَاعْلَمْ بِأَنَّ الرِّضَا يَخْتَصُّ مَنْ حَضَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: And seize the time and always attend with them and know that pleasure and content distinguish who attended
wirds.transliteration: Wa-istaɣnimi l-waqta waḥḍur dā'iman ma'ahum [.....] wa-'lam bi'anna r-riḍā yakhtaṣu man ḥaḍarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلازِمِ الـصَّـمْـتَ إِلاَّ إِنْ سُئِلْتَ فَقٌلْ [.....] لَا عِلْمَ عِنْدِيْ وَكُنْ بِالْجَهْلِ مُسْتَتِرا
wirds.en_wird_description: And abide by silence, except if you are asked, then say I have no knowledge, and conceal yourself in ignorance
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lāzimi ṣ-ṣamt illā in su'ilta faqūl [.....] lā 'ilma 'indi wa-kun bil-jahli mustatirā

wirds.ar_wird_description: ولا تَــــرَ الـعَيْـبَ إِلَّا فِيْـكَ مُعْت
wirds.en_wird_description: And see defects only in you; and have faith that your have a flaw that would have been apparent, but was concealed
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lā tara l-‘ayba illā fīka muʿt

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَحُطَّ رَأْسَكَ وَاسْتَغْفِرَ بِلَا سَبَبٍ [.....] وَقُمْ عَلَى قَدَمِ الإِنْصَافِ مُعْتَذِرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: And lay down your head and ask for forgiveness for no reason and stand up on the feet of fairness apologizing
wirds.transliteration: Wa-ḥuṭṭa ra'saka wa-istaɣfira bilā sababin [.....] wa-qum 'alā qadam al-insāfi muʿtadhirā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَإِنْ بَدَا مِنْكَ عَيْبٌ فَاعْتَذِرْ وَأَقِمْ [.....] وَجْـهَ اعْـتِذَارِكَ عَـمَّا مِنْكِ فِيْكَ جَرَىْ
wirds.en_wird_description: If you commit a fault, apologize, and hold up your apology for what you committed and what happened from you
wirds.transliteration: Wa-in badā minka 'aybun fa'itadhir wa-aqim [.....] wajha 'itidhārika 'ammā minka fīka jarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقُــلْ عُـبَـيْدِكُمُوْ أَوْلَــى بِصَفْحِكُمُ [.....] فَـسَـامـِحُوْا وَخُــذُوْا بِـالرِّفْقِ يـَا فُـقَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: And say: your slave is more deserving of your pardon so pardon and be lenient and clement, O [fuqara]
wirds.transliteration: Wa-qul ʿubaydikum awlā bi-ṣafḥikum [.....] fa-sāmiḥū wa-ḫudhū bi-r-rifqi yā fuqarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُــمْ بِـالـتَّفَضُّلِ أَوْلَـىْ وَهُـوَ شِـْيمَتُهُمْ [.....] فَــلَا تَـخَـفْ دَرَكَــاً مِـنْـهُمْ وَلَاْ ضَـرَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: They are more like to do kindness, which is their character; so do not feel or expect from them any evil or harm
wirds.transliteration: Hum bil-tafaḍḍuli awlā wa-huwa šīmatuhum [.....] fa-lā taḫaf darakan minhum wa-lā ḍararā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبِـالـتَّفَتِّيْ عَـَلـىْ الإِخْــوَانِ جُـدْ أَبـَدَاً [.....] حِـسَّاً وَمِعْنَىً وَغُضَّ الطَّرْفَ إِنْ عَثَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Always do service to brothers in kind and heart; and overlook if they slip
wirds.transliteration: Wa-bil-tafatti 'alā l-ikhwān jud' abadan [.....] ḥissan wa-mi'na wa-ḫuḍdaṭṭarfa in ʿatharā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَرَاقِبِ الشَّيْخَ فِيْ أَحْوَالِهِ فَعَسَىْ [.....] يُـرَى عَـلَيْكَ مِـنِ اسْتِحْسَانِهِ أَثَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Observe the Sheikh carefully in his states; a trace of his achievement might appear in you as a result.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-rāqibi sh-shaykha fī aḥwālihi fa'asa [.....] yura ʿalayka min istiḥsānihi atharā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وقَــدِّمِ الـجِـدِّ وانـْهَـضْ عِنْدَ خِدْمَتِهِ [.....] عَسَاهُ يَرْضَىْ وَحَاذِرْ أَنْ تَكُنْ ضَجِرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Wholeheartedly do the effort, and strive to serve him, perhaps you please him, and take care not to become bored
wirds.transliteration: Waqaddimi l-jiddi wa-n'ḥu ʿinda ḥidmatihi [.....] 'asāhu yardā wa-ḥādhir an takun ḍajirā

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَفِيْ رِضَاهُ رِضَا الـبَارِي وَطـاعَتِهِ [.....] يَرْضَىْ عَلَيْكَ فَكُنْ مِنْ تَرْكِهَا حَذِرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: For his pleasure begets The Lord's pleasure and begets obedience; He will be pleased with you, so be cautious not to leave him
wirds.transliteration: Fa-fī riḍāhi riḍā l-bārī wa-ṭā'atihi [.....] yardā ʿalayka fa-kun min tarkihā ḥadhirā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاعْلَمْ بِأنَّ طَرِيْقَ القَوْمِ دَاْرِسُةٌ [.....] وَحَالُ مَنْ يَدَّعِيْهَا الـيَوْمَ كَيْفَ تَرَى
wirds.en_wird_description: It is certain that the Sufi's Path crashes egos. So have a closer look at those who claim to be Sufi today!
wirds.transliteration: Wa-ʿlam bi'anna ṭarīqa l-qawmi dārisatun [.....] wa-ḥāl man yad'īhā al-yawma kayfa tarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: متىْ أَرَاهُمْ وَأَنَّـَى لـِـيْ بِرُؤيَـِتهِمْ [.....] أَوْ تَسْمَعُ الأُذُنُ مِنِّيْ عَـْنهُمُ خَبَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: When will I see them? What is the way to see them, or hear news about them?
wirds.transliteration: Matā 'arāhum wa-'annā lī biru'yātihim [.....] aw tasmā'u l-udhun minni 'anḥum khabarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَنْ لِيْ وَأَنَّـَى لِـمِثْلِي أَنْ يُزَاحِمَهُمْ [.....] عَـلَى مَــوَارِدَ لَــمْ آلَــفْ بِـهَـا كَــدَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: God! How is it possible for the like of me to compete with them over resources that carry no impurity?
wirds.transliteration: Man lī wa-'annā limithlī an yuzāḥimahum [.....] 'alā mawārida lam ālif bihā kadarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: أُحِــبُّــهُــمْ وأُدَاْرِيْـــهِـــمْ وَأُوْثِـــرُهُــمْ [.....] بِـمُـهْـجَتِيْ وَخُـصُـوصَـاً مِـنـْهُمُ نَـفَـرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: I love them, treat them gently, and prefer them in my heart, especially a group of them.
wirds.transliteration: Uḥibbuhum wa-'udārīhim wa-ūthiruhum [.....] bimahjatī wa-ḥuṣūṣan minhum nafrā

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَوْمٌ كِرَاْمُ السَّــجَايَا حَيْــثُ مَا جَلَسُـوْا [.....] يَبْـقَى الْمَـكَانُ عَلَى آثَارِهِمْ عـَطِرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: A people with noble character – wherever they sit, the place continues to be fragrant with their traces
wirds.transliteration: Qawmun kirāmu s-sajayā ḥaythu mā jalsū [.....] yabqā l-makānu 'alā āthārihim 'aṭirā

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَهْدِيْ التَّصَوُّفُ مِنْ أَخْلَاقِهِمْ طُرَفَـــاً [.....] حُسْـنُ التَّألُفِ مِنْهُمْ رَاْقَنِيْ نَظَــــرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Taşawwuf [Sufism] is an icon of their manners. Perfect harmony among them is a pleasure to see.
wirds.transliteration: Yahdī at-taṣawwufu min akhlāqihim ṭurafā'an [.....] ḥusnu at-ta'ālufi minhum rāqanī naẓarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُمْ أَهْلُ وُدِّيْ وأَحْبَابِيْ الَّذِيْنَ هُمُ [.....] مِمَّـــنْ يَجُـرُّ ذُيُوْلَ العِـزِّ مُفْتَخِــــرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: They are the people I love and my loved ones who proudly boast dragging the tails of honour
wirds.transliteration: Hum ahlu wuddi wa-aḥbābī alladhīna humu [.....] mimman yajurru ḏuyūla l-‘izzi muftakhirā

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَاْ زَاْلَ شَمْـلُكُمْ مَـقْبُوْلَاً لَكُمُ [.....] بَـحْرٌ مُّدَامٍ فِيْهِ تَقُوْمُ وَحَسَّـا
wirds.en_wird_description: Your unity shall always be accepted. You are a sea of elixir of life, with it you shall rise
wirds.transliteration: Lā zāla shamlu-kum maqbūlān lakum [.....] baḥrun mudāmīn fīhī taqūmu wa-ḥassā

wirds.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الصَّلَاةُ عـَـلى المُخْـــتَارِ سَيِّدِنـَــــا [.....] مُحَمَّــدٍ خَيْـــرِ مَنْ أَوْفَىْ وَمَنْ نَذَرَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Finally, may the blessings be upon the Chosen One, our Honourable Muhammad, the best of whoever vowed and fulfilled.
wirds.transliteration: Thumma ṣ-ṣalātu ʿalā l-muḫtāri sayyidinā [.....] Muḥammadin ḫayru man awfā wa-man naẓarā

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رِجالَ اللهِ دَارِكُوا باللهْ [.....] وانْظُرُونا نَظْرَة كَرَماً للهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Men of God, Help for God And look at us for the sake of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Yā rijāl allāh, dārikū billāh [.....] wa-nẓurūnā naẓratan karamā lillāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رِجالَاً غَابُوا في حَضْرَةِ اللهْ [.....] كَالثُّلَيْجَةْ ذَابُوا واللهِ واللهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Men absented in the presence of God Melted like a piece of snow, by Allah, by Allah
wirds.transliteration: Yā rijālan ghābū fī ḥaḍrat illāh [.....] ka-thulayjah dhābū wa-llāhī wa-llāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَرَاهُمْ حَيَارَى في شُهُودِ اللَهِ [.....] تَرَاهُم سُكَارَى واللهِ واللهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: You see them bewildered witnessing Allah, You see them drunken by Allah and Allah
wirds.transliteration: Tarāhum ḥayārā fī shuhūd illāh [.....] tarāhum sukārā wa-llāhī wa-llāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: تـراهُـم نَـشَـاوَى عِـنْدَ ذِكْرِ اللَهْ [.....] عـليـهِـم طَلَاوَةْ مِنْ حَضْرَةِ اللَهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: You see them in ecstasy at the Dhikr of Allah There is sweetness on them from the Presence of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Tarāhum nashāwā ʿinda dhikr illāh [.....] ʿalayhim ṭalāwatun min ḥaḍrat illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: إنْ غَنَّى المُغَنِّي بِجَمَالِ [.....] اللهْ فقاموا لِلْمَغْنَى طَرَبَاً بِالله
wirds.en_wird_description: When the singer sings on the beauty of Allah They stand for the meaning enchanted by Allah
wirds.transliteration: In ghannā al-mughannī bijamāli [.....] illāh faqāmū lil-maghnā ṭaraban billāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَسْمَتُهُـمْ هَبَّتْ مِنْ حَضْرَةِ اللَهْ [.....] حَيَاتُـهُـمْ دَامَتْ بِحَيَاةِ اللَهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their breeze has blown from the Presence of Allah Their life has continued by the Life of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Nasmatu-hum habbat min ḥaḍrat illāh [.....] ḥayātuhum dāmat biḥayāt illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: قُلُوْبٌ خَائِضَةْ فـي رَحْمَةِ اللَهْ [.....] أَسْرَارٌ فَائِضَةْ واللهِ واللهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Hearts that are waging in the mercy of Allah Insights that overflow by Allah, by Allah
wirds.transliteration: Qulūbun khā'iḍah fī raḥmat illāh [.....] asrārun fā'iḍah wa-llāhī wa-llāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: عُقُوْلٌ ذَاهِـلةْ مِنْ سَطْوَةِ اللَهْ [.....] نُفُوْسٌ ذَلِيْـلَةْ فِـي طَلَبِ اللَهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Minds that are bewildered by the Might of Allah Selves that are humbled in sought of Allah
wirds.transliteration: ʿuqūlun dhā'ilah min saṭwat illāh [.....] nufūsun dhalīlah fī ṭalab illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَهُـمُ الأَغْنِـيـا بـِنِسْـبَـةِ اللَهِ [.....] وَهُــمُ الأتــقــيــا واللهِ واللهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: They are the rich as affiliated with Allah They are the Pious, by Allah, by Allah
wirds.transliteration: Fahum al-aghniyā bīnīsbati illāh [.....] wa-hum al-atqiyā wa-llāhī wa-llāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَنْ رَآهُمْ رَأَى مَنْ قَامَ بـاللهْ [.....] فَهُمُ فِي الوَرَى مِنْ عُيُونِ اللهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: When you see them, you see those who stand by Allah They are among people in the Eyes of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Man rā'ahum rā'a man qāmā billāh [.....] fahum fī al-warā min ʿuyūn illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَلَيْهِمُ الرَّحْمَةْ وَرِضْوَانِ اللهْ [.....] عَلَيْهِـمُ نَسْمَةْ مِنْ حَضْرَةِ اللَهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: On them is the Mercy and Pleasure of Allah On them is a breeze from the Presence of Allah
wirds.transliteration: ʿalayhim ar-raḥmah wa-riḍwān illāh [.....] ʿalayhim nasmatun min ḥaḍrat illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَفَتِ النَظرة، طابَتِ الحَضْرَة [.....] جاءَتِ البُشرى لأهلِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The sight has become clear, the Presence good. The Good tiding has arrived to the Men of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Ṣafat an-naẓrah, ṭābat al-ḥaḍrah [.....] jā'at al-bushrā li-ahl illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: قاموا سُكارى بِذي البِشارة [.....] جعَلوا عِمارة شُكراً للهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They stood drunk by this good tiding. They made a statement of Thanks to Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Qāmū sukārā bidhī al-bishārah [.....] ja'alu ʿimārah shukran lillāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: أيُها الحاضِر اُذكُر وذاكِر [.....] إياكَ تُنكِر حالَ أهلِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You, the heart-present, Make Dhikr and Talk Never object to The spiritual state of the Men of God
wirds.transliteration: Ayyuhā al-ḥāḍir, uzkur wa-dhākir [.....] iyāk tunkir ḥāl ahl illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَسَلِم لَهُم بما عراهُم [.....] واعلَمْ أنَّهم (يا سِيْدِي) غابوا في اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Accept what they have been up to And know that they have been absented in God.
wirds.transliteration: Faslim lahum bimā ʿarāhum [.....] wa'lam annahum (yā sayyidī) ghābū fī illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: فالوَجدُ فيهِم داعي يَدعيهِم [.....] يَطْرأ عَلَيهِم (يا سِيْدِي) فِي ذِكرِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Bewilderment within them Is a constant caller That reminds them To make Dhikr of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Wal-wajdu fīhim dā'ī yad'īhim [.....] yaṭra' ʿalayhim (yā sayyidī) fī dhikr illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: ومَن لَم يَجِد فَليَتَواجَدْ [.....] قَصْداً يِتعَرَضْ لِفَضلِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Whoever is not bewildered, Let them appear to be Intentionally expose themselves To the favor of Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-man lam yajid falyatwājid [.....] qaṣdan yataʿarraḍ li-faḍl illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى قَد ظَنَّا مَن لَيسَ مِنَّا [.....] أنَّا جُنِنَّا (يا سِيْدِي) بِذِكرِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Those who do not know us Thought that We have become insane, By (our excessive mention) of Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥattā qad ẓannā man laysa minnā [.....] annā juninnā (yā sayyidī) bi-dhikr illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هَنيئاً لنا ثُمَّ بُشْرَانا [.....] إِنْ كانَ لنا (يا سِيْدِي) حُمْقٌ في اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Congratulations and Good tidings for us Because we have been In love with Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Hanī'an lanā thumma bushrānā [.....] in kāna lanā (yā sayyidī) ḥumqٌ fī illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: لا إله إلا الله لا إله إلا الله [.....] مُحَمَد رَسوُلُ الله عَليهِ صلاةُ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: No God but Allah. No God but Allah. Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; blessings be upon him
wirds.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāh, lā ilāha illā Allāh [.....] Muḥammad rasūlu Allāh ʿalayhi ṣalāt Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: شَرِبنا على ذِكرِ الحَبيبِ مُدامَةً [.....] سَكِرنا بِها مِن قَبلِ أن يُخلَقُ الكَرمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: We drank wine on the mere mention of the Beloved We got drunk by that wine before the creation of the vine-yard.
wirds.transliteration: Sharibnā ʿalā dhikr al-ḥabīb mudāmah [.....] sakirnā bihā min qabl an yukhlāq al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: لها البدر كأس وهي شمسٌ يديرها [.....] هلالٌ وكم يبدو إذا مزجت نجم
wirds.en_wird_description: The full moon is a glass for that wine; it is a sun that is run by a crescent. When the wine is mixed, he appears as a star
wirds.transliteration: Lahā al-badr kā’sun wahī shamsun yadīruhā [.....] hilālun w-kam yabdū idhā muzijat najm

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَقولونَ لي صِفها فأنتَ بِوَصِفِها [.....] أجَل عِندي بأوصافها عِلمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: They ask me to describe it, as I am an expert Yes, I have knowledge about its particulars
wirds.transliteration: Yaqūlūn lī ṣifhā fa'antā bi-waṣfihā [.....] ajāl ʿindī bi-awsāfihā ʿilm

wirds.ar_wird_description: صفاءٌ ولا ماءٌ ولُطفٌ ولا هوى [.....] ونورٌ ولا نارٌ ورُوحٌ ولا جِسمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Purity without water; kindness without breeze. Light without fire, and soul without body
wirds.transliteration: Ṣafā’un walā mā’un wa-luṭfun walā hawā [.....] wa-nūrun walā nārun wa-rūḥun walā jism

wirds.ar_wird_description: ولولا شذاها ما اهتَدَيتُ لِحانِها [.....] ولولا سناها ما تَصَوَرها الوَهمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Had it not been for its aroma, I would not have been guided to its winery. Had it not been for its light, illusion would have never imagined it.
wirds.transliteration: Walawlà shadhāhā mā ihtadaytu liḥānihā [.....] walawlà sanāhā mā taṣawwarahā al-wahm

wirds.ar_wird_description: ولو عَبِقَتْ في الشرق أنفاسُ طِيبِها [.....] وفي الغربِ مزكومٌ لعادَ لهُ الشَّمُّ
wirds.en_wird_description: If the smell of her perfume spread in the East A blocked-nose in the West would smell again
wirds.transliteration: Walaw ʿabīqat fī ash-sharq anfās ṭībihā [.....] wa-fī al-gharbī mazkūmun laʿād lahu ash-shamm

wirds.ar_wird_description: ولو رَسَمَ الرّاقي حُرُوفَ اسمِها على [.....] جَبينِ مُصابٍ جُنّ أبْرَأهُ الرسم
wirds.en_wird_description: If a spiritual healer draws the letters of her name on the forehead of an injured, the sketch would have healed him.
wirds.transliteration: Walaw rasama ar-rāqī ḥurūf ismiha ʿalā [.....] jabīnī muṣābin junna abrā'ahu ar-rasm

wirds.ar_wird_description: ولو نَضحوا منها ثرَى قبرِ مَيّتٍ [.....] لعادتْ اليه الرّوحُ وانتَعَشَ الجسم
wirds.en_wird_description: If they used it to dig out the soil of a buried person. The soul would come back the body revived
wirds.transliteration: Walaw naḍḥū minhā thurā qabr mayyitin [.....] laʿādat ilayh ar-rūḥu wa-intaʿasha al-jism

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَقدَّمَ كُلَّ الكائِناتِ حَديثُها [.....] قَديماً ولا شَكلٌ هناك ولا رَسمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Its talk preceded any talk of creations. From eternity, without shape or drawing.
wirds.transliteration: Taqaddama kulla al-kā'ināti ḥadīthuhā [.....] qadīman walā shaklٌ hunāk walā rasm

wirds.ar_wird_description: على نَفسِهِ فَلْيَبكِ مَن ضاعَ عُمرُهُ [.....] ولَيسَ لَهُ فيها نَصيبٌ ولا سَهمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Let him cry over himself the one who wasted his life. Without having any portion or share of her.
wirds.transliteration: ʿalā nafsihi fal-yabki man ḍāʿa ʿumruhu [.....] walaysa lahu fīhā naṣībٌ walā sahm

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya ṣalli wa sallim dā’iman abadan [.....] ʿalā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمِنْ تَذَكُّرِ جِيْرَانٍ بِذِيْ سَلَمِ [.....] مَزَجْتَ دَمْعًا جَرَى مِنْ مُقْلَةٍ بِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Is it because of remembering neighbors at Dhi-salam in Madinah that you mingle with blood tears shed from your eyes?
wirds.transliteration: Amin tadhakkuri jīrānin bidhī salam [.....] mazaʿtā damʿan jarā min muqlatin bidam

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمْ هَبَّتِ الرِّيْحُ مِنْ تِلْقَاءِ كَاظِمَةٍ [.....] وَأَوْمَضَ الْبَرْقُ فِي الظَّلْمَاءِ مِنْ اِضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Or has the wind blown from Kaazimah mountain in Madinah – and the lightning flashed in Idam’s dark near Madinah?
wirds.transliteration: Am habbat ar-rīḥu min tilqā’i kāẓimah [.....] wa-awmaḍa al-barqu fī al-ẓalmā’i min Iḍam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَا لِعَيْنَيْكَ اِنْ قُلْتَ اكْفُفَا هَمَتَا [.....] وَمَا لِقَلْبِكَ اِنْ قُلْتَ اسْتَفِقْ يَهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: What ails your eyes? When you bid them stop, they weep still more. What ails your heart? When you bid it to come to its senses, it wanders.
wirds.transliteration: Famā li-ʿaynayka in qultā ikfufā hamatā [.....] wamā li-qalbika in qultā istafīq yahimm

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَيَحْسَبُ الصَّبُّ أَنَّ الْحُبَّ مُنْكَتِمٌ [.....] مَا بَيْنَ مُنْسَجِمٍ مِنْهُ وَمُضْطَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Recon the lover that his love may be concealed, when a torrent’s in one part of him, and in the other, a conflagration?
wirds.transliteration: Ayaḥsabu aṣ-ṣabbu anna al-ḥubb munkatimun [.....] mā bayna munṣajimin minhu wa muḍṭarim

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَوْلَا الْهَوَى لَمْ تُرِقْ دَمْعًا عَلَى طَلَلٍ [.....] وَلَا أَرِقْتَ لِذِكْرِ الْبَانِ وَالْعَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: But for passion, you wouldn't weep at an abandoned camp, nor lie awake at night recalling the willow and the mount.
wirds.transliteration: Lawlā al-hawā lam turiq damʿan ʿalā ṭalalin [.....] walā ariqta li-dhikri al-bānī wal-ʿalam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَكَيْفَ تُنْكِرُ حُبًّا بَعْدَ مَا شَهِدَتْ [.....] بهِ عَلَيْكَ عُدُوْلُ الدَّمْعِ وَالسَّقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: So how can you deny your love, when witnesses of tears and sickness have testified to it against you?
wirds.transliteration: Fakayfa tunkiru ḥubbā baʿda mā shahidat [.....] bihi ʿalayka ʿudūlu ad-damʿi was-saqam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَثْبَتَ الْوَجْدُ خَطَّيْ عَبْرَةٍ وَضَنَى [.....] مِثْلَ الْبَهَارِ عَلَى خَدَّيْكَ وَالْعَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lovesick passion has written upon your cheeks two tear-lines like yellow and red.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-athbata al-wajdu khaṭṭay ʿabrahin waḍanā [.....] mithla al-bahāri ʿalā khaddayka wal-ʿanam

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَعَمْ سَرَى طَيْفُ مَنْ أَهْوَى فَأَرَّقَنِيْ [.....] وَالْحُبُّ يَعْتَرِضُ اللَّذَّاتِ بِالْأَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Yes! My loved one’s spirit haunted me, and denied me my sleep. For love ever obstructs pleasures with pain.
wirds.transliteration: Naʿam sarā ṭayfu man ahwā fa-arraqanī [.....] wal-ḥubb yaʿtaridu al-ladhdhāti bil-alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا لَائِمِيْ فِي الْهَوَى الْعُذْرِيِّ مَعْذِرَةً [.....] مِنِّيْ اِلَيْكَ وَلَوْ أَنْصَفْتَ لَمْ تَلُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You who reproach me for this chaste love: I seek your pardon! Yet if you had judged fairly, you would not have reproached me at all.
wirds.transliteration: Yā lā’imī fī al-hawā al-ʿuḏrī maʿdharatan [.....] minnī ilayka walaw anṣafṭa lam talum

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَدَتْكَ حَالِيَ لَا سِرِّيْ بِمُسْتَتِرٍ [.....] عَنِ الْوُشَاةِ وَلَا دَائِيْ بِمُنْحَسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: May you be spared my state! I cannot hide my secret from my detractors; my sickness will not leave me.
wirds.transliteration: ʿAdatka ḥālīyā lā sirrī bimusattirin [.....] ʿani al-wushāti walā dāʾī bimuhassimin

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَحَّضْتَنِي النُّصْحَ لَكِنْ لَسْتُ أَسْمَعُهُ [.....] اِنَّ الْمُحِبَّ عَنِ الْعُذَّالِ فِيْ صَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You offered me sincere advice, but I did not heed it. A lover is deaf to all his reproachers.
wirds.transliteration: Maḥaḍtanī an-nuṣḥa lakin lastu asmaʿuhu [.....] inna al-muḥibba ʿani al-ʿuḏdhāli fī ṣamami

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنِّي اتَّهَمْتُ نَصِيْحَ الشَّيْبِ فِيْ عَذَلِي [.....] وَالشَّيْبُ أَبْعَدُ فِيْ نُصْحٍ عَنِ التُّهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I suspect the counsel even of my own grey hairs; although their advice is far indeed from deception.
wirds.transliteration: Inni itahhamtu naṣīḥa ash-shaybi fī ʿadhilī [.....] wa-ash-shaybu abʿadu fī nuṣḥin ʿani at-tuhami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlaaya sallī wa sallim daa'iman abadaa [.....] 'alaa Habeebika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّ أَمَّارَتِيْ بِالسُّوْءِ مَا اتَّعَظَتْ [.....] مِنْ جَهْلِهَا بِنَذِيْرِ الشَّيْبِ وَالْهَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Thanks to its foolishness, my ill-urging ego has paid no heed to the warner: white hair and old age.
wirds.transliteration: Fa-inna ammārati bil-sū'i ma atti'adhat [.....] min jahlihaa binadheeri ash-shaybi wal-harami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا أَعَدَّتْ مِنَ الْفِعْلِ الْجَمِيْلِ قِرَى [.....] ضَيْفٍ أَلَمَّ بِرَأْسِيْ غَيْرَ مُحْتَشِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Neither has it prepared fair deeds in hospitable welcome for a guest who has taken up residence on my head.
wirds.transliteration: Wa laa a'addat mina al-fi'li al-jameeli qiraa [.....] daifin allama bira'sī ghayra muhtashimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَوْ كُنْتُ أَعْلَمُ أَنِّيْ مَا أُوَقِّرُهُ [.....] كَتَمْتُ سِرَّا بَدَا لِيْ مِنْهُ بِالْكَتَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Had I known that I will not be honoring it, I would have concealed its secret by dyeing it black.
wirds.transliteration: Law kuntu a'lamu anni ma uwakkiruhu [.....] katamtu sirran badā lī minhu bil-katam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَنْ لِيْ بِرَدِّ جِمَاحٍ مِنْ غَوَايَتِهَا [.....] كَمَا يُرَدُّ جِمَاحُ الْخَيْلِ بِاللُّجُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Who will help me curb a bolting rebel’s willfulness in the way that a rebel stallion may be curbed with reins?
wirds.transliteration: Man lī biraddi jimāhin min ghawāyatihā [.....] kamā yuraddu jimāhu al-khayli bil-lujumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَلَا تَرُمْ بِالْمَعَاصِيْ كَسْرَ شَهْوَتِهَا [.....] اِنَّ الطَّعَامَ يُقَوِّي شَهوةَ النَّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Do not try to subdue unlawful desires by satisfying them. Food only increases a glutton’s desires.
wirds.transliteration: Falaa tarum bil-ma'aasi kasra shahwatihā [.....] inna at-ta'āma yuwaqqī shahwata an-nahimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالنَّفْسُ كَالطِّفْلِ إِنْ تُهمِلْهُ شَبَّ عَلَى [.....] حُبِّ الرَّضَاعِ وَإِنْ تَفْطِمْهُ يَنْفَطِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The ego is like a child: neglect it, it will grow still suckling; only if you wean it, it will be weaned.
wirds.transliteration: Wa an-nafsu kal-ṭifli in tuhmilhu shabba 'alā [.....] hubbi ar-raḍā'i wa in tafṭimhū yanfaṭim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاصْرِفْ هَوَاهَا وَحَاذِرْ أَنْ تُوَلِّيَهُ [.....] اِنَّ الْهَوَى مَا تَوَلَّى يُصْمِ أَوْ يَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Frustrate its whims; be wary of giving it power, for whims pollute or pervert whatever they control.
wirds.transliteration: Faṣrif hawāhā wa hādhir an tuwallyahu [.....] inna al-hawā mā tawallā yuṣmī aw yaṣim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَرَاعِهَا وَهْيَ فِي الْأَعْمَالِ سَائِمَةٌ [.....] وَاِنْ هِيَ اسْتَحْلَتِ الْمَرْعَى فَلَا تُسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Guard it as it grazes in the pastures of deeds. Should it find the grazing sweet, let it not roam.
wirds.transliteration: Wa ra'iha wa hiya fi al-a'māli sā'imatun [.....] wa in hiya ishtālatil mar'ā falā tusim

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ حَسَّنَتْ لَذَّةً لِلْمَرْءِ قَاتِلَةً [.....] مِنْ حَيْثُ لَمْ يَدْرِ أَنَّ السُّمَّ فِي الدَّسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Many a delight has it approved which proves murderous, for some do not know that the fat contains a poison.
wirds.transliteration: Kam ḥassanat ladhdhatan lil-mar'ī qātilatan [.....] min ḥaythu lam yadri anna as-summa fi ad-dasami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاخْشَ الدَّسَائِسَ مِنْ جُوْعٍ وَمِنْ شِبَعٍ [.....] فَرُبَّ مَخْمَصَةٍ شَرٌّ مِنَ التُّخَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Fear the evil of hunger and satiety, for being hungry is sometimes worse than overeating.
wirds.transliteration: Wa khsha ad-dasā'isa min jū'in wa min shibā'in [.....] fa-rubb makhmasatin sharrun mina at-tukhami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاسْتَفْرِغِ الدَّمْعَ مِنْ عَيْنٍ قَدِ امْتَلَأَتْ [.....] مِنَ الْمَحَارِمِ وَالْزَمْ حِمْيَةَ النَّدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shed tears from an eye that has stuffed itself with forbidden sights; hold strong to a diet of regret.
wirds.transliteration: Wa istafriġ id-dam'a min 'aynin qadi imtala'at [.....] mina al-maḥārimi walzam ḥimyata an-nadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَخَالِفِ النَّفْسَ وَالشَّيْطَانَ وَاعْصِهِمَا [.....] وَاِنْ هُمَا مَحَّضَاكَ النُّصْحَ فَاتَّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Disobey the ego and the devil; suspect them both even when they offer you true counsel.
wirds.transliteration: Wa khālif in-nafsa wa ash-shayṭāna wa 'ṣihimā [.....] wa in humā maḥaḍāka an-nuṣḥa fa-ittahim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمَا خَصْمًا وَلَا حَكَمًا [.....] فَأَنْتَ تَعْرِفُ كَيْدَ الْخَصْمِ وَالْحَكمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Obey neither of them as a complainant or an arbiter. Well, you know the complainant's and the arbiter's plotting.
wirds.transliteration: Wa laa tuṭi' minhumā khaṣman wa laa ḥakaman [.....] fa-anta ta'rifu kayda al-khaṣmi wal-ḥakami

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ مِنْ قَوْلٍ بِلَا عَمَلٍ [.....] لَقَدْ نَسَبْتُ بِهِ نَسْلاً لِذِيْ عُقُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I seek forgiveness of God for words not followed by deeds, for by them did I attribute progeny to a sterile man.
wirds.transliteration: Astaghfirullāha min qawlin bilā 'amalin [.....] laqad nasabtu bihi naslan li dhī 'uqm

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمَرْتُكَ الْخَيْرَ لَكِنْ مَا ائْتَمَرْتُ بِهِ [.....] وَمَا اسْتَقَمْتُ فَمَا قَوْلِيْ لَكَ اسْتَقِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I commend goodness to you while not confronting myself. Being crooked, of what use is my command to be straight?
wirds.transliteration: Amartuka al-khayra lakin mā a'tamaru bihi [.....] wa mā istaqamtū famā qawli laka isṭaqim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا تَزَوَّدْتُ قَبْلَ الْمَوْتِ نَافِلَةً [.....] وَلَمْ أُصَلِّ سِوَى فَرْضٍ وَلَمْ أصُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: No optional devotions have I accumulated, ready for my demise; nor have I fasted, nor prayed, more than the minimum required.
wirds.transliteration: Wa laa tazawwadtu qabla al-mawti nāfilatan [.....] wa lam uṣalli siwā farḍin wa lam aṣum

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya ṣalli wa sallim dā’iman abadan [.....] ‘alā ḥabībika khayr al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: ظَلَمْتُ سُنَّةَ مَنْ أَحْيَا الظَّلَامَ إلى [.....] أَنِ اشْتَكَتْ قَدَمَاهُ الضُّرَّ مِنْ وَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have wronged the example of him who revived the black nights, praying until his feet complained of painful swelling.
wirds.transliteration: Ẓalamtu sunnata man aḥyā al-ẓalāma ilā [.....] ani ishtakāt qadamaḥu al-ḍurra min warami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَشَدَّ مِنْ سَغَبٍ أَحْشَاءَهُ وطَوَى [.....] تَحْتَ الْحِجَارَةِ كَشْحًا مُتْرَفَ الْأَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Over his belly and soft skin he placed a stone, tightening a belt over it to lessen the hunger-pangs.
wirds.transliteration: Wa shadda min saġabin aḥshā’ahu waṭawā [.....] taḥta al-ḥijārah kashḥan mutraf al-adami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَرَاوَدَتْهُ الْجِبَالُ الشُّمُّ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ [.....] عَنْ نَفْسِهِ فَأَرَاهَا أَيَّمَا شَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: High mountains sought to tempt him by turning to gold, but he showed them lofty height upon height.
wirds.transliteration: Wa rāwadat-hu al-jibālu al-shummu min dhahabin [.....] ‘an nafsihi fa’arāhā ayyamā shamam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَكَّدَتْ زُهْدَهُ فِيْهَا ضَرُوْرَتُهُ [.....] اِنَّ الضَّرُوْرَةَ لَا تَعْدُوْ عَلَى الْعِصَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: His dire need only confirmed his detachment from them. A need such as his shall overpower the infallible
wirds.transliteration: Wa akaddat zuhduhu fīhā ḍarūratuhu [.....] inna al-ḍarūrah lā ta‘du ‘alā al-‘iṣam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكَيْفَ تَدْعُوْ إِلَى الدُّنْيَا ضَرُوْرَةُ مَنْ [.....] لَوْلَاهُ لَمْ تُخْرَجِ الدُّنْيَا مِنَ الْعَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How could need tempt him to worldliness when but for him the world would not have been brought from the void?
wirds.transliteration: Wa kayfa tad‘ū ilā al-dunyā ḍarūratu man [.....] lawlāhū lam tukhriji al-dunyā mina al-‘adam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ سَيِّدُ الْكَوْنَيْنِ وَالثَّقَلَيْنِ [.....] وَالْفَرِيْقَيْنِ مِنْ عُرْبٍ وَمِنْ عَجَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the master of both worlds, both jinn and humankind, and both groups: Arabs and non-Arabs.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥammadun sayyidu al-kawnayni wa al-thaqalayni [.....] wa al-farīqayni min ‘urbin wa min ‘ajam

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَبِيُّنَا الْآمِرُ النَّاهِيْ فَلَا أَحَدٌ [.....] أَبَرَّ فِيْ قَوْلِ لَا مِنْهُ وَلَا نَعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Our Prophet ﷺ is the one who commands good, forbids evil. There is none more faithful to his word, whether Yes or No.
wirds.transliteration: Nabiyyunā al-āmiru al-nāḥī falā aḥadun [.....] abarra fī qawli lā min-hu wa lā na‘am

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُوَ الْحَبِيْبُ الَّذِيْ تُرْجَى شَفَاعَتُهُ [.....] لِكُلِّ هَوْلٍ مِنَ الْأَهْوَالِ مُقْتَحَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He is the loved one whose intercession is hoped for; a victor against every terror and calamity.
wirds.transliteration: Huwa al-ḥabību alladhī turjā shafā‘atuhu [.....] li-kulli hawlin mina al-ahwāli muqtahami

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَعَا اِلَى اللهِ فَالْمُسْتَمْسِكُونَ بِهِ [.....] مُسْتَمْسِكُوْنَ بِحَبْلٍ غَيْرِ مُنْفَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: To God was his call, and those who hold fast to him hold fast to a rope that shall never break.
wirds.transliteration: Da‘ā ilā Allāhi fal-mustamsikūna bihi [.....] mustamsikūna biḥablin ghayri munfaṣimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاقَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ فِيْ خَلْقٍ وَفِيْ خُلُقٍ [.....] وَلَمْ يُدَانُوْهُ فِيْ عِلْمٍ وَلَا كَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In his form and his qualities, he excelled the other Prophets. Their knowledge and nobility did not rival his own.
wirds.transliteration: Fāqa al-nabīyīna fī khalqin wa fī khuluqin [.....] wa lam yudānūhu fī ‘ilmin wa lā karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّهُمْ مِنْ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ مُلْتَمِسٌ [.....] غَرْفًا مِنَ الْبَحْرِ أَوْ رَشْفًا مِنَ الدِّيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They all seek from the Prophet ﷺ handfuls from the ocean or drops of the drizzle.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kulluhum min rasūlillāhi multamisun [.....] ghurfan mina al-baḥri aw rashfan mina al-diyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَوَاقِفُوْنَ لَدَيْهِ عِنْدَ حَدِّهِمِ [.....] مِنْ نُقْطَةِ الْعِلْمِ أَوْ مِنْ شَكْلَةِ الْحِكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Before him do they stand, respecting their limits; dots to his knowledge, or vowel-signs to his wisdom.
wirds.transliteration: Wa wāqifūna ladayhi ‘inda ḥaddihim [.....] min nuqṭati al-‘ilmi aw min shaklati al-ḥikami

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَهْوَ الَّذِيْ تَمَّ مَعْنَاهُ وَصُوْرَتُهُ [.....] ثُمَّ اصْطَفَاهُ حَبِيْبًا بَارِئُ النَّسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He it is whose meaning and form reached perfection. Then the Inspirer of Souls chose him as His beloved.
wirds.transliteration: Fa-huwa alladhī tamma ma‘nāhu wa ṣūratuhu [.....] thumma iṣṭafāhu ḥabīban bāri’u al-nasami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُنَزَّهٌ عَنْ شَرِيْكٍ فِيْ مَحَاسِنِهِ [.....] فَجَوْهَرُ الْحُسْنِ فِيْهِ غَيْرُ مُنْقَسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Too exalted is his beauty to have a rival. In him is the undivided essence of all beauty.
wirds.transliteration: Munazzaḥun ‘an sharīkin fī maḥāsinihi [.....] fa-jawharu al-ḥusni fīhi ghayru munqaṣimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَعْ مَا ادَّعَتْهُ النَّصَارَى فِيْ نَبِيِّهِمِ [.....] وَاحْكُمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ مَدْحًا فِيْهِ وَاحْتَكِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Set aside the claim the Christians made about their Prophet ﷺ. Then compose the praises you wish of him.
wirds.transliteration: Da‘ mā idda‘at-hu al-naṣārā fī nabīyyihim [.....] waḥkum bimā shi’ta madḥan fīhi waḥtakim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَانْسُبْ اِلَى ذَاتِهِ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ شَرَفٍ [.....] وَانْسُبْ اِلَى قَدْرِهِ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ عِظَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: To his essence assign whatever you will of honor. To his stature assign what greatness you will.
wirds.transliteration: Wa nsib ila dhatihi ma shi'ta min sharafin [.....] wa nsib ila qadrihi ma shi'ta min 'ithamin

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّ فَضْلَ رَسُولِ اللهِ لَيْسَ لَهُ [.....] حَدٌّ فَيُعْرِبَ عَنْهُ نَاطِقٌ بِفَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For verily the merit of the Prophet ﷺ has no limits that might be expressed in words.
wirds.transliteration: Fa inna fadla Rasulillahi laysa lahu [.....] haddun fayu'ribu 'anhu natiqun bifami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَوْ نَاسَبَتْ قَدْرَهُ آيَاتُهُ عِظَمًا [.....] أَحْيَا اسْمُهُ حِيْنَ يُدْعَى دَارِسَ الرِّمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: If his miracles stood in proportion to his greatness, the very mention of his name would revive dry bones.
wirds.transliteration: Law nasabat qadrah ayatuhu 'ithaman [.....] ahya ismahu hina yud'a darisa ar-ramami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمْ يَمْتَحِنَّا بِمَا تَعْيَا الْعُقُوْلُ بِهِ [.....] حِرْصًا عَلَيْنَا فَلَمْ نَرْتَبْ وَلَمْ نَهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He did not try us with things that baffle the mind – such was his concern for us – so we neither doubted nor strayed.
wirds.transliteration: Lam yamtahinna bima ta'ya al-'uqoolu bihi [.....] hirsan 'alayna falam nartab wa lam nahim

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَعْيَا الْوَرَى فَهْمُ مَعْنَاهُ فَلَيْسَ يُرَى [.....] فِيْ الْقُرْبِ وَالْبُعدِ فِيْهِ غَيْرُ مُنْفَحِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Understanding his meaning exhausts the human mind. Near and far, all were seen to be dumbstruck.
wirds.transliteration: A'ya al-wara fahmu ma'anahu falaysa yura [.....] fi al-qurbi wal-bu'di fihi ghayru munfahimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَالشَّمْسِ تَظْهَرُ لِلْعَيْنَيْنِ مِنْ بُعُدٍ [.....] صَغِيْرَةً وَتُكِلُّ الطَّرْفَ مِنْ أَمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He is like the sun: To the eye at a distance it seems small, but when near, it dazzles the sight.
wirds.transliteration: Kash-shamsi tazharu lil-'aynayni min bu'din [.....] saghiratan wa tukillu at-tarfa min amami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكَيْفَ يُدْرِكُ فِي الدُّنْيَا حَقِيْقَتَهُ [.....] قَوْمٌ نِيَامٌ تَسَلَّوْا عَنْهُ بِالْحُلُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How can his reality be grasped in this world by people who are asleep, distracted from him by dreams.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kayfa yudriku fi ad-dunya haqiqatahu [.....] qawmun niyamun tasallaw 'anhu bil-hulumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَبْلَغُ الْعِلْمِ فِيْهِ أَنَّهُ بَشَرٌ [.....] وَأَنَّهُ خَيْرُ خَلْقِ اللهِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The most we know of him is that he is a mortal man, and that he is the best of all God’s creation.
wirds.transliteration: Famablahu al-'ilmi fihi annahu basharun [.....] wa annahu khayru khalqi Allah kulla himi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ آيٍ أَتَى الرُّسْلُ الْكِرَامُ بِهَا [.....] فَاِنــَّمَا اتَّصَلَتْ مِنْ نُوْرِهِ بِهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Every miracle which the Noble Messengers brought was theirs by virtue of his light alone.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kullu ayin ata ar-rusulu al-kiramu biha [.....] fa innama ittasalat min nurihi bihimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّهُ شَمْسُ فَضْلٍ هُمْ كَوَاكِبُهَا [.....] يُظْهِرْنَ أَنْوَارَهَا لِلنَّاسِ فِي الظُّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For verily he is the sun of virtue, and they are its planets. They show his lights to humanity in the dark.
wirds.transliteration: Fa innahu shamsu fadlin hum kawakibuha [.....] yuzhirna anwaraha linnasi fi ad-dhulami

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَكْرِمْ بِخَلْقِ نَبِيٍّ زَانَهُ خُلُقٌ [.....] بِالْحُسْنِ مُشْتَمِلٍ بِالْبِشْرِ مُتَّسِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How noble are the physical qualities of a prophet ﷺ adorned by good traits! He is cloaked with beauty and known for his smile.
wirds.transliteration: Akram bi khalqi nabiyyin zanahu khuluqun [.....] bil-husni mushtamilin bil-bishri muttasimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَالزَّهْرِ فِيْ تَرَفٍ وَالْبَدْرِ فِيْ شَرَفٍ [.....] وَالْبَحْرِ فِيْ كَرَمٍ وَالدَّهْرِ فِيْ هِمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: As a blooming flower in delicacy, as the full moon in honor, like the ocean in generosity, as persistent as time itself.
wirds.transliteration: Kazzahri fi tarafin wal-badri fi sharafin [.....] wal-bahri fi karamim wad-dahri fi himami

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهُ وَهْوَ فَرْدٌ مِنْ جَلَالهِ [.....] فِيْ عَسْكَرٍ حِيْنَ تَلْقَاهُ وَفِيْ حَشَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: When alone, out of grandeur, he appears as though he is in the midst of a large army and guards.
wirds.transliteration: Ka annahu wa huwa fardun min jalalihi [.....] fi 'askarin hina talqahu wafihi hashami

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّمَا اللُّؤْلُؤُ الْمَكْنُوْنُ فِيْ صَدَفٍ [.....] مِنْ مَعْدِنَيْ مَنْطِقٍ مِنْهُ وَمُبْتَسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: From the rich mine of his speech and his smile, hidden pearls seemed to sparkle from their shell.
wirds.transliteration: Ka annama al-lu'lu'u al-maknoonu fi sadafin [.....] min ma'dinay mantiqin minhu wamubtasimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا طِيْبَ يَعْدِلُ تُرْبًا ضَمَّ أَعْظُمَهُ [.....] طُوْبَى لِمُنْتَشِقٍ مِنْهُ وَمُلْتَثِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: No perfume can rival the earth that holds his bones. Blessed are they that breathe its fragrance, or kiss it.
wirds.transliteration: La teeba ya'dilu turban damma a'zumahu [.....] tuba limuntashiqin minhu wamultathimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlaaya salli wa sallim da'iman abadan [.....] 'ala habibika khayri al-khalqi kullihimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَبَانَ مَوْلِدُهُ عَنْ طِيْبِ عُنْصُرِهِ [.....] يَا طِيْبَ مُبْتَدَاٍ مِنْهُ وَمُخْتَتَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: His birth revealed purity of his ancestry. How fine is his origin, how pure is his final end.
wirds.transliteration: Abana mawliduhu 'an tibi 'unsurihi [.....] ya tibi mubtada'in minhu wa mukhtatami

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَوْمٌ تَفَرَّسَ فِيْهِ الْفُرْسُ أَنَّهُمُ [.....] قَدْ أُنْذِرُوْا بِحُلُوْلِ الْبُؤْسِ وَالنِّقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: That day the Persians sensed that they had been warned of the descent of defeats and retribution.
wirds.transliteration: Yawmun tafarrasa fihi al-fursu annahumu [.....] qad unziru bihulooli al-bu'usi wal-niqami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبَاتَ اِيْوَانُ كِسْرَى وَهْوَ مُنْصَدِعٌ [.....] كَشَمْلِ أَصْحَابِ كِسْرَى غَيْرَ مُلْتَئِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By night the Arch of Kisra split asunder. Likewise his horde, never to be restored.
wirds.transliteration: Wabata iywanu Kisra wahuwa munsadi'un [.....] kashamli as'hab-i Kisra ghayra multa'imi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالنَّارُ خَامِدَةُ الْأَنْفَاسِ مِنْ أَسَفٍ [.....] عَلَيْهِ وَالنَّهْرُ سَاهِي الْعَيْنِ مِنْ سَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The sacred fire breathed its last from sorrow. Out of anxiety, the Euphrates lost its way.
wirds.transliteration: Wal-naru khamidatu al-anfasi min asafin [.....] 'alayhi wal-nahru saahi al-'ayni min sadami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَسَاءَ سَاوَةَ أَنْ غَاضَتْ بُحَيْرَتُهَا [.....] وَرُدَّ وَارِدُهَا بِالْغَيْظِ حِيْنَ ظَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The city of Saawat in Persia endured the drying of its lake. The thirsty who sought water there returned in rage.
wirds.transliteration: Wasaa saawata an ghadat buhayratuha [.....] warudda wariduha bil-ghaythi hina zameem

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّ بِالنَّارِ مَا بِالْمَاءِ مِنْ بَلَلٍ [.....] حُزْنًا وَبِالْمَاءِ مَا بِالنَّارِ مِنْ ضَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: As though fire itself, from grief, was as wet as water; while water blazed like fire.
wirds.transliteration: Ka annna bin-nari ma bil-ma'i min balalin [.....] huznan wa bil-ma'i ma bin-nari min darami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْجِنُّ تَهْتِفُ وَالْأَنْوَارُ ساطِعَةٌ [.....] وَالْحَقُّ يَظْهَرُ مِنْ مَعْنًى وَمِنْ كَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Jinn called out. Lights shone, dazzling. Truth was made manifest in word and in fact.
wirds.transliteration: Wal-jinnu tahtifu wal-anwaru saati'atun [.....] wal-haqq yadharu min ma'nan wa min kalimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَمُوْا وَصَمُّوْا فَاِعْلَانُ الْبَشَائِرِ لَمْ [.....] تُسْمَعْ وَبَارِقَةُ الْاِنْذَارِ لَمْ تُشَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Blind and deaf were they, so the good news announced went unheard, while the lightning-flash of warning went unseen.
wirds.transliteration: Amu wa sammu fa'lanul bashaa'iri lam [.....] tusma' wa bariqatul inzaari lam tushami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا أَخْبَرَ الْأَقْوَامَ كَاهِنُهُمْ [.....] بِأَنَّ دِيْنَهُمُ الْمُعْوَجَّ لَمْ يَقُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This even though the diviners had advised their people that their crooked religion could no longer stand.
wirds.transliteration: Min ba'di ma akhbara al-aqwama kahinuhum [.....] bi ann dinaahum al-mu'awajj lam yaqumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبَعْدَ مَا عَايَنُوْا فِي الْأُفْقِ مِنْ شُهُبٍ [.....] مُنْقَضَّةٍ وَفْقَ مَا فِي الْأَرْضِ مِنْ صَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And even though their eyes beheld on the horizon great meteors falling, as idols toppled on earth.
wirds.transliteration: Wa ba'da ma 'aayanuu fi al-ufqi min shuhubin [.....] munqaddatin wafqa ma fi al-ardhi min sanami

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى غَدَا عَنْ طَرِيْقِ الْوَحْيِ مُنْهَزِمٌ [.....] مِنَ الشَّيَاطِيْنِ يَقْفُوْ اِثْرَ مُنْهَزِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Until, sent flying from revelation’s road, demons fled after those who were overthrown.
wirds.transliteration: Hatta ghada 'an tareeqil wahyi munhazimun [.....] mina as-shayateeni yaqfoo ithra munhazimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهُمْ هَرَبًا أَبْطَالُ أَبْرَهَةٍ [.....] أَوْ عَسْكَرٌ بِالْحَصَى مِنْ رَاحَتَيْهِ رُمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Fleeing like the champions of Abraha; or like a host pelted with pebbles from his hand.
wirds.transliteration: Ka annahum haraban abtaalu Abrahatin [.....] aw 'askaron bil-hasa min raahataihi rumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَبْذًا بِهِ بَعْدَ تَسْبِيْحٍ بِبَطْنِهِمَا [.....] نَبْذَ الْمُسَبِّحِ مِنْ أَحْشَاءِ مُلْتَقِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They sang glory in his hand, and then were cast like the praising Jonah, cast from the whale’s belly.
wirds.transliteration: Nabzan bihi ba'da tasbihin bibatnihimaa [.....] nabza al-musabbihi min ahshaa'i multaqimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlayā ṣalli wa sallim dā'imāan abadāan [.....] 'alā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: جَاءَتْ لِدَعْوَتِهِ الْأَشْجَارُ ساجِدَةً [.....] تَمْشِيْ اِلَيْهِ عَلَى سَاقٍ بِلَا قَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Trees came prostrate to heed his call, their trunks walking to him though they had no feet.
wirds.transliteration: Jā'at li-da'watihi al-ashjāru sājidatan [.....] tamshī ilayhi 'alā sāqin bilā qadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّمَا سَطَرَتْ سَطْرًا لِمَا كَتَبَتْ [.....] فُرُوْعُهَا مِنْ بَدِيْعِ الْخَطِّ فِي الَّلقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: It was as though their branches were writing lines as they came along, with the finest calligraphy!
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annamā saṭarat saṭran limā katabat [.....] furū'uhā min badī'i al-khaṭṭi fī al-laqam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِثْلَ الْغَمَامَةِ أَنَّى سَارَ سَائِرَةً [.....] تَقِيْهِ حَرَّ وَطِيْسٍ لِلْهَجِيْرِ حَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like the cloud, how it moved about, to protect him from the midday heat, red-hot.
wirds.transliteration: Mithla al-ghamāma annā sāra sā'iratān [.....] taqīhi ḥarra waṭīsin lil-hajīri ḥamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَقْسَمْتُ بِالْقَمَرِ الْمُنْشَقِّ إِنَّ لَهُ [.....] مِنْ قَلْبِهِ نِسْبَةً مَبْرُوْرَةَ الْقَسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By the moon split in twain, truly it has, I swear by an oath that is true, a link with his heart.
wirds.transliteration: Aqsamtu bil-qamari al-munshaqqi inna lahu [.....] min qalbihi nisbatan mabrūra al-qasam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَا حَوَى الْغَارُ مِنْ خَيْرٍ وَمِنْ كَرَمِ [.....] وَكُلُّ طَرْفٍ مِنَ الْكُفَّارِ عَنْهُ عَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: And by the goodness and nobility embraced by the cave when every unbelieving eye was too blind to see him.
wirds.transliteration: Wa mā ḥawā al-ghāru min khayrin wa min karamī [.....] wa kullu ṭarfīn mina al-kuffāri 'anhu 'amī

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالصِّدْقُ فِي الْغَارِ وَالصِّدِّيْقُ لَمْ يَرِمَا [.....] وَهُمْ يَقُوْلُوْنَ مَا بِالْغَارِ مِنْ أَرِمِ
