wirds.en_wird_description: They were saying that none drew breath in the cave, while Belief in the cave and the Believer, did not waver.
wirds.transliteration: Fas-ṣidqu fī al-ghāri waṣ-ṣiddīqu lam yarimā [.....] wa hum yaqūlūna mā bil-ghāri min arim

wirds.ar_wird_description: ظَنُّوا الْحَمَامَ وَظَنُّوا الْعَنْكَبُوْتَ عَلَى [.....] خَيْرِ الْبَرِيَّةِ لَمْ تَنْسُجْ وَلَمْ تَحُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Imagining that for the Best of Creation, the spider had woven no web, and that the dove had found no perch.
wirds.transliteration: Ẓannū al-ḥamāma wa ẓannū al-‘ankabūta 'alā [.....] khayri al-bariyyati lam tansuj wa lam tahumm

wirds.ar_wird_description: وِقَايَةُ اللهِ أَغْنَتْ عَنْ مُضَاعَفَةٍ [.....] مِنَ الدُّرُوْعِ وَعَنْ عَالٍ مِنَ الْأُطُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: God’s guardianship made extra armour needless, neither did they need lofty castles.
wirds.transliteration: Wiqāyatu Allāhi aghnat 'an muḍā‘afatin [.....] mina ad-durū'ī wa 'an 'ālīn mina al-uṭumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا سَامَنِي الدَّهْرُ ضَيْمًا وَاسْتَجَرْتُ بِهِ [.....] اِلَّا وَنِلْتُ جِوَارًا مِنْهُ لَمْ يُضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Never does this age oppress me, but that I seek his protection. His protection do I find, and the oppression is no more.
wirds.transliteration: Mā sāmanī ad-dahru ḍayman wa istajartu bihi [.....] illā wa niltu jiwāran minhu lam yuḍam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا الْتَمَسْتُ غِنَى الدَّارَيْنِ مِنْ يَدِهِ [.....] اِلَّا اسْتَلَمْتُ النَّدَى مِنْ خَيْرِ مُسْتَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Never do I seek from his hand the goods of both worlds without gaining my share from the best of all givers!
wirds.transliteration: Wa lā al-tamastu ghinā ad-dārayni min yadi-hi [.....] illā isṭalamtu an-nadā min khayri mustalam

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا تُنْكِرِ الْوَحْيَ مِنْ رُؤْيَاهُ اِنَّ لَهُ [.....] قَلْبًا اِذَا نَامَتِ الْعَيْنَانِ لَمْ يَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Deny not the revelation in his dream-visions, for his was a heart which slept not, though his eye slept.
wirds.transliteration: Lā tunkiri al-wahyā min ru'yāhu inna lahu [.....] qalban idhā nāmat al-'aynān lam yanam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَذَاكَ حِيْنَ بُلُوْغٍ مِنْ نُبُوَّتِهِ [.....] فَلَيْسَ يُنْكَرُ فِيْهِ حَالُ مُحْتَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Thus it was at the outset of his Prophethood; so when adult, his dream-visions are not gainsaid.
wirds.transliteration: Wa dhāka ḥīna bulūghin min nubuwwatihi [.....] falaysa yunkaru fīhi ḥālū muḥtallim

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَبَارَكَ اللهُ مَا وَحْيٌ بِمُكْتَسَبٍ [.....] وَلَا نَبِيٌّ عَلَى غَيْبٍ بِمُتَّهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Blessed is God! Revelation may not be acquired. Nor is a prophet to be accused when he speaks of hidden things.
wirds.transliteration: Tabāraka Allāhu mā wahyun bimuktasabīn [.....] walā nabiyyun 'alā ghaybin bimutahham

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ أَبْرَأَتْ وَصِبًا بِاللَّمْسِ رَاحَتُهُ [.....] وَأَطْلَقَتْ أَرِبًا مِنْ رِبْقَةِ اللَّمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Many were the patients healed by his hand’s touch! Many madmen did he release from their chains!
wirds.transliteration: Kam abr'at waṣiban bil-lamsi rāḥatuhu [.....] wa aṭlaqat ariban min ribqatil-lamam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَحْيَتِ السَّنَةَ الشَّهْبَاءَ دَعْوَتُهُ [.....] حَتَّى حَكَتْ غُرَّةً فِي الْأَعْصُرِ الدُّهُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: A time of drought was given new life by his call. After dull ages - a blaze of light.
wirds.transliteration: Wa aḥyati as-sannata ash-shahbā'a da'watuhu [.....] ḥattā ḥakat gurratan fī al-‘aṣūri ad-duḥum

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِعَارِضٍ جَادَ أَوْ خِلْتَ الْبِطَاحَ بِهَا [.....] سَيْبٌ مِنَ الْيَمِّ أَوْ سَيْلٌ مِنَ الْعَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All by rain-giving cloud. Or you would think the valleys were thus engulfed by the sea, or by a flood of Arim’s dam-water.
wirds.transliteration: Bi'āriḍin jāda aw khilta al-biṭāḥa bihā [.....] saybun mina al-yammi aw saylun mina al-'arim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlaaya sallī wa sallim da'iman abadan [.....] 'alaa habībika khayr al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَعْنِيْ وَوَصْفِيَ آيَاتٍ لَهُ ظَهَرَتْ [.....] ظُهُوْرَ نَارِ الْقِرَى لَيْلًا عَلَى عَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Allow me to describe his signs, which appeared like a hospitable fire lit by night on a hilltop.
wirds.transliteration: Da'ni wa wasfī āyātin lahu zaharat [.....] zhuurā nār al-qirā laylan 'ala 'alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالدُّرُّ يَزْدَادُ حُسْناً وَهْوَ مُنْتَظِمٌ [.....] وَلَيْسَ يَنْقُصُ قَدْرًا غَيْرَ مُنْتَظِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Pearls glow more brightly when on a string, yet are no less precious when they are separate.
wirds.transliteration: Fa al-durru yazdādu husnan wahuwa muntazimun [.....] wa laysa yanqusu qadran ghayra muntazim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَا تَطَاوُلُ آمَالِ الْمَدِيْحِ اِلَى [.....] مَا فِيْهِ مِنْ كَرَمِ الْأَخْلَاقِ وَالشِّيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The praise-giver reaches high, but cannot reach the noble qualities and graces which he displays.
wirds.transliteration: Fama tatawulu āmāli al-madīḥi ilā [.....] mā fīhi min karami al-akhlaaqi wa al-shiyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: آيَاتُ حَقٍّ مِنَ الرَّحْمَنِ مُحْدَثَةٌ [.....] قَدِيْمَةٌ صِفَةُ الْمَوْصُوْفِ بِالْقِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Though they are renewed, signs of truth from the Gracious time itself; their quality is that of Him Who is Eternal.
wirds.transliteration: Āyātu ḥaqqin mina al-raḥmāni muḥdathatun [.....] qadīmatun ṣifatu al-mawṣūfi bil-qadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمْ تَقْتَرِنْ بِزَمَانٍ وَهْيَ تُخْبِرُنا [.....] عَنِ الْمَعَادِ وعَنْ عَادٍ وعَنْ اِرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Unlinked to time, they give us news of Judgement-Day, of old people of Ad and of Iram.
wirds.transliteration: Lam taqtarin bi-zamānin wahuwa tukhbīrunā [.....] 'an al-ma'ādi wa 'an 'ādīn wa 'an iram

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَامَتْ لَدَيْنَا فَفَاقَتْ كُلَّ مُعْجِزَةٍ [.....] مِنَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ اِذْ جَاءَتْ وَلَمْ تَدُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Constantly with us, above every miracle of prophets of old, which came but did not last.
wirds.transliteration: Dāmat ladaynā fafāqat kulli mu'jizatin [.....] mina al-nabīyyīn idh jā'at walam tadum

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَكَّمَاتٌ فَمَا تُبْقِينَ مِنْ شُبَهٍ [.....] لِذِيْ شِقَاقٍ وَمَا تَبْغِينَ مِنْ حِكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Very clear, these signs leave no doubt to be stirred up by the mischievous, and need no arbiter.
wirds.transliteration: Muḥakkamātun famā tubqīna min shubhatin [.....] li dhī shiqqāqin wamā tabghīna min ḥikamin

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا حُوْرِبَتْ قَطُّ اِلَّا عَادَ مِنْ حَرَبٍ [.....] أَعْدَى الْأَعَادِيْ اِلَيْهَا مُلْقِيَ السَّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Whenever attacked, the most bitter of their foes return from the fray begging to submit.
wirds.transliteration: Mā ḥūribat qaṭṭu illā 'ādā min ḥarabin [.....] 'adā al-a'ādī ilaihā mulqīya al-salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَدَّتْ بَلَاغَتُهَا دَعْوَى مُعَارِضِهَا [.....] رَدَّ الْغَيُورِ يَدَ الْجَانِيْ عَنِ الْحُرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their eloquence routs their enemy’s claims, as a zealous man protects his wife from an assailant.
wirds.transliteration: Raddat balāghatuhā da'wā mu'āriḍihā [.....] radd al-ghayūri yad al-jānī 'ani al-ḥurami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَهَا مَعَانٍ كَمَوْجِ الْبَحْرِ فِيْ مَدَدٍ [.....] وَفَوْقَ جَوْهَرِهِ فِي الْحُسْنِ وَالْقِيَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Meanings they have like the wide ocean’s waves, their beauty and worth more precious than the ocean’s treasures.
wirds.transliteration: Lahā ma'ānin kamawji al-baḥri fī madadin [.....] wafawqa jawaharihi fī al-ḥusni wal-qiyami

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَا تُعَدُّ وَلَا تُحْصَى عَجَائِبُهَا [.....] وَلَا تُسَامُ عَلَى الْاِكْثَارِ بِالسَّأَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their marvels stand beyond count and reckoning. None grows tired of them, however oft-repeated.
wirds.transliteration: Famā tu'addū walā tuḥṣā 'ajā'ibuhā [.....] walā tusāmu 'alā al-ikthāri bis-sa'ami

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَرَّتْ بِهَا عَيْنُ قَارِيْهَا فَقُلْتُ لَهُ [.....] لَقَدْ ظَفِرْتَ بِحَبْلِ اللهِ فَاعْتَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They delighted the soul and senses of one that recited them. So I told him: ‘Yours is God’s rope- so hold on tight!’
wirds.transliteration: Qarrat bihā 'aynu qāriyihā faqultu lahu [.....] laqad ẓafirta bihabli Allah fa'taṣim

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنْ تَتْلُهَا خِيْفَةً مِنْ حَرِّ نَارِ لَظَى [.....] أَطْفَأْتَ حَرَّ لَظَى مِنْ وِرْدِهَا الشَّبِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: If you recite them in fear of a blazing Fire, their wellsprings shall extinguish that fire and heat.
wirds.transliteration: In tatluhā khīfatan min ḥarri nāri laẓā [.....] atfa'ta ḥarrā laẓā min wirdihā al-shabimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهَا الْحَوْضُ تَبْيَضُّ الْوُجُوْهُ بِهِ [.....] مِنَ الْعُصَاةِ وَقَدْ جَاؤُوْهُ كَالْحُمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like the Basin of Kauthar, they make sinners’ faces shine, though they had come to it as black as charcoal.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annahā al-ḥawḍu tabyaḍḍu al-wujūhu bihī [.....] mina al-‘uṣātī wa qad jā'ūhū kāl-ḥumami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكَالصِّرَاطِ وَكَالْمِيْزَانِ مَعْدِلَةً [.....] فَالْقِسْطُ مِنْ غَيْرِهَا فِي النَّاسِ لَمْ يَقُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like the Path and the Scale in justice. Justice without which among mankind cannot be true.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kā al-ṣirāṭi wa kā al-mīzāni ma'dilatan [.....] fa al-qistu min ghayrihā fī al-nāsi lam yaqūmi

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَا تَعْجَبَنْ لِحَسُوْدٍ رَاحَ يُنْكِرُهَا [.....] تَجَاهُلًا وَهْوَ عَيْنُ الْحَاذِقِ الْفَهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Be not astonished at an envier who denies them, pretending unawareness though he has a deep understanding.
wirds.transliteration: Lā ta'jaban liḥasūdīn rāḥa yunkiruhā [.....] tajāhulā wa huwa 'aynu al-ḥādhiki al-fahimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَدْ تُنْكِرُ الْعَيْنُ ضَوْءَ الشَّمْسِ مِنْ رَمَدٍ [.....] وَيُنْكِرُ الْفَمُ طَعْمَ الْمَاءِ مِنْ سَقَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: A sick eye may deny the light of the sun; a sick tongue may even abhor the taste of water.
wirds.transliteration: Qad tunkiru al-'aynu ḍaw'a al-shamsi min ramadin [.....] wa yunkiru al-famu ṭa'ma al-mā'i min saqami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya Ṣalli wa Sallim Dā'iman Abadān [.....] 'Alā Ḥabībika Khayri l-Khalqi Kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ يَمَّمَ الْعَافُوْنَ سَاحَتَهُ [.....] سَعْيًا وَفَوْقَ مُتُوْنِ الْأَيْنُقِ الرُّسُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O best of those whose courtyard is sought by the needy; they run or ride the back of tireless camels.
wirds.transliteration: Yā Khayra Man Yammama l-‘Āfūna Sāḥatahū [.....] Sa‘yan wa Fawqa Mutūnī l-‘Aynuqī r-Rusum

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَنْ هُوَ الْآيَةُ الْكُبْرَى لِمُعْتَبِرٍ [.....] وَمَنْ هُوَ النِّعْمَةُ الْعُظْمَى لِمُغْتَنِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O greatest sign for those who reflect. O greatest grace for those who seek to gain.
wirds.transliteration: Wa Man Huwa l-Āyah l-Kubrā li-Mu‘tabirīn [.....] Wa Man Huwa n-Ni‘mah l-‘Uẓmā li-Muġtanim

wirds.ar_wird_description: سَرَيْتَ مِنْ حَرَمٍ لَيْلًا اِلَى حَرَمٍ [.....] كَمَا سَرَى الْبَدْرُ فِيْ دَاجٍ مِنَ الظُّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You travelled by night from one sanctuary to another, as the full moon travels through intense darkness.
wirds.transliteration: Sarayta Min Ḥaramin Laylan Ilā Ḥaramin [.....] Kamā Sarā l-Badrū fī Dājim Mina aẓ-Ẓulam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبِتَّ تَرْقَى اِلَى أَنْ نِلْتَ مَنْزِلَةً [.....] مِنْ قَابِ قَوْسَيْنِ لَمْ تُدْرَكْ وَلَمْ تُرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And through the night you rose until you gained a stage so close never attained or hoped for.
wirds.transliteration: Wa bitta Tarqā Ilā An Nilta Manzilatan [.....] Min Qābi Qawsayn Lam Tudrak wa Lam Turam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقَدَّمَتْكَ جَمِيْعُ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ بِهَا [.....] وَالرُّسْلِ تَقْدِيْمَ مَخْدُوْمٍ عَلَى خَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All of the Prophets gave you precedence. The Messengers too, as servants give way to their master.
wirds.transliteration: Wa Qaddamatka Jamī‘u l-Anbiyā’ī bihā [.....] wa r-Rusuli Taqdīma Makhdoomī ‘Alā Khadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَأَنْتَ تَخْتَرِقُ السَّبْعَ الطِّبَاقَ بِهِمْ [.....] في مَوْكِبٍ كُنْتَ فِيهِ صَاحِبَ الْعَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You passed through the seven-tiered skies with them behind you, in a procession where you were the banner bearer.
wirds.transliteration: Wa Anta Takhtariqu as-Sab‘a aṭ-Ṭibāqa Bihim [.....] fī Mawkibin Kunta Fīhī Ṣāḥiba l-‘Alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى اِذَا لَمْ تَدَعْ شَأْوًا لِمُسْتَبِقٍ [.....] مِنَ الدُّنُوِّ وَلَا مَرْقًى لِمُسْتَنِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Until your closeness left no space for others on the quest; nor summit for others to attain.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥattā Iza Lam Tada‘ Shā’wan li-Mustabiqin [.....] Min ad-Dunūwi wa Lā Marqan li-Mustanīm

wirds.ar_wird_description: خَفَضْتَ كُلَّ مَقَامٍ بِالْاِضَافَةِ اِذْ [.....] نُودِيْتَ بِالرَّفْعِ مِثْلَ الْمُفْرَدِ الْعَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All other ranks lay beneath you in conjunction, when see! you are addressed directly, your noun alone His object.
wirds.transliteration: Khafaḍta Kullā Maqāmin bil-‘Iḍāfati 'Idh [.....] Nūditā bir-Raf‘i Mithla l-Mufradi l-‘Alam

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَيْمَا تَفُوْزَ بِوَصْلٍ أَيِّ مُسْتَتِرٍ [.....] عَنِ الْعُيُوْنِ وَسِرٍّ أَيِّ مُكْتَتِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All this that you should triumph through Arrival. Hidden from sight-how hidden a secret!
wirds.transliteration: Kaymā Tafūza bi-Waṣlin ayy Musattirin [.....] ‘Ani l-‘Uyūni wa Sirrin ayy Muktatim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَحُزْتَ كُلَّ فَخَارٍ غَيْرَ مُشْتَرَكٍ [.....] وَجُزْتَ كُلَّ مَقَامٍ غَيْرَ مُزْدَحَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Unrivalled were the proud honors you received. None other was with you as you gained each degree.
wirds.transliteration: Faḥuzta Kullā Fakhārin Ghayra Mushtarakīn [.....] wa Juzta Kullā Maqāmin Ghayra Muzdahim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَجَلَّ مِقْدَارُ مَا وُلِّيْتَ مِنْ رُتَبٍ [.....] وَعَزَّ اِدْرَاكُ مَا أُوْلِيْتَ مِنْ نِعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How glorious, the precious ranks you were granted! How hard to list the graces you received!
wirds.transliteration: Wa Jalla Miqdāru Mā Wullīta Min Rutabin [.....] wa ‘Azza Idrāku Mā Ūlīta Min Ni‘am

wirds.ar_wird_description: بُشْرَى لَنَا مَعْشَرَ الْاِسْلَامِ اِنَّ لَنَا [.....] مِنَ الْعِنَايَةِ رُكْنًا غَيْرَ مُنْهَدِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Good news for us, o people of Islam! For we possess a pillar of God’s care that shall not be overthrown.
wirds.transliteration: Bushrā Lanā Ma‘sharal-Islāmi Inna Lanā [.....] Min al-‘Ināyati Ruknan Ghayra Munhadim

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمَّا دَعَا اللهُ دَاعِيْنَا لِطَاعَتِهِ [.....] بِأَكْرَمِ الرُّسْلِ كُنَّا أَكْرَمَ الْأُمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: When God, our Summoner, called us to serve Him through the Noblest of Messengers, we became the noblest of nations.
wirds.transliteration: Lammā Da‘ā Allāhu Dā‘īnā Li-ṭā‘atihī [.....] bi-Akrami r-Rusli Kunnā Akramal-Umam

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya ṣalli wa sallim dā'iman abadan [.....] 'alā ḥabībika khayr al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَاعَتْ قُلُوْبَ الْعِدَا أَنْبَاءُ بِعْثَتِهِ [.....] كَنَبْأَةٍ أَجْفَلَتْ غُفْلًا مِنَ الْغَنَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: News that he was sent made foemen quake, just as a lion’s roar shakes heedless sheep.
wirds.transliteration: Ra'at qulooba al-‘idā 'anbā'u bi‘thatihi [.....] kanab'atin ajfalat ghuflan mina al-ghanami

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا زَالَ يَلْقَاهُمُ فِيْ كُلِّ مُعْتَرَكٍ [.....] حَتَّى حَكَوْا بِالْقَنَا لَحْمًا عَلَى وَضَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: On every battlefield, he did not shy to meet them, until lances made them seem like flesh upon a butcher’s block.
wirds.transliteration: Mā zāla yalqāhumu fī kulli mu‘tārakin [.....] ḥattā ḥakawā bil-qanā laḥman ‘alā waḍam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَدُّوْا الْفِرَارَ فَكَادُوْا يَغْبِطُونَ بِهِ [.....] أَشْلَاءَ شَالَتْ مَعَ الْعُقْبَانِ وَالرَّخَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They longed to run away, almost jealous of the carrion borne away by hawks and vultures.
wirds.transliteration: Wadū al-firāra fakādū yaghbiṭūna bihi [.....] ashlā'a shālat ma‘a al-‘uqbāni wa ar-raḥami

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَمْضِي اللَّيَالِيْ وَلَا يَدْرُوْنَ عِدَّتَهَا [.....] مَا لَمْ تَكُنْ مِنْ لَيَالِي الْأَشْهُرِ الْحُرُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The nights kept passing, but they forgot how many, apart from the nights of the Sacrosanct Months.
wirds.transliteration: Tamdī al-layālī wa lā yadrūna ‘iddataha [.....] mā lam takun min layālī al-ashhuri al-ḥurum

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّمَا الدِّيْنُ ضَيْفٌ حَلَّ سَاحَتَهُمْ [.....] بِكُلِّ قَرْمٍ اِلَى لَحْمِ الْعِدَا قَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: As though Religion were a guest come upon their gate, met by voracious foes hungry for their flesh.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annamā ad-dīnu ḍayfun ḥalla sāḥatahum [.....] bikulli qarmٍ ilā laḥmi al-‘idā qarim

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَجُرُّ بَحْرَ خَمِيْسٍ فَوْقَ سَابِحَةٍ [.....] يَرْمِيْ بِمَوْجٍ مِنَ الْأَبْطَالِ مُلْتَطِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: A sea-like host riding swift steeds, casting forth a wave of surging heroes.
wirds.transliteration: Yajurru baḥra khamīsin fawqa sābiḥatin [.....] yarmī bimawjin mina al-abṭāli multaṭim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِنْ كُلِّ مُنْتَدِبٍ لِلهِ مُحْتَسِبٍ [.....] يَسْطُوْ بِمُسْتَأْصِلٍ لِلْكُفْرِ مُصْطَلِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Volunteers for God, hoping for His reward, heroic and bold in uprooting unbelief.
wirds.transliteration: Min kulli muntadibin li-llahi muḥtasibin [.....] yasto bi-mustāṣilin lil-kufri muṣṭalim

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى غَدَتْ مِلَّةُ الْاِسْلَامِ وَهْيَ بِهِمْ [.....] مِنْ بَعْدِ غُرْبَتِهَا مَوْصُوْلَةَ الرَّحِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Until the faith of Islam became, through them, as one flesh, having once been exiled and apart.
wirds.transliteration: ḥattā ghadat millatu al-islāmi wa hiya bihim [.....] min ba‘di ghurbatihā mawsūlata ar-raḥimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَكْفُوْلَةً أَبَدًا مِنْهُمْ بِخَيْرِ أَبٍ [.....] وَخَيْرِ بَعْلٍ فَلَمْ تَيْتَمْ وَلَمْ تَئِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shielded for all time from evildoers by the best of fathers and husbands, so that no longer were they orphans or widows.
wirds.transliteration: Makfūlatan abadan minhum bikhayri abbin [.....] wa khayri ba‘līn falam taytam wa lam ta'im

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُمُ الْجِبَالُ فَسَلْ عَنْهُمْ مُصَادِمَهُمْ [.....] مَاذَا رَأَوْا مِنْهُمُ فِيْ كُلِّ مُصْطَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Mountains were they! Ask those who collided with them what they saw in them on every field of honor.
wirds.transliteration: Hum al-jibāl fa-sal ‘anhum muṣādamahum [.....] mādhā rā’awā minhum fī kulli muṣṭadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَسَلْ حُنَيْنًا وَسَلْ بَدْرًا وَسَلْ أُحُدًا [.....] فُصُوْلَ حَتْفٍ لَهُمْ أَدْهَى مِنَ الْوَخَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ask Huneyn. Ask Badr. Ask Uhud. Fateful seasons, against evil worse than the plague.
wirds.transliteration: Wasal Ḥunaynan wasal Badran wasal Uhudan [.....] fuṣūla ḥatfin lahum adḥā min al-wakham

wirds.ar_wird_description: اَلْمُصْدِرِي الْبِيْضِ حُمْرًا بَعْدَ مَا وَرَدَتْ [.....] مِنَ الْعِدَا كُلَّ مُسْوَدٍّ مِنَ الِّلمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: White swords shone red after their encounter with the black heads of the foemen.
wirds.transliteration: Al-muṣdirī al-bīḍi ḥumran ba‘da mā waradat [.....] mina al-‘idā kulla muswaddan mina al-illam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْكَاتِبِيْنَ بِسُمْرِ الْخَطِّ مَا تَرَكَتْ [.....] أَقْلَامُهُمْ حَرْفَ جِسْمٍ غَيْرَ مُنْعَجِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Like scribes whose pens, tracing with brown ink, left no body devoid of points and vowels.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-l-katibīn bi-sumri al-khaṭṭi mā tarakat [.....] aqlāmuhum ḥarfan jismin ghayra munʿajim

wirds.ar_wird_description: شَاكِي السِّلَاحِ لَهُمْ سِيْمَى تُمَيِّزُهُمْ [.....] وَالْوَرْدُ يَمْتَازُ بِالسِّيْمَا عَنَ السَّلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In shining armor, theirs was a sign which set them apart, just as a rosebush may be distinguished from an acacia.
wirds.transliteration: Shākī as-silāḥi lahum sīmā tumayyizuhum [.....] wal-wardu yamtāzu bi-sīmā ʿan as-salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: تُهْدِيْ اِلَيْكَ رِيَاحُ النَّصْرِ نَشْرَهُمُ [.....] فَتَحْسَبُ الزَّهْرَ فِي الْأَكْمَامِ كُلَّ كَمِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Winds of victory honor you with their perfume. You’d think the brave heroes blooms ripe to come from the spathe.
wirds.transliteration: Tuhdī ilayka riyāḥu an-naṣri nashrahumu [.....] fataḥsabu az-zahra fī al-akmāmi kulla kamī

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَأَنَّهُمْ فِيْ ظُهُوْرِ الْخَيْلِ نَبْتُ رُبًا [.....] مِنْ شِدَّةِ الْحَزْمِ لَا مِنْ شِدَّةِ الْحُزُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In the saddle they were as flowers on a hilltop, their strength from resolve, not from strap and stirrup.
wirds.transliteration: Ka'annahum fī ẓuhūri al-khayli nabtu ruban [.....] min shiddati al-ḥazmi lā min shiddati al-ḥuzumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: طَارَتْ قُلُوْبُ الْعِدَا مِنْ بَأْسِهِمْ فَرَقًا [.....] فَمَا تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْبَهْمِ وَالْبُهَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Their boldness put their enemies’ hearts to flight, until you could not tell herd from host.
wirds.transliteration: Ṭārat qulūbu al-ʿidā min ba'sihim faraqan [.....] famā tufarriqu bayna al-bahmi wal-bahami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَنْ تَكُنْ بِرَسُوْلِ اللهِ نُصْرَتُهُ [.....] اِنْ تَلْقَهُ الْأُسْدُ فِيْ آجَامِهَا تَجِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Lions in their abode stand humbled and dazed by him whose victory comes through God’s Messenger.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-man takun bi-rasūli Allāhi nusratuhu [.....] in talqahu al-usudu fī ājāmiha tajim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَنْ تَرَى مِنْ وَلِيٍّ غَيْرَ مُنْتَصِرٍ [.....] بِهِ وَلَا مِنْ عَدُوٍّ غَيْرَ مُنْقَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You shall see no saint that is not helped through him, and no foe that is not overwhelmed.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lan tarā min waliyyin ghayra muntasiirin [.....] bihi walā min ʿaduwwin ghayra munqaṣimin

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَحَلَّ أُمَّتَهُ فِيْ حِرْزِ مِلَّتِهِ [.....] كَاللَّيْثِ حَلَّ مَعَ الْأَشْبَالِ فِيْ أَجَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The stronghold of his faith is where he set his people, like a lion which places its cubs in the safest place.
wirds.transliteration: Aḥalla ummatahu fī ḥirzi millatihi [.....] kallaythi ḥalla maʿa al-ashbāli fī ajam

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ جَدَّلَتْ كَلِمَاتُ اللهِ مِنْ جَدَلٍ [.....] فِيْهِ وَكَمْ خَصَمَ الْبُرْهَانُ مِنْ خَصِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: How often have God’s words felled those who oppose him, and how many a debater has been defeated by His Proof!
wirds.transliteration: Kam jaddalat kalimātu Allāhi min jadalin [.....] fīhi wakam khaṣama al-burhānu min khaṣim

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَفَاكَ بِالْعِلْمِ فِي الْأُمِّيِّ مُعْجِزَةً [.....] في الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ وَالتَّأْدِيْبِ فِي الْيُتُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Erudition in an unlettered one is miracle enough, in an Age of Ignorance; as is knowledge in an orphan.
wirds.transliteration: Kafāka bil-ʿilmi fī al-ummī muʿjizatan [.....] fī al-jāhiliyyati wat-ta'dībi fī al-yutumi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya ṣalli wa sallim dā'iman abadan [.....] ʿalā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: خَدَمْتُهُ بِمَدِيْحٍ أَسْتَقِيْلُ بِهِ [.....] ذُنُوْبَ عُمْرٍ مَضَى فِي الشِّعْرِ وَالْخِدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By this eulogy have I served him, hoping to be redeemed from the sins of a life of odes and patronage.
wirds.transliteration: Khadamtu-hu bimadīḥin astaqīlu bihi [.....] dhunūba ʿumrin maḍā fī ash-shiʿri wal-khidam

wirds.ar_wird_description: اِذْ قَلَّدَانِيَ مَا تُخْشَى عَوَاقِبُهُ [.....] كَأَنَّنِيْ بِهِمَا هَدْيٌ مِنَ النَّعَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: That life yoked me with collars of ominous portent as though I were a ritual lamb destined for slaughter.
wirds.transliteration: Ith qalladānīyā mā tukhsā ʿawāqibuhu [.....] ka'annanī bīhimā hadyun mina an-naʿami

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَطَعْتُ غَيَّ الصِّبَا فِي الْحَالَتَيْنِ وَمَا [.....] حَصَلْتُ اِلَّا عَلَى الْآثَامِ وَالنَّدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In both did I obey the wild folly of youth, but reaped nothing but sins and sorrow.
wirds.transliteration: Aṭaʿtu ghayya aṣ-ṣibā fī al-ḥālatayni wamā [.....] ḥaṣaltu illā ʿalā al-āthāmi wan-nadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَيَا خَسَارَةَ نَفْسٍ فِيْ تِجَارَتِهَا [.....] لَمْ تَشْتَرِ الدِّيْنَ بِالدُّنْيَا وَلَمْ تَسُمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Such a loss to my soul was the deal that it struck! It didn’t buy, or even seek to buy, the next world at this world’s price.
wirds.transliteration: Fayā khasārata nafsin fī tijāratihā [.....] lam tashtari ad-dīna bi-d-dunyā walam tasumm

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَنْ يَبِعْ آجِلًا مِنْهُ بِعَاجِلِهِ [.....] يَبِنْ لَهُ الْغَبْنُ فِيْ بَيْعٍ وَفِيْ سَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Those who sell their property for short-term gain shall be deceived in their deals and in their dealings.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-man yabīʿu ājilan min-hu bi-ʿājilihi [.....] yabin lahu al-ghabnu fī bayʿin wafī salami

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنْ آتِ ذَنْبًا فَمَا عَهْدِيْ بِمُنْتَقِضٍ [.....] مِنَ النَّبِيِّ وَلَا حَبْلِيْ بِمُنْصَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Yet despite my sin, my pledge with the Prophet ﷺ is unbroken, and the cord which binds me to him has not been cut.
wirds.transliteration: In ātī dhanban famā ʿahdī bimuntaqiḍin [.....] mina an-nabīyi walā ḥablī bimunṣarim

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَاِنَّ لِيْ ذِمَّةً مِنْهُ بِتَسْمِيَتِيْ [.....] مُحَمَّدًا وَهْوَ أَوْفَى الْخَلْقِ بِالذِّمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By him I have a safe-conduct, having been named Muhammad, he who is most faithful in safe-conduct.
wirds.transliteration: Fa-innī lī dhimmatan min-hu bitasmīyatī [.....] Muḥammadan wa-huwa awfā al-khalqi bil-dhimami

wirds.ar_wird_description: اِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيْ مَعَادِيْ آخِذًا بِيَدِي [.....] فَضْلًا وَاِلَّا فَقُلْ يَا زَلَّةَ الْقَدَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: In the afterlife, if he takes not my hand kindly, then my feet will slip; alas for such misfortune!
wirds.transliteration: In lam yakun fī maʿādī ākhidhān biyadī [.....] faḍlan wa-illā faqul yā zallat al-qadam

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَاشَاهُ أَنْ يُحْرِمَ الرَّاجِيْ مَكَارِمَهُ [.....] أَوْ يَرْجِعَ الْجَارُ مِنْهُ غَيْرَ مُحْتَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Far be it from him to deprive the hopeful of his gifts. Or that a neighbor seeking safety should return without being honored.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥāshāhu an yuḥrim ar-rājī makārimahu [.....] aw yarjiʿa al-jāru min-hu ghayra muḥtaram

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمُنْذُ أَلْزَمْتُ أَفْكَارِيْ مَدَائِحَهُ [.....] وَجَدْتُهُ لِخَلَاصِيْ خَيْرَ مُلْتَزِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ever since I devoted my thoughts to praising him I have found him to be the best assurance of my salvation.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-mundhu alzamtu afkārī madā'ihī [.....] wajadtuhu li-khalāṣī khayra multazim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَنْ يَفُوْتَ الْغِنَى مِنْهُ يَدًا تَرِبَتْ [.....] اِنَّ الْحَيَا يُنْبِتُ الْأَزْهَارَ فِي الْأَكَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: His wealth will not ignore a dusty hand. Showers bring flowers to arid hilltops.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lan yafūta al-ghinā min-hu yadan taribat [.....] inna al-ḥayā yunbitu al-azḥāra fī al-akam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَمْ أُرِدْ زَهْرَةَ الدُّنْيَا الَّتِي اقْتَطَفَتْ [.....] يَدَا زُهَيْرٍ بِمَا أَثْنَى عَلَى هَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And yet I crave not the worldly flowers which the hands of Poet Zuhaiyr once picked by praising King Herem.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lam urid zahrat ad-dunyā allatī iqtaṭafat [.....] yadā Zuhayrin bimā athnā ʿalā Harim

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَاْيَ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَاً [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Master descend peace and blessings continuously and eternally on Your Beloved, the Best of All Creation
wirds.transliteration: Mawlāya ṣalli wa sallim dā'iman abadan [.....] ʿalā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا أَكْرَمَ الْخَلْقِ مَا لِيْ مَنْ أَلُوْذُ بِهِ [.....] سِوَاكَ عِنْدَ حُلُوْلِ الْحَادِثِ الْعَمِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Most noble of mankind! To whom but you shall I turn, when the Biggest Calamity befalls?
wirds.transliteration: Yā akrama al-khalqi mā lī man alūdhū bihi [.....] siwāka ʿinda ḥulūli al-ḥādithi al-ʿamimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَنْ يَضِيْقَ رَسُوْلَ اللهِ جَاهُكَ بِيْ [.....] اِذَا الْكَرِيْمُ تَجَلَّى بِاسْمِ مُنْتَقِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: God’s Messenger! Your merit shall not shrink on my account when the Generous God appears with the name Avenger.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lan yaḍīqa rasūla Allāhi jāḥuka bī [.....] idhā al-karīmu tajallā bismi muntaqimi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَإِنَّ مِنْ جُوْدِكَ الدُّنْيَا وَضَرَّتَهَا [.....] وَمِنْ عُلُوْمِكَ عِلْمَ اللَّوْحِ وَالْقَلَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For this world and the next are from your bounty; and knowledge of Pen and Tablet are of what you know.
wirds.transliteration: Fa-inna min jūdika ad-dunyā wa ḍarratahā [.....] wa-min ʿulūmika ʿilma al-lawḥi wal-qalami

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا نَفْسُ لَا تَقْنَطِيْ مِنْ زَلَّةٍ عَظُمَتْ [.....] اِنَّ الْكَبَائِرَ فِي الْغُفْرَانِ كَالَّلمَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O soul! Despair not due to a major fault! Capital sins resemble minor ones, in God’s forgiveness.
wirds.transliteration: Yā nafsu lā taqnṭī min zallatin ʿaẓumat [.....] inna al-kabā'ira fī al-ghufrāni kallamami

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَعَلَّ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّيْ حِيْنَ يَقْسِمُهَا [.....] تَأْتِيْ عَلَى حَسَبِ الْعِصْيَانِ فِي الْقِسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: It may be, when my Lord distributes His mercy, that it will come in proportion equal to our sins.
wirds.transliteration: Laʿalla raḥmata rabbī ḥīna yaqsimuhā [.....] ta'tī ʿalā ḥasab al-ʿiṣyāni fī al-qisami

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ وَاجْعَلْ رَجَائِيْ غَيْرَ مُنْعَكِسٍ [.....] لَدَيْكَ وَاجْعَلْ حِسَابِيْ غَيْرَ مُنْخَرِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: My Lord! Let not my hope in You be overthrown, nor let my credit with You be void of worth.
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī wājil rajā'ī ghayra munʿakisin [.....] ladayka wājil ḥisābī ghayra munkharim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْطُفْ بِعَبْدِكَ فِي الدَّارَيْنِ اِنَّ لَهُ [.....] صَبْرًا مَتَى تَدْعُهُ الْأَهْوَالُ يَنْهَزِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Be kind to Your slave in both the worlds, for when terror calls to him, his patience is weak.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lṭuf bi-ʿabdik fī ad-dārīn inna lahu [.....] ṣabran matā tadʿuhul-ahlwālu yanḥazim

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَائْذَنْ لِسُحْبِ صَلَاةٍ مِنْكَ دَائِمَةٍ [.....] عَلَى النَّبِيِّ بِمُنْهَلٍّ وَمُنْسَجِمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: From You, let a cloud of constant blessings rain upon the Prophet ﷺ forever coming down.
wirds.transliteration: Wa'idhan lisuhbi ṣalāhimin-minka dā'imatin [.....] ʿalā an-nabīyi bimanhalin wa-munsajimin

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَا رَنَّحَتْ عَذَبَاتِ الْبَانِ رِيْحُ صَبَا [.....] وَأَطْرَبَ الْعِيْسَ حَادِي الْعِيْسِ بِالنَّغَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: For as long as the east breeze stirs the willow-branches, and camel-drivers rejoice their grey steeds with songs.
wirds.transliteration: Mā rannahat ʿadhabāti al-bānī rīḥu ṣabā [.....] wa-aṭraba al-ʿīsā ḥādī al-ʿīsī bin-naghami

wirds.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِيْ بَكْرٍ وَعَنْ عُمَرٍ [.....] وَعَنْ عَلِيٍّ وَعَنْ عُثْمَانَ ذِي الْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Then be pleased with Abu Bakr and Omar, and with Ali and Uthman, the people of nobility.
wirds.transliteration: Thumma ar-riḍā ʿan Abī Bakrin wa ʿan ʿUmarin [.....] wa-ʿan ʿAlīyin wa-ʿan ʿUthmāna dhī al-karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالْآلِ وَالصَّحْبِ ثُمَّ التَّابِعِيْنَ فَهُمْ [.....] أَهْلُ التُّقَى وَالنَّقَى وَالْحِلْمِ وَالْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: And upon his Family, Companions, and Followers. The people of piety, knowledge, clemency and generosity.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-al-āli wa-ṣ-ṣaḥbi thumma at-tābiʿīn fa-hum [.....] ahlu at-taqā wa-n-nuqā wa-l-ḥilmi wa-l-karami

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَبِّ بالمُصْطَفَى بَلِّغْ مَقَاصِدَنَا [.....] وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا مَا مَضَى يا واسِعَ الْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: O Allah, by the Chosen, let us reach our aspirations, - and forgive us the past; Your generosity is so vast.
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī bil-muṣṭafā balligh maqāṣidānā [.....] waghfir lanā mā maḍā yā wāsiʿa al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاغْفِرْ إِلَهِيْ لِكُلِّ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ بِمَا [.....] يَتْلُوْهُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْأَقْصَى وَفِي الْحَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Forgive, my God, all Muslims by – that they recite in the Al-Aqsa Mosque and in Mecca.
wirds.transliteration: Waghfir ilāhī likulli al-muslimīn bimā [.....] yatlūhū fī al-masjidi al-aqsā wa fī al-ḥaram

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِجَاهِ مَنْ بَيْتُهُ فِيْ طَيْبَةٍ حَرَمٌ [.....] وَاِسْمُهُ قَسَمٌ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْقَسَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: By the one whose house in Madinah is a sanctuary, - And his name is one of the greatest oaths.
wirds.transliteration: Bijāhi man baytuhu fī Ṭaybahin ḥaramun [.....] wa-ismuhu qasamun min aʿẓami al-qasam

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَهَذِهِ بُرْدَةُ الْمُخْتَارِ قَدْ خُتِمَتْ [.....] وَالْحَمْدُ لِلهِ فِيْ بَدْءٍ وَفِيْ خَتَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This is the end of the Burdah – Thanks God in the beginning and in the end.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-hadhihi burdatul-mukhtāri qad khutimati [.....] wal-ḥamdu lillāhi fī badi'in wa fī khatam

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَبْيَاتُهَا قَدْ أَتَتْ سِتِّيْنَ مَعْ مِائَةٍ [.....] فَرِّجْ بِهَا كَرْبَنَا يَا وَاسِعَ الْكَرَمِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Its verses have reached one hundred and sixty – Ease our concerns by it, You are the Most Generous.
wirds.transliteration: Ab'yātuhā qad atat sittīna maʿa mi'atin [.....] farrij bihā karbanā yā wāsiʿa al-karam

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَتَطلُبُ لَيلى وَهيَ فيكَ تَجَلَّت [.....] وَتَحسَبُها غَيراً وَغَيرُكَ لَيسَتِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Are you seeking Layla while she appears in you! You think she is an other, while she is none but you!
wirds.transliteration: Atatlubu Laylā wa hiya fīka tajallat [.....] wa taḥsabuhā ghayran wa ghayruka laysa

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَذا بَلَهٌ في مِلَّةِ الحُبِّ ظاهِرٌ [.....] فَكُن فَطِناً فَالغيرُ عَينُ القَطيعَةِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This is clear stupidity in the faith of love. Be alert; otherness is the disruption itself!
wirds.transliteration: Fa-ḏā balahun fī millati al-ḥubbi ẓāhirun [.....] fakun faṭīnan fa-al-ghayru ʿaynu al-qaṭīʿati

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَلَمْ تَرَها أَلقَتْ عَلَيكَ جَمَالَها [.....] وَلَو لَم تَقُمْ بِالذَّاتِ مِنْكَ اِضْمَحَلَّتِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Have not you seen her overshadow you with her beauty! If it did not stand by your essence, there would be none!
wirds.transliteration: Alam tarahā alqat ʿalayka jamālaha [.....] walaw lam taqum bi-ẓāti minka iḍmaḥallat

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَزيزٌ لِقاها لا يَنالُ وِصالَها [.....] سِوى مَن يَرى مَعنىً بِغَيرِ هَوِيَّةِ
wirds.en_wird_description: It is so dear to meet her; no one could ever reach her Except the one who sees a concept without identity.
wirds.transliteration: ʿAzīzun liqāhā lā yanālu wiṣālāhā [.....] siwā man yarā maʿnan bighayri hawiyyati

wirds.ar_wird_description: بَديعَة حُسنٍ لو بَدا نورُ وَجهِها [.....] إِلى أَكمَهٍ أَضحى يَرى كُلَّ ذَرَّةِ
wirds.en_wird_description: She has exceptional beauty; if the light of her face appeared To a blind man, he would start to see every atom.
wirds.transliteration: Badīʿatu ḥusnin law badā nūru wajhihā [.....] ilā akmahin aḥyā yarā kulla ẓarrah

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَبِحُبِّ أَحبابي أُلام لا وَالذي خَلَقَ الأَنام [.....] عَينايَ بَعدَ فِراقِهمْ مَا ذَاقَتا طِيبَ المَنامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Am I blamed for the love of my beloved ones! No, by the One Who created People! My eyes after leaving them have never tasted any good sleep!
wirds.transliteration: Abiḥubbi aḥbābī ulām la wa-alladhī khalaqa al-anām [.....] ʿAynāya baʿda firāqihim mā dhāqatā ṭība al-manām

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنّي شُغفِتُ بِحُبهِمْ مِنْ قَبلِ نُطقِيَ بِالكَلام [.....] وأَنا رَضِيعُ خِصالِهم وَالطِفلُ يُؤلِمُهُ الفِطَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I was bewildered in their love before I started to speak. I am a suckling of their traits; weaning is so hard for a child.
wirds.transliteration: Innī shughiftu biḥubbihim min qabli nuṭqī bil-kalām [.....] wa-ana raḍīʿu khuṣālihim wal-ṭiflu yu'limuhu al-fiṭām

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَنْ حُبِّهِمْ لَا أَنْتَهِي وَسِوَاهُمُ لَا أَشْتَهِيْ [.....] بِاللهِ رُحْ يا مُلْتَهيْ بِالعَذْلِ أَكْثَرْتَ الكَلَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I can never stop loving them; I do not desire any other. By Allah, go away you the distracted; you have done a lot of blaming.
wirds.transliteration: ʿAn ḥubbihim lā anṭahī wa-si wāhumū lā ashtahī [.....] billāhi ruḥ ya multahī bil-ʿadhl aktharta al-kalām

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا سَاكِنِينَ المُنْحَنَى، ظَهْرِي مِنَ الشَّوْقِ انْحَنَى [.....] هَلَّا مَنَنْتُمْ بالمُنَى يَوْمَاً لـِمَأْسُورِ الغَرَام
wirds.en_wird_description: O residents of al-Munhana valley, my back has bowed down out of yearning. Please favor your captive of love one day with the ultimate desire.
wirds.transliteration: Yā sākinīn al-munḥanā, ẓahrī mina al-shawqi inḥanā [.....] hallā manantum bil-munā yawmā lan maʾsūri al-gharām

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا وَاقِفِينَ عَلى الصَّفَا، قَلْبِي بِكُمْ نَالَ الصَّفَا [.....] مُنُّوا بِحَقِّ المُصْطَفَى لِلصَّبِّ في دَارِ السَّلامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: You People standing on the Safa, my heart has attained purity [safa] because of you. By the due right of al-Mustafa, favor the lover with Dar al-Salaam.
wirds.transliteration: Yā wāqifīn ʿalā al-ṣafā, qalbī bikum nāla al-ṣafā [.....] munnū biḥaqqi al-muṣṭafā lil-ṣabb fī dār al-salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: أحِبَّتي إِنْ كُنْتُمْ عَلَى صِدْقٍ مِنْ أَمْرِيْ [.....] فَذَاكَ نَفْسُ السَّبِيْلِ سِيْرُوا عَلَى سَيْرِي
wirds.en_wird_description: My beloved ones, if you are sincere with me, this is the same way; follow my pathway!
wirds.transliteration: Aḥibbātī in kuntum ʿalā ṣidqin min amrī [.....] fa-dhāka nafsu al-sabīlī sīrū ʿalā sīrī

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَلَستُ على شكّ تاللهِ ولا وهمِ [.....] أنا العارفُ باللَهِ في السر والجهرْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I am not on doubt, by Allah, or illusion; I am the recognizer of Allah in and out.
wirds.transliteration: Falastu ʿalā shakkin tallāhi walā wahmin [.....] anā al-ʿārifu billāhi fī al-sirr wal-jahr

wirds.ar_wird_description: سُقِيْتُ مِنْ كَأْسِ الْحُبِّ ثُمَّ مَلَكْتُهُ [.....] فَصَارَ مِلْكَاً لَدَيَّ فِيْ مُدَّةِ الدَّهْرِْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
I was given the drink of love; then I owned it.
It became mine for the lifetime.
wirds.transliteration: Suqītu min kāʾsi al-ḥubbi thumma malaktuhu [.....] fa-ṣāra milkan ladayya fī muddatī al-dahri

wirds.ar_wird_description: جَزَى اللهُ مَنْ جَادَ عَلَيْنَا بِسِرِّهِ [.....] فَالْجُودُ فَذَاكَ الجُوْدُ مَنْ جَاْدَ بِالسِّرِ
wirds.en_wird_description:
May Allah reward who favor us with his secret
Generosity belongs to the one who gave his secret.
wirds.transliteration: Jazā Allāhu man jāda ʿalaynā bi-sirrihī [.....] fa-al-jūd fa-dhāka al-jūd man jāda bi-al-sirr

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَمِلْنَا عَلَى كَتْمِ الحَقِيْقَةِ وَصَوْنِهَا [.....] وَمَنْ صَانَ سِرَّ اللهِ أَخَذَ بِالشُّكْرِْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
We worked on hiding the reality and maintain it;
Whoever maintain the secret of Allah must have offered gratitude.
wirds.transliteration: ʿAmilnā ʿalā katmi al-ḥaqīqati wa-ṣawnihā [.....] waman ṣāna sirra Allāhi akhadha bi-al-shukri

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَمَّا جَادَ الوَهَّابُ عَنِّي بِنَشرِهَا [.....] أَهَّلَنِيْ لِلتَّجْرِيْدِ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا أَدْرِيِْْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
When the Giver favored me with deploying it,
He qualified me for the indifference to living from where I do not reckon.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lammā jāda al-Wahhāb ʿannī binashrihā [.....] ahallanī li-al-tajrīdi min ḥaythu lā adrī

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقَلَّدَني سَيْفَ العَزْمِ والصِّدْقِ والتُّقَا [.....] وَمَنَحَنِي خَمْرَاً فَيَا لَهُ مِنْ خَمْرِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He vested me with the sword of determination, truthfulness and piety; and He favored me with a wine; and what a wine!
wirds.transliteration: Wa-qalladanī sayfa al-ʿazmi wa-al-ṣidqi wa-al-taqā [.....] wamanahanī khamrān faya lahu min khamri

wirds.ar_wird_description: خَمْرَةٌ يَحْتَاجُ الْكُلُّ طُرَّاً لِشُرْبِهَا [.....] كَمَا يَحْتَاجُ السَّكْرَانُ لِمَزِيْدِ السُّكْرِ
wirds.en_wird_description:
A wine that everyone needs to drink;
As the drunkard needs more drunkenness.
wirds.transliteration: Khamratun yaḥtāju al-kullu ṭurran li-shurbihā [.....] kamā yaḥtāju al-sakrān li-mazīdi al-sukr

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَصِرْتُ لَهَا سَاقيْ وَكُنْتُ عَاصِرَهَا [.....] وَهَلْ لَهَا مِنْ سَاْقٍ سِوَايَ فِيْ ذَا الْعَصْرِِ
wirds.en_wird_description:
I became its cupbearer and I was its companion;
Does it have a cupbearer other than me in this era?
wirds.transliteration: Fa-ṣirṭu lahā sāqī wa-kuntu ʿāṣirahā [.....] wa-hal lahā min sāqin siwāya fī dhā al-ʿaṣr

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَلَا غَرْوَ إِنْ قُلْتُ وَقَدْ قَالَ رَبُّنَا [.....] يَخْتَصُّ بِفَضْلِهِ مَنْ يَشَا بِلَا حَصْرِِِ
wirds.en_wird_description: There is no wonder, when I say, after Allah has declared "He picks up for His favor whomever He likes" without any limit
wirds.transliteration: Wa-lā gharwā in qultu wa-qad qāla rabbunā [.....] yakhtaṣu bifaḍlihi man yashā bilā ḥaṣr

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَذَلِكَ فَضْلُ اللهِ يُؤْتِيْهِ مَنْ يَشَا [.....] فَلَهُ مَزِيْدُ الْحَمْدِ والثَّنَا والشُّكْرِِِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This is the favor of Allah; He gives it to whomever He likes. More glory, praise and thanks are due to Him.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-dhālika faḍlu Allāhi yu'tīhī man yashā [.....] falahu mazīdu al-ḥamdi wa-al-thanā wa-al-shukr

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَيَا رَبِّ بِرُوْحِ الحَبِيْبِ وَرُوْحِكَا [.....] أَيِّدْنِي بِرُوْحِ القُدْسِ وَيَسِّرْ لِيْ أَمْرِيِِِْ
wirds.en_wird_description: O Lord, by the soul of the Beloved, and Your spirit, Support me with the Holy Spirit and ease out my affairs.
wirds.transliteration: Ayyā rabbi birūḥi al-ḥabībi wa-rūḥikā [.....] ayyidnī birūḥi al-qudsī wa-yassir lī amrī

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَتِي رَبِيْ وَاجْعَلْ لِيْ وَزِيْرَاً [.....] مِنْ أَنْصَارِكَ وَلَا تُخْزِنِيْ يَوْمَ الْحَشْرِِِِِْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Untie my complex knots and support me with a Helper from Your supporters and do not disgrace me on the Day of Gathering.
wirds.transliteration: Waḥllul ʿuqdatī rabī wa-ajil lī wazīrā [.....] min anṣārik wa-lā tukhzinī yawma al-ḥashr

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَصَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ ثُمَّ بَارِكْ وَعَظِّمَاً [.....] وَمَجِّدْ رُوْحَ الْحَبِيْبِ فِي مَقْعَدِ السِّرِِِِِِّْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shower you Salawat and Salaam and then bless and glorify the soul of the Beloved in the Seat of Secret.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-ṣalli wa-sallim thumma bārik wa-ʿaẓẓimā [.....] wa-majjid rūḥa al-ḥabībi fī maqʿadi al-sirr

wirds.ar_wird_description: شَوَّقَتْ رُوحِي لِشَاطِ الوَادِي [.....] فَهَا أنا يا رَبِّي خُذْ بِيَدِي ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: My soul longed for the side of the Valley. So, here I am Master, take me by the hand
wirds.transliteration: Shawwaqat ruuhi lishati al-wadi [.....] Faha ana ya rabbi khudh biyadi

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَبِيتُ الَّليَالِي جَهْراً أُنادِي [.....] فَقَلْبِي يَذُوْبُ مِنَ الْكَمَدِ
wirds.en_wird_description: I spend nights loudly calling. My heart is melting out of concern
wirds.transliteration: Abeetu al-layali jahran unadi [.....] Faqalbi yadhubu mina al-kamadi

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَمَاني العُذَالُ بِفَرْطِ الهَوَى [.....] فَقَالُو جُنِنْتَ فوا جَلَدِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The rebukers accused me of over-love. They said I went crazy! Let me be patient.
wirds.transliteration: Ramani al-‘uthalu bifurti al-hawa [.....] Faqalu juninta fawajiladi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَحَبَّةُ اللهِ نَارٌ مُوقَدَةْ  [.....] تُبِيْدُ بالرُّوحِ وبالْجَسَدِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The love of Allah is like a blazing fire. It annihilates both the soul and the body.
wirds.transliteration: Mahabbatu Allahi narun muqaddat [.....] Tubidu bir-ruhi wabil-jasadi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَذَرَّةُ حُبٍ لِلمَولَى الرَّحيم [.....] تُزيلُ الهُمُوم يَوْمَ التَّنَادِي ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: An atom of the Most Merciful. Removes worries at the Day of Calling
wirds.transliteration: Fadharatuhu hubbin lil-mawla ar-rahim [.....] Tuzeelu al-humum yawma at-tanadi

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَشِقْتُ الإِلَهَ وَلَا صَبْرَ لِيْ  [.....] حُرْقَةُ حُبِّهِ في الفُؤَادِْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I loved the God and have no patience! The burn of His love is in the heart.
wirds.transliteration: Ashiqtu al-ilaha wala sabra li [.....] Hurqatuhu hubbihi fi al-fuadi

wirds.ar_wird_description: اللهُ اللهْ، اللهُ ربي [.....] عَوْنِيْ وَحَسْبِيْ، مَالِيْ سِوَاهُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Allahu Allah, Allahu is my Lord, help and sufficiency; I have none except Him!
wirds.transliteration: Allahu Allah, Allahu rabbi [.....] Awni wa hasbi, mali siwahu

wirds.ar_wird_description: أهِيْمُ وَحْدِيْ بِذِكْرِ رَبِّيْ [.....] فَذِكْرُ رَبِّيْ هُوَ الشِّفَاءُْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
The beloved approaches us 
After turning away from us.
wirds.transliteration: Aheemoo wahdi bithikri rabbi [.....] Fadhikru rabbi huwa ash-shifa'u

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَحْبَبْتُ رَبَّا هُوَ اعْتِمَادِيْ [.....] لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ هُوَ يَشَاءُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have loved a lord on whom I rely, for anything He likes
wirds.transliteration: Ahbabtu rabbā huwa i'timādi [.....] Likulli shay'in huwa yashā'u

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ حُبٍّ لِغَيْرِ رَبِّي [.....] فِيْهِ الْعَذَابُ، فِيْهِ الشَّقَاءُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Any love for other than my lord carries pain and loss.
wirds.transliteration: Wa kullu hubbin lighayri rabbi [.....] Fīhi al-'adhābu, fīhi ash-shaqā'u

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا فَوْزَ فَاْنٍ عَنِ الْفَنَاءِ [.....] لَهُ الْحَيَاةُ، لَهُ الْبَقَاءُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Winners are those who are not even aware of their annihilation. They have the life; they have divine subsistence.
wirds.transliteration: Yā fawza fānin 'ani al-fanā'i [.....] Lahu al-ḥayātu, lahu al-baqā'u

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدْ [.....] مِنْ ذَاتِهِ النُّورْ والضِّيَاءُُ
wirds.en_wird_description: O Lord, shower Your blessings on Muhammad; from his essence comes light and enlightenment.
wirds.transliteration: Yā rabbī ṣalli 'ala Muḥammad [.....] Min dhātihi an-nūr wal-ḍiyā'u

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَآلِهِ وَالصَّحْبِ الْكِرَامِ [.....] لَهُمْ عُهُودٌ، لَهُمْ وَفَاءُ
wirds.en_wird_description: And on his honorable family and companions; they meet their undertakings and are faithful.
wirds.transliteration: Wa ālihi waṣ-ṣahbi al-kirāmi [.....] Lahum 'uhūdun, lahum wafā'u

wirds.ar_wird_description: اللهْ اللهْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهْ مَوْلَاً [.....] اللهْ اللهْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهْ رَبُّنَاْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
Allah Allah, no god but Allah, our Master
Allah Allah, no god but Allah our Lord
wirds.transliteration: Allahu Allah, lā ilāha illā Allah, mawlāan [.....] Allahu Allah, lā ilāha illā Allah, rabbunā

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَهْلُ الْمَحَبَّةِ بِالْمَحْبُوبِ قَدْ شُغِلُوا [.....] وَفِيْ مَحَبَّتِهِ أَرْوَاحَهُمْ بَذَلُواْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The people of love are busy with their beloved; in His love they have spent their souls.
wirds.transliteration: Ahl al-maḥabbati bil-maḥbūbi qad shughilū [.....] Wafī maḥabbatihi arwāḥahum bāzalū

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَخَرَّبُوا كُلَّ مَا يَفْنَى وَقَدْ عَمَرُوا [.....] مَا كَانَ يَبْقَى فَيَا حُسْنَ الَّذِيْ عَمِلُواْ
wirds.en_wird_description: They have demolished all perishables and built what is due to remain. How good what they have done!
wirds.transliteration: Wa kharrabū kulla mā yafnā wa qad 'amarū [.....] Mā kāna yabqā fa-yā ḥusna alladhī 'amilū

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَمْ تُلْهِهِمْ زِيْنَةُ الدُّنْيَا وَزُخْرُفُهَا [.....] وَلَا جَنَاهَا وَلَا حِلْيٌ وَلَا حُلَلُ
wirds.en_wird_description: They have not been distracted by the embodiment of this world, nor its gardens, jewelry or suits.
wirds.transliteration: Lam tulhihim zīnat ad-dunyā wa zukhrufuhā [.....] Walā janāhā walā ḥilyun walā ḥulal

wirds.ar_wird_description: امُوا عَلَى الْكَوْنِ مِنْ وَجْدٍ وَمِنْ طَرَبٍ [.....] وَمَا اسْتَقَلَّ بِهِمْ رَبْعٌ وَلَا طَلَلُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: They are bewildered in the universe out of love and ecstasy, without getting limited by any place or heights.
wirds.transliteration: Amū 'alā al-kawni min wajdin wa min ṭarab [.....] Wamā istaqalla bihim rab'un walā ṭalal

wirds.ar_wird_description: دَاعِي التَّشَوُّفِ نَادَاهُمْ وَأَقْلَقَهُمْ [.....] فَكَيْفَ يَهْنُوا وَنَارُ الشَّوْقِ تَشْتَعِلُُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The caller of yearning has called them and discomforted them; how can one enjoy life while the fire of yearning is ablaze!
wirds.transliteration: Dā'i at-tashawufi nādāhum wa aqlaqahum [.....] Fakayfa yahnū wa nāru ash-shawqi tashta'ilu

wirds.ar_wird_description: مِنْ أَوَلِ اللَّيْلِ قَدْ سَارَتْ عَزَائِمُهُمْ [.....] وَفِيْ خِيَامِ حِمَى الْمَحْبُوبِ قَدْ نَزَلُواُُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: From the start of the night, their determination takes them; and in the sanctuary tents of the beloved they align.
wirds.transliteration: Min awal al-layli qad sārat 'azā'imuhum [.....] Wafī ḫiyām ḥimā al-maḥbūbi qad nazalū

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَافَتْ لَهُمْ خِلَعُ التَّشْرِيْفِ يَحْمِلُهَا [.....] عَرْفُ النَّسِيْمِ الَّذِي مِنْ نَشْرِهِ ثَمِلُواُُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The gifts of honor have come to them, carried by the breeze whose smell made them drunk.
wirds.transliteration: Wāfat lahum ḵilā'u at-tashrīfi yaḥmiluhā [.....] 'Arfu an-nasīm al-ladhī min nashrihi thamīlū

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُمُ الْأَحِبَّةُ أَدْنَاهُمْ لِأَنَّهُمُ [.....] عَنْ خِدْمَةِ الصَّمَدِ الْمَحْبُوبِ مَا غَفَلُواُُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: They are the beloved ones; He brought them near because they have never been distracted from the service of the Beloved.
wirds.transliteration: Humul-aḥibbatu adnāhum li'annahum [.....] 'An ḵidmati as-ṣamad al-maḥbūbi mā ghafalū

wirds.ar_wird_description: فِيْ حُبِّهِ وَعَلَى مَقْصُودِهِمْ حَصَلُوا [.....] فِيْ حُبِّهِ وَعَلَى مَقْصُودِهِمْ حَصَلُواُُْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Glorified is the One Who brought them close until they passed on in His love; they have achieved their aspiration.
wirds.transliteration: Fī ḥubbihi wa 'alā maqṣūdihim ḥaṣalū [.....] Fī ḥubbihi wa 'alā maqṣūdihim ḥaṣalū

wirds.ar_wird_description: أعَليكَ صلَّى الله يا خَيرَ خَلقِ الله [.....] وَالآلِ وَالأَصحاب وَالقَومِ أَهلِ اللهْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
May Allah bless you the best of creation
And your folks, companions and men of God
wirds.transliteration: A'layka ṣallā Allah ya ḵayra ḵalqillāh [.....] Wal-ālī wal-aṣḥāb wa al-qawmi ahlillāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا كَعبَةَ الأَسرار وَمَنبعَ الأَنوارْ [.....] بِالعَزْمِ يا مُختارْ أَيَّدتَ دِينَ الله
wirds.en_wird_description:
You are the core of secrets, and fountain of lights
By determination, you the Chosen, have supported the faith
wirds.transliteration: Yā Ka'bata al-asrār wa manba'a al-anwār [.....] Bil-'azmi yā Mukhtār ayyadta dīnallāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: فِداؤُكَ الأَرواح وَمِثلُها الأَشباحْ [.....] يا خِيرَةَ الفَتاحْ مِنْ أَنبياءِ الله
wirds.en_wird_description:
Our souls and bodies are offered in sacrifice to you
You are the best of the Prophets of God
wirds.transliteration: Fidā'uka al-arwāḥ wa mithluhā al-ashbāḥ [.....] Yā ḵayrata al-fatāḥ min anbiyā'illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا مَنْ لَهُ البُرهان وَخُلقُهُ القُرآن [.....] مَا كَانتِ الأَكوانُ وَحَقهِ لَولاَه
wirds.en_wird_description:
Evidence is yours, and the Quran is your character
If it were not for you, universe would not have been there
wirds.transliteration: Yā man lahu al-burhān wa ḵuluquhu al-Qur'ān [.....] Mā kānati al-akwān wa ḥaqqihi lawlāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: لِواؤُكَ المَرفُوعْ وَقَولُكَ المَسمُوعْ [.....] وَحُبكَ المَطبُوعْ في مُهجَةِ الأَواهْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
Your banner is raised, and your say is heard
Your love is imprinted on the heart of the lover
wirds.transliteration: Liwā'uka al-marū' wa qawluka al-masmu' [.....] Wa ḥubbuka al-maṭbū' fī muhjatil-awāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: فِدَاؤُكَ الْأَرْوَاحْ وَمِثْلُهَا الْأَشْبَاحْ [.....] يَا خِيرَةَ الْفَتَّاحْ مِنْ أَنْبِيَاءِ اللهْْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
Souls are sacrificed for you, so are the bodies
You the Chosen of the Opener of the Prophets of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Fidā'uka al-arwāḥ wa mithluhā al-ashbāḥ [.....] Yā ḵayrata al-fattāḥ min anbiyā'illāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَدْعُوكَ بِالسِبطَينِ لِكَشفِ هَذا الغَيمْ [.....] يا مَلجأَ الثَّقَلَيْنِ في الخَطبِ عِنْدَ اللهْْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
We ask you by the two grandchildren to ease out
concerns
You are the resort of all people on the Day of Judgement
wirds.transliteration: Ad'ūka bī as-sibṭayni li-kashfi hādhā al-ghaym [.....] Yā malja'a al-thaqalayn fī al-ḵuṭbi 'inda allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: هَا أَنتَ في المَحشَرْ مُؤَيَّدُ المَظهَرْ [.....] فَكُلَّمَا تُذكَر عَليكَ صلَّى اللهْْ
wirds.en_wird_description:
We ask you by the two grandchildren to ease out
concerns
You are the resort of all people on the Day of Judgement
wirds.transliteration: Hā anta fī al-maḥshar mu'ayyad al-maẓhar [.....] Fakullamā tuḏkar 'alayka ṣallā Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: اللهْ اللهْ اللهْ [.....] أَنْتَ الْوَاحِدْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Allah Allah Allah		You are the One O Allah
wirds.transliteration: Allāh Allāh Allāh [.....] Anta al-Wāḥid (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: الْحِبُّ أَفْنَانِيْ [.....] وَصِرْتُ حَيَّاًْ (بِاللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: Love has annihilated me, and I have become alive by Allah.
wirds.transliteration: Al-ḥubb afnāni [.....] Waṣirṭu ḥayyāan (Billāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُذْ نَظَرَتْ عَيْنِيْ [.....] جَهْرَاً إِلَيّْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I can never stop loving them; I do not desire any other. By Allah, go away you the distracted; you have done a lot of blaming.
wirds.transliteration: Mudh naẓarat 'ayni [.....] Jahraan ilayya (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: لَقَدْ فَشَا سِرِّيْ  [.....] بِلَاْ مَقَالْ (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: My secret is disclosed, without saying any word (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Laqad fashā sirrī [.....] Bilā maqāl (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقَدْ ظَهَرْ عَنِّيْ [.....] بِلَاْ مِثَالْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: He appeared on me, without any example (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Wa qad ẓahara 'annī [.....] Bilā mithāl (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَرَى وُجُودْ غَيْرِي [.....] مِنَ الْمُحَالْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: We see the existence of others as inconceivable (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Narā wujūd ghayrī [.....] Mina al-muḥāl (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ مَا دُوْنِيْْ [.....] خَيَالُ فَيْ (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: All below me is a moving shade (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Wa kullu mā dūnī [.....] Ḫayāl fī (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُتَّحِدَ الْمَعْنَىْ [.....] فِيْ كُلِّ حَيْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: United in concept in every living (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Mutaḥḥid al-ma'nā [.....] Fī kulli ḥay (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَمَنْ نَظَرْ سِرِّيْ [.....] رَآني شَيْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Whoever looks at my secret thinks I am something (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Faman naẓara sirrī [.....] Rāanī shay' (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَفِيْ حُلَا ذَاتِهْ [.....] طَوَانِيْ طَيْ (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: In the Beauty of His Essence, He has entirely folded me (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Wa fī ḥulā dhātih [.....] Ṭawānī Ṭay (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: صِفَاتِيْ لَاْ تَخْفَىْ [.....] لِمَنْ نَظَرْ (يَا اللهْ)ْ
wirds.en_wird_description: My attributes are not hidden for whoever looks (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Ṣifātī lā takhfā [.....] Liman naẓara (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَذَاتِيْ مَعْلُوْمَةْ [.....] لَكَ الصُّوَرْ (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: My essence is well known; You have made the image (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Wa dhātī ma'lūmah [.....] Laka aṣ-ṣuwar (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: افْنَىْ عَنِ الْإِحْسَاسْ [.....] تَرَىْ عِبَرْ (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: Be absented from the senses, you see lessons (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Ifnā 'ani al-īḥsās [.....] Tarā 'ibar (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: بِالسِّرِ وَالْمَعْنَىْ [.....] خَفِيْتُ كَيْ  (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: In the secret and the concept I have been hidden for (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Bissirr wa al-ma'nā [.....] Khaftu kay (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: لِأَنَّنِيْ مِنِّيْ [.....] سَتْرٌ عَلَيّْ (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: Because "I am from me" is a cover for me (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Li'annani minnī [.....] Satrun 'alay (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا لَاْئِمِيْ جَهْرَاً [.....] دَعِ الْجَفَا (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: O direct blamer, leave abandonment (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Yā lā'imī jaharāan [.....] Da' al-jafā (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: الْحُبُّ أَشْهَرَنِيْ [.....] بِلَا خَفَى (يَا اللهْ)
wirds.en_wird_description: Love has made me known without any disguise (O Allah)
wirds.transliteration: Al-ḥubb ash'aranī [.....] Bilā khafā (Yā Allāh)

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَنَا هُوَ الْمَحْبُوبْْ [.....] أَنَا الْحَبِيبْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I am the Beloved; I am the lover
wirds.transliteration: Anā huwa al-maḥbūb [.....] Anā al-ḥabīb

wirds.en_wird_description: I am the Beloved; I am the lover
wirds.transliteration: Al-ḥubb lī minnī [.....] Shay'un 'ajīb

wirds.ar_wird_description: الْحُبُّ في صِدقِ النِيَّة[.....] خَيرُ الصِفاتِ المَرضيّة
wirds.en_wird_description: Love with truthfulness is the best pleasing attribute
wirds.transliteration: Al-ḥubb fī ṣidqi al-niyyah[.....] khayru al-ṣifāti al-marḍiyyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِنْ كُنتَ مَعَنا فَاتبَعنَا[.....] وَاصْبِر عَلَىَ الحِبِّ مَعْنَا
wirds.en_wird_description: If you are with us, you should follow us and show patience on the beloved with us.
wirds.transliteration: In kunta maʿanā fatbaʿnā[.....] waṣbir ʿalā al-ḥibbi maʿnā

wirds.ar_wird_description: وإِنْ تَسْأَل عَنْ ذِي المَعْنَى[.....] هَذَا طَريقُ الصُوفِيَّة
wirds.en_wird_description: If you ask about the one with the meaning, this is the pathway of Sufi.
wirds.transliteration: Wa-in tas'alu ʿan dhī al-maʿnā[.....] hādhā ṭarīqu al-ṣūfīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ[.....] يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam
wirds.transliteration: Yā salām, yā salām, yā salām[.....] yā salām, yā salām, yā salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَدْ لَذَّ لِي صَافِي المَشْرَبْ[.....] فِي حَضْرَةِ البَازِ الأَشْهَبْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have enjoyed the purity of the drink at the presence of the al-Baaz al-Ashhab [Strong falcon]
wirds.transliteration: Qad ladhdha lī ṣāfī al-mashrab[.....] fī ḥaḍrat al-bāz al-ashhab

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَصَارَ لِي نِعْمَ المَذْهَبْ [.....] هَجْرُ السِوى بِالكُلْيَّة
wirds.en_wird_description: The best way of life for me has become the entire abandoning of otherness
wirds.transliteration: Waṣāra lī niʿma al-madhhab[.....] hijru al-siwwā bil-kullyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ [.....] يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam
wirds.transliteration: Yā salām, yā salām, yā salām[.....] yā salām, yā salām, yā salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: طَابَتْ لَيَالِي الأَفْرَاحْ [.....] وَرَاقَ خَمْرُ الأَقْدَاحْ
wirds.en_wird_description: We have enjoyed the nights of happiness and wine of glasses is purified
wirds.transliteration: ṭābat layālī al-afrāḥ[.....] warāqa khamru al-aqdāḥ

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقْدْ زَكَا لِلأَرْوَاحْ [.....] نَشْرُ الرِّياضِ الْأُنْسِيَّةْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The souls has smelled the breeze of intimate gardens, the secret of holy meanings
wirds.transliteration: Waqd zakā lil-arwāḥ[.....] nashru al-riyāḍi al-unsīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ [.....] يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam
wirds.transliteration: Yā salām, yā salām, yā salām[.....] yā salām, yā salām, yā salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَالِي إِذَا عَزَّ النْاصِر [.....] سِوى حِمى عَبدُ القَادِرْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have none to resort to, when supporters become rare, except the reserve of AbdulQadir
wirds.transliteration: Mālī idhā ʿazza al-nāṣir[.....] siwā ḥimā ʿAbdu al-Qādir

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَاعِي الحِمَى البَحْرُ الزَاخِرْ [.....] سِرُّ المَعانِي القُدسِيَّة
wirds.en_wird_description: The protector of the reserve, the great ocean, the secret of holy meanings
wirds.transliteration: Rāʿī al-ḥimā al-baḥru al-zākhir[.....] sirru al-maʿānī al-qudsīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ [.....] يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam
wirds.transliteration: Yā salām, yā salām, yā salām[.....] yā salām, yā salām, yā salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَلاةُ مَوُلانَا البَارِي [.....] عَلى النَبِيِّ المُختَار
wirds.en_wird_description: The Salawat of our Mawla, the Creator is on the Chosen Prophet
wirds.transliteration: Ṣalātu mawlānā al-bārī[.....] ʿalā al-nabī al-mukhtār

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَالآلِ عَدَّ الأَمْطارِ [.....] أَزْكَى صَلاةٍ مَرْضِيَّهْ
wirds.en_wird_description: And the Family as much as rain; the best accepted Salawat.
wirds.transliteration: Wal-āl ʿadda al-amṭār[.....] azkā ṣalātin marḍīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ [.....] يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْ يَا سَلَامْْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam, Ya Salaam
wirds.transliteration: Yā salām, yā salām, yā salām[.....] yā salām, yā salām, yā salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: الكُؤُوسُ الهَاشِمِيَّةْ [.....] أَرشَدَتْ أَهلَ السُلوكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The Hashimi cups have guided the People of Way
wirds.transliteration: al-Ku'ūsu al-Hāshimīyah [.....] Arshadat ahl al-Sulūk

wirds.ar_wird_description: فِي مَقَامِ العُبُودِيَّةْ [.....] صَيَّرَتُهُمْ كَالمُلُوكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: In their station as slaves, they have been made like kings
wirds.transliteration: Fī maqām al-‘ubūdīyah [.....] Sayyaratuhum kāl-mulūk

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَهَوَى النَفسِ الأَبِيَّةْ [.....] زَالَ عَنْهُم والشُّكُوكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The whims of the rebellious self have been removed from them together with doubts
wirds.transliteration: Wa-hawā al-nafs al-abīyah [.....] Zāla ‘anhum wa-sh-shukūk

wirds.ar_wird_description: شَاهَدُوا الشَّمْسَ البَهيَّةْ [.....] تَنْجَلِي تَحْتَ الِلِّثَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: They have witnessed the shining sun exposed under the veil
wirds.transliteration: Shāhadū ash-shams al-bahīyah [.....] Tanjalī taḥt al-lithām

wirds.ar_wird_description: جَلَّ قَيُّومُ الْوُجُودِ [.....] لَنَا بِالْإِيْجَادِ جَادْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The whims of the rebellious self
wirds.transliteration: Jallā Qayyūm al-Wujūd [.....] Lanā bil-‘ījād jād

wirds.ar_wird_description: لِاحْتِسَا كَأْسِ الشُّهُودِ [.....] فَسَنَا الْإِسْعَادِ عَادْ
wirds.en_wird_description: To sip of the glass of Witness, the light of happiness has returned
wirds.transliteration: Liḥtīsā' kā'sh ash-shuhūd [.....] Fasanā al-‘Is‘ād ‘ād

wirds.ar_wird_description: بَيْتِي فِي فَكِّ الْقُيُودِ [.....] مَظْهَرُ الْإِرْشَادِ شَادْ
wirds.en_wird_description: My home is in untying my shackles, the icon of guidance has commended
wirds.transliteration: Baytī fī fakki al-quyūd [.....] Mazhar al-Irshād shād

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَاحِ قِفْ عِنْدَ الْحُدُودِ [.....] وَاحْتَسِيْ صَافِي الْمُدَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Bro, stop by the limits, and drink of the pure wine
wirds.transliteration: Ṣāḥi qif ‘inda al-ḥudūd [.....] Waḥtasī ṣāfī al-mudām

wirds.ar_wird_description: نُوْرُ فَجْرِيْ بَعْدَ هَجْرِيْ [.....] فِي سَمَا الْإِصْلَاحِ لَاحْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The light of my dawn, after my abandonment, has appeared in the horizon of repair
wirds.transliteration: Nūrū fajrī ba‘da hijrī [.....] Fī samā' al-Iṣlāḥ lāḥ

wirds.ar_wird_description: عُسْرُ أَسْرِيْ مُرُّ صَبْرِيْ [.....] بِلِقَا الْأَفْرَاحِ رَاحْ
wirds.en_wird_description: The difficulty of my captivity and the bitterness of my patience have disappeared with the meeting of happiness
wirds.transliteration: ‘Usru asrī murru ṣabrī [.....] Biliqā' al-afrāḥ rāḥ

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَاقَ خَمْرِيْ طَابَ سُكْرِيْ [.....] بُلْبُلُ الْإِفْصَاحِ صَاحْ
wirds.en_wird_description: My wine is pure, my drunkenness is good, the bird of expression has tweeted
wirds.transliteration: Rāqā khamrī ṭāba sukhrī [.....] Bulbul al-ifsāḥ ṣāḥ

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَائِلَاً يَا أَهْلَ عَصْرِي [.....] فَاقْصِدُوا هَذَا الْإِمَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Calling the people of my age, to head towards that Imam
wirds.transliteration: Qā'ilan yā ahl ‘aṣrī [.....] Fāqsidū hādhā al-Imām

wirds.ar_wird_description: صِلْ صَلَاةَ الصَّبِّ رَبِّيْ [.....] لِلنَّبِي الْحَابِي الْحَبِيْبْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shower the salawat of the beloved my Lord, on the giver and beloved Prophet (SA)
wirds.transliteration: Ṣil ṣalāh aṣ-ṣabbī rabbī [.....] Lil-Nabī al-ḥābī al-ḥabīb

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَلَى آلٍ وَصَحْبٍ [.....] مَا تَغَنَّى الْعَنْدَلِيْبْ
wirds.en_wird_description: And on the Family and Companions, so long as the nightingale sings
wirds.transliteration: Wa ‘alā ālin wa-ṣaḥbīn [.....] Mā taghannā al-‘andalīb

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَلَى غَوْثٍ وَقُطْبٍ [.....] وَوَلِيٍّ وَمُنِيْبْ
wirds.en_wird_description: And on the Ghawth and Qutb, and Saints and Repenters
wirds.transliteration: Wa ‘alā Ghawthin wa-Quṭbin [.....] Wa-Waliyyin wa-Munībin

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَعَلَى طَالِبِ قُرْبٍ [.....] مِنْكَ مَعْ أَزْكَى السَّلَامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: And on the Seekers of Closeness, from You is the purest of salam
wirds.transliteration: Wa ‘alā Ṭālibi Qurbin [.....] Minka ma‘a azkā as-salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: اللهَ قُلْ وَذَرِ الْوُجُودَ وَمَا حَوَى [.....] إِنْ كُنْتَ مُرْتَادَاً بُلُوغَ كَمَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Say Allah and leave the world with all its content, if you are aspiring to achieve perfection
wirds.transliteration: Allāh qul wa-dhir al-wujūd wa-mā ḥawā [.....] In kunta murtādān bulūgh kamāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالْكُلُّ دُوْنَ اللَهِ إِنْ حَقّقْتَهُ [.....] عَدَمٌ عَلى التَّفْصِيلِ والْإِجْمَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Anything other than Allah, if you validate, is nothing in details and in totality
wirds.transliteration: Fāl-kull dūn Allāh in ḥaqqaqtahu [.....] ‘Adam ‘alā at-tafsīl wa-al-ijmāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَاعْلَمْ بِأَنَّكَ والْعَوَالِمَ كُلَّهَا [.....] لَوْلَاهُ فِي مَحْوٍ وَفِي اضْمِحْلَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Know that you and all worlds, if it were not for Him, in a state of erosion and downsizing
wirds.transliteration: Wa‘lam bi-annaka wal-‘awālim kullahā [.....] Lawlāh fī maḥw wa-fī ḍimḥilāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَنْ لَا وُجُوْدَ لِذَاتِهِ مِنْ ذَاتِهِ [.....] فَوُجُوْدُهُ لَوْلَاهُ عَيْنُ مُحَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Whoever has no essence of his own, his existence, if not for Him, is truly impossible
wirds.transliteration: Man lā wujūd li dhātih min dhātih [.....] Fawujūdahu lawlāh ‘ayn muḥāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالْعَارِفُوْنَ فَنَوْا وَلَمَّا يَشْهَدُوا [.....] شَيْئًا سِوَى الْمُتَكَبِّرِ الْمُتَعَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Recognizers of Allah have been annihilated, witnessing none but the Almighty and Haughty Most High
wirds.transliteration: Fāl-‘ārīfūn fanawā wa-lammā yashhadū [.....] Shay'an siwā al-mutakabbir al-mut‘āl

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَرَأَوْا سِوَاهُ عَلَى الْحَقِيقَةِ هَالِكَاً [.....] فِي الْحَالِ والْمَاضِي وَالاسْتِقْبَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They have seen others in reality as perishing, in the present, past and future
wirds.transliteration: Wa ra’awā siwāh ‘alā al-ḥaqīqah hālīkan [.....] Fī al-ḥāl wa-al-māḍī wa-al-istaqbāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَالْمَحْ بِعَقْلِكَ أَوْ بِطَرْفِكَ هَلْ تَرَى [.....] شَيْئاً سِوَى فِعْلٍ مِنَ الْأَفْعَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: So, with your mind or eye, do you see any other than a Divine Act
wirds.transliteration: Fāl-maḥ bi-‘aqlika aw bi-ṭarfika hal tarā [.....] Shay'an siwā fi‘l min al-af‘āl

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَانْظُرْ إِلَى عُلْوِ الْوُجُودِ وَسُفْلِهِ [.....] نَظَرَاً تُؤَيِّدُهُ بِالاسْتِدْلَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Have a look at the high and low level of the universe, with the supporting evidence
wirds.transliteration: Wa-nẓur ilā ‘uluw al-wujūd wa-suflih [.....] Naẓaran tu’ayyiduhu bil-istidlāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: تَجِدِ الْجَمِيْعَ يُشِيْرُ نَحْوَ جَلَالِهِ [.....] بِلِسَانِ حَالٍ أَوْ لِسَانِ مَقَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You will see that all refer to His Awe and Majesty, by state or tongue
wirds.transliteration: Tajidi al-jamī‘ yashīr naḥw jalālīhi [.....] Bilisān ḥāl aw lisān maqāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: هُوَ مُمْسِكُ الْأَشْيَاءَ مِنْ عُلْوٍ إِلَى [.....] سُفْلٍ وَمُبْدِعُهَا بِغَيْرِ مِثَالِ
wirds.en_wird_description: He is the One Who hold things from top to bottom, and He is the One Who initiated things without a prior example
wirds.transliteration: Huwa mumsik al-ashyā’ min ‘ulūw ilā [.....] Suflin wa-mubdi‘uhā bighayri mithāl

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَحْمَدْ يَا حَبِيِبِيْ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ [.....] يَا عَوْنَ الغَرِيِبِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Ahmad, You are my love, Peace be on you. Help of the Stranger, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Aḥmad yā ḥabībī, salām ‘alayk [.....] Yā ‘awn al-gharīb, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَمْنُنٌ وَسَلاَمُ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ [.....] دِيِنُكَ الإِسْلاَمُ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Safe and secure, Peace be on you. Your faith is Islam, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Ammunn wa-salām, salām ‘alayk [.....] Dīnuka al-Islām, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: جِئْتَ بِالقُرْآنِ سَلامْ عَلِيِكْ [.....] مِنْ عِنْدِ الرَّحْمَانِ سَلامْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: You have come with the Quran, Peace be on you. From the Gracious, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Jitā bil-Qur’ān, salām ‘alayk [.....] Min ‘indi ar-Raḥmān, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: جِئْتَ بِالتَّوْحِيِدِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ [.....] فُزْتَ بِالتَّمْجِيِدِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: You have brought the Oneness of God, Peace be on you. You have won glorification; Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Jitā bi-tawḥīd, salām ‘alayk [.....] Fuzta bi-tamjīd, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَنِلْنَا الخَيْرَاتِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ [.....] بِرَجْمِ الجَمْرَاتِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: We got all goodness, Peace be on you. By stoning the Jamarat, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Wa nilnā al-khayrāt, salām ‘alayk [.....] Bi-rajm al-jamrāt, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَنِلْنَا الخَيْرَاتِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ [.....] فِيْ مِنَىَ وَعَرَفَاتِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: We got all goodness, Peace be on you. In Mina and Arafat, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Wa nilnā al-khayrāt, salām ‘alayk [.....] Fī Minā wa-‘Arafāt, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَمَحَوْنَا السَّيْئَاتِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ  [.....] بِرَجْمِ الجَمْرَاتِ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: We wiped out sins, Peace be on you. By stoning the Jamarat, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Wa maḥawnā as-sayy'āt, salām ‘alayk [.....] Bi-rajm al-jamrāt, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَا عَوْنَ الغَرِيِبِ أَحْمَدْ يَا حَبِيِبِيْ  [.....]  سَلاَمْ عَليِكْ سَلاَمْ عَلِيِكْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Help of the Stranger, Ahmad my Love. Peace be on you, Peace be on you
wirds.transliteration: Yā ‘awn al-gharīb, Aḥmad yā ḥabībī [.....] Salām ‘alayk, salām ‘alayk

wirds.ar_wird_description: الحَجُّ وَافَانَا هِمُّوْا مَعَانَا [.....] لَنْزُوُرْ نَبِيِنَا وَبَيْتِ الحَرَمْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Hajj is coming on us. Let's move on to visit our Prophet and the Sacred Home.
wirds.transliteration: Al-ḥajj wāfānā himmū ma‘ānā [.....] Lanazūr nabīyinā wa-bayt al-ḥaram

wirds.ar_wird_description: هِمُوْا مَعَانَا وِالنَّبِيْ دَعَانَا [.....] هِمُّوْا مَعَانَا وِالنَّبِيْ دَعَانَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Let's start together; the Prophet has invited us; let's start together; the Prophet has invited us.
wirds.transliteration: Himmū ma‘ānā wa-an-nabī da‘ānā [.....] Himmū ma‘ānā wa-an-nabī da‘ānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَلَىَ المَدِيِنَةْ يَحْبُوْ الرَّكْبُ، [.....] إِلَى نَبِيِنَا هَامَ القَلْبُ [.....] رَبِّيْ يِبَلِّغْنَا وَالصَّحْبُ [.....] أَقْرَبَ يَوْمٍ لِلُقْيَاهَا [.....] هِمُّوا مَعَانَا
wirds.en_wird_description: On to Madina, the caravan moves slowly; to our Prophet the heart is bewildered. O Allah let us and our company get there at the earliest to meet the Madina. Let's start together.
wirds.transliteration: ‘Alā al-Madīnah yaḥbū ar-rakb [.....] Ilā nabīyinā hām al-qalb [.....] Rabīy yubalighnā wa-ṣ-ṣaḥb [.....] Aqrab yawm li-luqyāhā [.....] Himmū ma‘ānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: الكَعْبَةُ فَاضَتْ أَنْوَارَ [.....] حَبَاهَا اللهُ الأَنْوَارا [.....] وَأَطُوْفُ بِقَلْبِيْ أَدْوَارَا [.....] وَأُصَلّيْ عِنْدَ رُؤْيَاهَا [.....] هِمُّوا مَعَانَا
wirds.en_wird_description: The Ka'bah is overflowing with lights; may Allah increase its lights. I go round her with my heart; and I pray at seeing her. Let's start together.
wirds.transliteration: Al-Ka‘bah fādat anwār [.....] Ḥabāhā Allāh al-anwārā [.....] Wa-aṭūf bi-qalbī adwārā [.....] Wa-uṣallī ‘inda ru’yāhā [.....] Himmū ma‘ānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَرَفَاتُ اللهِ بِهَا عُرِفَا [.....] طُوْبَىْ لِلْقَلْبِ إِذَا عَرَفَا [.....]وَسِتَارُ الكَعْبَةِ قَدْ كُشِفَا [.....] فَبَدَتْ حَسْنَاءَ لُقْيَاهَا [.....] هِمُّوا مَعَانَا
wirds.en_wird_description: Arafat! Allah is known by it. Lucky is the heart that knows. The curtain of the Ka'bah is lifted; it looks so perfect to meet. Let's go together!
wirds.transliteration: ‘Arafāt Allāh bihā ‘urifā [.....] Ṭūbā lil-qalb idhā ‘arifā [.....] Wa-sitār al-Ka‘bah qad kushifā [.....] Fa-badat ḥasanā luqyāhā [.....] Himmū ma‘ānā

34.en_title: Allah Allah Ma lanaa Mawlan Siwallah
34.ar_title: الله الله ما لنا مولاً سوى االله

wirds.ar_wird_description: اللهَ الله اللهَ الله [.....] مَالَنا مَوُلاً سِوى الله[.....] كُلما نَادَيتُ يَا رَب [.....] قَالَ يَا عَبدي أَنا الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Allah Allah Allah Allah, we have no Guardian but Allah.Whenever I call 'O Lord', He responds 'O my servant, I am Allah'
wirds.transliteration: Allāh Allāh Allāh Allāh [.....] Mālanā mawwalān siwā Allāh [.....] Kullamā nādaytu yā rab [.....] Qāla yā ‘abdi anā Allāh

wirds.ar_wird_description: إِن جَبَرتُم كَسرَ قَلبي [.....] أَنتُم أَهلُ الزِمَامْ [.....] أَو وَصَلتُم يَا حَبايِب [.....] هَكذا شَأنُ الكِرام
wirds.en_wird_description: If you mend my broken heart, you are the people of faithfulness.If you get me connected, O Beloved, that is expected of the Noble!
wirds.transliteration: In jabartum kasr qalbī [.....] Antum ahl az-zimām [.....] Aw waṣaltum yā ḥabāyib [.....] Hakadhā sha’n al-kerām

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَالَت أَقمارُ الدَياجي [.....] قُلْ لأِربابِ الغَرام [.....] كُلُّ مَن يَعشَقْ مُحَمَّد [.....] في أَمانٍ وَسلام
wirds.en_wird_description: The moons of the dark nights declared 'tell the people of love that whoever loves Muhammad is in peace and safety'.
wirds.transliteration: Qālat aqmār ad-diyājī [.....] Qul li-arbāb al-ghirām [.....] Kullu man ya‘shaqu Muḥammad [.....] Fī amān wa-salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَحبيبي وَجنَتاه  [.....]      وَردَتانِ كَالدِهَان  [.....]  بَينَ سَمعي وَفُؤادي  [.....] بَرزخٌ لا يَبغيان
wirds.en_wird_description: The cheeks of my beloved are like red roses,Between my hearing any my heart there is a barrier[that stops me from listening to blamers].
wirds.transliteration: Waḥabībī wa-janatāh [.....] Wardatān kaddihān [.....] Bayna sam‘ī wa-fu’ādī [.....] Barzakhun lā yabghiyān

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَرسلَ اللهُ إلِينا [.....] بِالكَراماتِ العِظام [.....] أَحمدُ المُختارِ طَهَ [.....] خَاتَمَ الرُسِلِ الكِرام
wirds.en_wird_description: Allah sent to us, with great miracles, Ahmad, the Chosen, Taha, the Seal of all Honorable Prophets.
wirds.transliteration: Arsala Allāh ilaynā [.....] Bil-karāmāt al-‘iẓām [.....] Aḥmad al-mukhtār Ṭahā [.....] Khātam ar-rusul al-kerām

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَتَهنُوا يَا رِفاقي [.....] نِلتُموا كُلَّ المَرام [.....] بِالذي قَد جَاءكُم يَدُعو [.....]  إِلى دَارِ السَّلام
wirds.en_wird_description: Enjoy it, my friends, you have achieved the aim.With the one who come to you calling to the Dar asSalam.
wirds.transliteration: Fatannaw yā rifāqī [.....] Niltumū kull al-marām [.....] Bil-ladhī qad jā’akum yad‘ū [.....] Ilā dār as-salām

wirds.ar_wird_description: فِيْ هَوَىْ خَيْرِ العِبَادْ [.....] شُغِفَ القَلْبُ وَهَامْ وَهَامَا
wirds.en_wird_description: In the love of the Best of People, my heart is taken and bewildered.
wirds.transliteration: Fī hawā khayr al-‘ibād [.....] Shughifa al-qalb wa-hām wa-hāmā

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَهَنِيِئَاً لِفُؤَادٍ [.....] نَالَ مِنْ طَهَ المَرَامَ
wirds.en_wird_description: Winner is the heart that has received the aim from Taha.
wirds.transliteration: Fahanī’ā li-fu’ādin [.....] Nāla min Ṭahā al-marām

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَنَا فِيْ مَدْحِ مُحَمَّدْ  [.....]  مُغْرَمٌ وَاللهُ يَشْهَدْ
wirds.en_wird_description: In praising Muhammad, I am enchanted, God witness.
wirds.transliteration: Anā fī madḥi Muḥammad [.....] Mughram wa-llāh yashhad

wirds.ar_wird_description: أَنَا فِيْ أَوْصَافِهِ قَدْ بِتُّ صَبّاً [.....] يَا عِيْنِيْ صَبّاً يَا رُوُحِ صَبّاً مُسْتَهَامَا
wirds.en_wird_description: In his description I have become a lover. O the apple of my eye, I have become an enchanted lover.
wirds.transliteration: Anā fī awṣāfihi qad bittu ṣabban [.....] Yā ‘aynī ṣabban yā rūḥī ṣabban mustahāmā
