wirds.ar_wird_description: خيرَ البَريه نظره اليَّ  [.....] ما أنتَ إلا كنزُ العطيه
wirds.en_wird_description: Best of People, have a look at me! You are but the treasure of giving!
wirds.transliteration: Khayra al-bariyyah naẓrah ilayya [.....] Mā anta illā kanz al-‘aṭīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا بحرَ فضلٍ وتاجَ عَدنٍ [.....]  جُد لي بِوَصلٍ قبلَ المنيَّه
wirds.en_wird_description: You are the sea of favor and the crown of justice. Grant me a link before my death.
wirds.transliteration: Yā baḥra faḍlin wa tāja ‘Adnin [.....] Jud lī bi-waṣlin qabl al-maniyyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَاشَاكَ تَغفَل عنَّا وتَبخَل [.....]  يا خيرَ مُرسَل ارحَمْ شَجيّا
wirds.en_wird_description: You would never forget us, or be mean. You, the Best Messenger, have mercy on a lover.
wirds.transliteration: Ḥāshāk takhfal ‘annā wa tabkhal [.....] Yā khayra mursal irḥam shaǧīyyā

wirds.ar_wird_description: كَمْ ذا أُنادي يا خَيرَ هادي [.....] قَصدي ومُرادي عطفاً عَليّا
wirds.en_wird_description: I always call for the Best Guide. Asking and yearning for compassion.
wirds.transliteration: Kam dhā unādī yā khayra hādī [.....] Qaṣdī wa murādī ‘aṭfan ‘alayyā

wirds.ar_wird_description: أُهديكَ حِبْي صلاةَ رَبي [.....] ما دامَ قلبي بِالذِكرِ حي
wirds.en_wird_description: I gift you, my Love, the blessing of my Lord. So long as my heart is alive with Dhikr.
wirds.transliteration: Uhdiīk ḥibī ṣalāta rabbī [.....] Mā dāma qalbī bi-dhikr ḥayy

wirds.ar_wird_description: نورُ الهُدى وافانا [.....] بِحُسنهِ أحيانا. [.....] وباللقاء حيانا [.....] صلّى عليهِ مولانا
wirds.en_wird_description: The Light of Guidance has come upon us; with his beauty, he has revived us. In the meeting he greeted us; may Allah shower his blessing and Salawat on him!
wirds.transliteration: Nūr al-hudā wāfānā [.....] bi-ḥusnihī aḥyānā [.....] wa bil-liqā' ḥayānā [.....] Ṣallā ‘alayhī mawlānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: أهلاً بهِ وسهلاً [.....] قَد طابَ فيهِ المَجلى [.....] حلَّ الهَنا مُذ حلاّ [.....] صلّى عليهِ مَولانا
wirds.en_wird_description: He is most welcome! How good is to see him! All happiness has landed on us since his coming; may Allah shower his blessing and Salawat on him!
wirds.transliteration: Ahlan bihī wa-sahlan [.....] qad ṭāba fīhī al-majlā [.....] ḥalla al-hanā mundhu ḥallā [.....] Ṣallā ‘alayhī mawlānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: هذا الملاكُ العَظيمْ [.....] هذا الرَؤفُ الرَحيم [.....] أتى بِقلبٍ سَليم [.....] صلّى عليهِ مَولانا
wirds.en_wird_description: This is the great angel! This is the Most Compassionate and Merciful! He came to Allah with a sound heart! may Allah shower his blessing and Salawat on him!
wirds.transliteration: Hādhā al-malāk al-‘aẓīm [.....] hādhā al-ra’ūf al-raḥīm [.....] atā bi-qalbin salīm [.....] Ṣallā ‘alayhī mawlānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَحمَةَ العالمين [.....] يا نِعمَةً لا تبيد [.....] مُطاعٍ ثَمَّ أمين [.....] صلى عليهِ مولانا
wirds.en_wird_description: You are the mercy to all worlds! You are a blessing that does not end. You are obeyed and trusted; may Allah shower his blessing and Salawat on him!
wirds.transliteration: Yā raḥmata al-‘ālamīn [.....] yā ni‘matan lā tabīd [.....] muṭā‘in thamma amīn [.....] Ṣallā ‘alayhī mawlānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا مُدعي حُبَه [.....] بِهِ أطِع أمرَه [.....] غداً تنال قُربَهُ [.....] صلى عليه مولانا
wirds.en_wird_description: You who claim his love, by him obey his instruction! Soon you will get close to him; may Allah shower his blessing and Salawat on him.
wirds.transliteration: Yā mudda‘ī ḥubbah [.....] bīhī aṭi‘ amrah [.....] ghadan tanāl qurbahū [.....] Ṣallā ‘alayhī mawlānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: أحمَدُنا المُصطفى [.....] بحرُ الصفا والوَفا [.....] فالمَدحُ فيهِ شِفا [.....] صلّى عليه مولانا
wirds.en_wird_description: Our Ahmad, the Chosen, the ocean of purity and faithfulness; his praise is a healing; may Allah shower his blessing and Salawat on him!
wirds.transliteration: Aḥmadunā al-muṣṭafā [.....] baḥru al-ṣafā wa al-wafā [.....] fa-l-madḥu fīhī shifā [.....] Ṣallā ‘alayhī mawlānā

wirds.ar_wird_description: قَد بدا إليَّ نُورُها عَشيه [.....] ذاتٌ فَتَنَت في حِلى حُسنِها البَري
wirds.en_wird_description: I have seen her light in the evening. Her beauty has enchanted all creation.
wirds.transliteration: Qad badā ilayya nūruhā ‘ashīyah [.....] dhātun fatannat fī ḥilā ḥusnihā al-barī

wirds.ar_wird_description: صاحِ لا تَلُمني مَدحُ النَبي فَنّي [.....] خَمري ودَنّي مِن طِلا ثَغرِها الدُريّه
wirds.en_wird_description: Friends, do not blame me. Praise of the Prophet ﷺ is my art. M wine and cup are from her twinkling teeth.
wirds.transliteration: Ṣāḥī lā taluminī madḥu al-nabī fannī [.....] khamrī wa dannī min ṭilā zighrihā al-durīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: أسماءُ الجَليله كَم شَفَتْ عَليلا [.....] أضحى قَتيلا في الهوى وقَضى المَنيّه
wirds.en_wird_description: Her awesome names have often healed sick people. They become love-ridden and dead.
wirds.transliteration: Asmā'u al-jalīlah kam shafat ‘alīlā [.....] aḥā qaṭīlā fī al-hawā wa qaḍā al-maniyyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: صلّى ذو الجلالِ على النبي الغالي [.....] ثُمَ الآلِ ذَوِ العُلى والصَحبِ والذُريّه
wirds.en_wird_description: May the One with Awe send blessings on the dear Prophet ﷺ. And on his honorable Folks, companions, and descendants.
wirds.transliteration: Ṣallā dhū al-jalālī ‘alā al-nabī al-ghālī [.....] thumma al-ālī dhawī al-‘ulā wa al-ṣaḥbī wa al-dhurīyah

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَاحَتِ الأَطْيَارُ تَشْدُوْا [.....] بِلَيَالِ المَوْلِدِ[.....] وَبَرِيِقُ النُّورِ يَبْدُوْ [.....] مِنْ مَعَانِيْ أَحْمَدِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Birds started to sing in the nights of the birthday; the glamour of the light appears from the qualities of Ahmad.
wirds.transliteration: Rāḥati al-ṭayāru tashdū [.....] bilayālī al-mawlidi [.....] wa barīqu al-nūri yabdū [.....] min ma'ānī Aḥmadi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مَوْلِدُ الهَادِيْ تَسَامَىْ [.....] أَنْتَ لِلأَجْيَالِ عِيِدْ[.....] نُوْرُكَ العَالِيْ تَسَامَىْ [.....] مِنْ حِمَىْ البَيْتِ المَجِيِدْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Transcended Birth of the Guide, you are a Eid for generations. Your light has gone high from the sanctuary of the Glorified Home.
wirds.transliteration: Mawlid al-hādī tasāmā [.....] anta lil-ajyāl ‘īdin [.....] nūruk al-‘ālī tasāmā [.....] min ḥimā al-bayti al-majīd

wirds.ar_wird_description: عِنْدَمَا نَادَىَ المُنَادِيْ [.....] جَاءَ شَمْسُ العَالَمِيِنْ [.....] وَازْدَهَتْ بَيْنَ العِبَادِ [.....] طَلْعَةُ الهَادِيْ الأَمِيِنْ
wirds.en_wird_description: When the caller called "the son of all worlds has arrived", and stunning appearance of the Trusted Guide came among people.
wirds.transliteration: Indamā nādā al-munādī [.....] jā'a shamsu al-‘ālamīn [.....] wa-izdahat bayna al-‘ibād [.....] ṭal‘atu al-hādī al-amīn

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَبَرِيِقُ النُّورِ يَبْدُوْ [.....] مِنْ مَعَانِي أَحْمَدِ [.....] بِلَيَالِيْ المَوْلِدِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The glamour of the light appears from the qualities of Ahmad in the nights of the Birthday.
wirds.transliteration: Wa barīqu al-nūri yabdū [.....] min ma'ānī Aḥmadi [.....] bilayālī al-mawlidi

wirds.ar_wird_description: رَباهُ بِذِكرِكَ أعرِفُ ذاتي [.....] حِينَ أُنادي يا مولاي [.....] هَب لي هُدايَ أنتَ رجايا
wirds.en_wird_description: Lord, by your mention, I know myself; when I call 'O Lord'. Gift to me my guidance; You are my Hope.
wirds.transliteration: Rabbāhu bidhikrika a‘rifu dhātī [.....] ḥīna unādī yā mawlāya [.....] hab li hudāya anta rajāya

wirds.ar_wird_description: النورُ يُداعِبُ أجفاني [.....] في الليلِ فأعزفُ ألحاني [.....] وأُرَتِلُ آيَ القُرآنِ [.....] وأطيرُ إلى دُنيا الأُنسِ [.....] هَبْ لي هُدايَ أنتَ رَجايا
wirds.en_wird_description: The light plays my eyelids at night, so I play my tunes. I recite the verses of the Quran and fly to the world of intimacy. Gift to me my guidance. You are my Hope.
wirds.transliteration: Al-nūru yudā‘ibu ajfānī [.....] fī al-layli fa‘azifu al-‘alḥānī [.....] wa urattilu āya al-Qur’āni [.....] wa atīru ilā dunyā al-unsī [.....] hab li hudāya anta rajāya

wirds.ar_wird_description: رُحماكَ يا رَبَّ العبادِ رجائي [.....] ورِضاكَ قَصدي فاستَجِب لي دُعائي [.....] وحِماكَ أبغي يا إلهي راجياً [.....] مِنكَ الرِضى فَجُد بِوَلائي
wirds.en_wird_description: Have Your mercy on me, Lord of People; You are my hope. Your Pleasure is my aim; accept my Duaa. Your Sanctuary I am seeking, hoping for Your Satisfaction; so honor me with Your Care
wirds.transliteration: Ruhmaka ya rabbal 'ibadi rajai [.....] wa ridhaka qasdi fastajib li du'ai [.....] wa himaka abghi ya ilahi rajiyan [.....] minka ar-ridha fa jud bi walai

wirds.ar_wird_description: نادَيتُ باسمِكَ يا إلهي ضارِعاً [.....] إنْ لَمْ تُجِرني فَمَنْ يُجيرُ بُكائي [.....] وحِماكَ أبغي يا إلهي راجياً  [.....] مِنكَ الرضى فجُد بولائي
wirds.en_wird_description: I called You by name, imploring; if You do not save me, there will be none to stop my tears. Your Sanctuary I am seeking, hoping for Your Satisfaction; so honor me with Your Care
wirds.transliteration: Nadaytu bismika ya ilahi darian [.....] in lam tujirni faman yujiru bukai [.....] wa himaka abghi ya ilahi rajiyan [.....] minka ar-ridha fa jud bi walai

wirds.ar_wird_description: أنتَ الكَريمُ فلا تَدعني تائهاً [.....] فَلَقَد عييتُ مِنَ البِعادِ النائي [.....] وحِماكَ أبغي يا إلهي
wirds.en_wird_description: You are the Noble! Do not leave me at loss. I've got tired of remote distancing. Your sanctuary I seek.
wirds.transliteration: Anta al-karimu fala tad'ani ta'ihan [.....] fa laqad 'iyyitu mina al-bi'ad al-na'i [.....] wa himaka abghi ya ilahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: مالي سِوى أعتابِ جودِكَ مَوْئِلٌ [.....] فَلَئِن طُرِدتُ فَمَن سِواكَ دوائي [.....] فَلَقد رَجَوتُكَ يا إلهي ضارِعاً [.....] بِمُحَمَدٍ أنْ لا تُخَيِب رَجائي [.....] وحِماكَ أبغي يا إلهي
wirds.en_wird_description: I have no where to resort to except the doorsteps of Your Generosity. If you dismiss me, there will be no one to heal me. I have implored You by Master Muhammad not to turn me down. Your Sanctuary I seek, God.
wirds.transliteration: Mali siwa atabi joodika ma'ilun [.....] fa lain turidtu faman siwaka da'ayi [.....] fa laqad rajawtuka ya ilahi darian [.....] bi muhammadin an la tukheyib rajai [.....] wa himaka abghi ya ilahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَفَتِ النَظرة،طابَتِ الحَضْرَة. [.....] جاءَتِ البُشرى لأهلِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: The sight has become clear, The Presence has become good… The Good tiding has arrived to the Men of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Safat an-nazrah, tabat al-hadhrah. [.....] Ja'at al-bushra li ahlil-lahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: قاموا سُكارى، بِذي البِشاره [.....] جعَلوا عِبارة،شُكراً للهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: They stood drunk by this good tiding. They made a statement of Thanks to Allah
wirds.transliteration: Qamu sukaran, bi al-bisharah [.....] Ja'alu 'ibarah, shukran lilahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: أيُها الحاضِر،اُذكُر وذاكِر. [.....] إياكَ تُنكِر،حالَ أهلِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: You, the heart-present, Make Dhikr and Talk. Never object to The spiritual state of the Men of God
wirds.transliteration: Ayyuha al-hadir, ukhkur wa dhakir. [.....] Iyyaka tunkir, hala ahlil-lahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: فَسَلِم لَهُم،فيما عراهُم [.....] واعلَمْ أنَّهم،غابوا في اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Accept what they have been upto. And know that they have been absented in God
wirds.transliteration: Faslim lahum, fima 'arahu [.....] Wa'lam anna hum, ghabu fi Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: فالوَجدُ فيهِم،داعي يَدعيهِم [.....] يطرأ عَلَيهِم بِذِكرِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Bewilderment within them Is a constant caller. That reminds them To make Dhikr of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Fawlajdu fihim, da'i yad'ihim [.....] Yatra'a 'alayhim bidhikrillahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: ومَن لَم يَجِد،فَليَتَواجَد [.....] قصداً يِتعَرَض لِفَضلِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Whoever is not bewildered, Let them appear to be. Intentionally expose themselves To the favor of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Wa man lam yajid, falayatwajid [.....] Qasdan yit'arra' li fadli Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: حَتَّى قَد ظَنَّ، مَن لَيسَ مِنَّا.  [.....]  أنَّا جُنِنَّابِذِكرِ اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Those who do not know us Thought that We have become insane, By (our excessive) (mention) of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hatta qad zanna, man laysa minna. [.....] Anna juninna bidhikrillahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: هَنيئاً لناثُمَّ بُشرانا [.....] أن كانَ لناحُمْقٌ في اللهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Congratulations and Good tidings for us. Because we have been In love with Allah
wirds.transliteration: Hani'an lanathumma bushrana [.....] An kana lana humqun fi Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَلّوُا عَلَى خَيْرِ الأَنَامْ. [.....] مَنْ خَصَّهُ المَوْلَىَ البَارِيْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shower Salawat on the Best of People whom the Creator has chosen.
wirds.transliteration: Sallu 'ala khayri al-anam. [.....] Man khassahu al-mawla al-bari

wirds.ar_wird_description: يَوْمَ القِيَامَهْ فِيْ الزِّحَامْ [.....] يَشْفَعْ لَنَا مِنْ حَرِّ النَّارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: On the Day of Resurrection, in the crowd, he approaches Allah to save us from the heat of the Fire.
wirds.transliteration: Yawm al-qiyamah fi al-ziham [.....] Yashfa' lana min harri an-nar

wirds.ar_wird_description: هَذَا الِّذِيْ سَرَىَ لَيْلاً [.....] ثُمَّ دَنَىْ فَتَدَلَّىْ
wirds.en_wird_description: This is the one who went on the night journey, then he came closer when Allah came close to him.
wirds.transliteration: Hatha alladhi sara laylan [.....] Thumma dana fatadalla

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَهُوَ فِيْ الأُفُقِ الأَعْلَى [.....] حَبَاهُ المُنّعِمُ السَّتَارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: While in the Upper Horizon, the Blesser and Coverer honored him.
wirds.transliteration: Wa huwa fi al-ufuq al-'ala [.....] Habahu al-mun'im al-sattar

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَادَاهُ يَا زَاكِيْ الخِصَالْ [.....] اشْفَعْ تُشّفَّعْ فِيْ المَآلْ
wirds.en_wird_description: He called him as the one of refined traits, approach us and your approach will be accepted for the final abode.
wirds.transliteration: Nadahu ya zaki al-khisal [.....] Ishfa' tushfa' fi al-ma'al

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَلُّوْا عَلِيِهْ تَحْظُوْا لَدِيِهْ [.....] فَالخَيْرُ لَدِيِهْ مِنَ الغَفَّارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Shower Salawat on him, you will be close to him; all goodness is with him from the All Forgiving.
wirds.transliteration: Sallu 'alayh tahzu lahdih [.....] Fa al-khayru ladayh mina al-ghaffar

wirds.ar_wird_description: سَيدي يا غالي يا غالي يا باهي الجَمالِ [.....] حَبيبي وطبيبي مُحَمَّد يا غالي
wirds.en_wird_description: My honorable, the dearest and Most Beautiful. My beloved and healer is Mohammad the dearest
wirds.transliteration: Sayyidi ya ghali ya ghali ya bahi al-jamal [.....] Habibi wa tabibi Muhammad ya ghali

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّد حبيبي وِصالَك طبيبي [.....] فاطفي لَهيبي بِنَظره إليَّ
wirds.en_wird_description: Mohammad, my beloved, linking with you is my healing, Put off my blaze by a look at me
wirds.transliteration: Muhammad habibi wasalak tabibi [.....] Fati'fi lahibi binazri ilayya

wirds.ar_wird_description: حبيبي وطَبيبي مُحَمَّد يا غالي. [.....] حبيبي وطَبيبي مُحَمَّد يا غالي
wirds.en_wird_description: My beloved, my healer, Mohammad the dearest. My beloved, my healer, Mohammad the dearest
wirds.transliteration: Habibi wa tabibi Muhammad ya ghali. [.....] Habibi wa tabibi Muhammad ya ghali

wirds.ar_wird_description: طاب لي خلع عذاري
wirds.en_wird_description: I liked to Show no Shame in love
wirds.transliteration: Tab li khala' 'adhari

wirds.ar_wird_description: طابَ لي خلعُ عِذاري [.....] في هَوى البَدرِ التَمام [.....] بافتقاري وانكساري [.....] أرتجي نَيلَ المرام
wirds.en_wird_description: I like to show no shame in my love for the Full Moon. By showing need and humility, I aspire to reach my goal
wirds.transliteration: Tab li khalu 'idhari [.....] fi hawa al-badr al-tamam [.....] biftiqari wa inksari [.....] Artaji nail al-maram

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا بُحورَ الجودِ جودوا [.....] بالعطايا ثُمَ عودوا [.....] لِمتى هذا الصدودِ [.....] ارحَموا القَلبَ الحَزين
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, the Ocean of Generosity, give more gifts and return back. Stop turning me down, and have mercy on the sad heart
wirds.transliteration: Ya buhur al-jood joodu [.....] bil-'ataaya thumma 'oodu [.....] limata hatha as-sudood [.....] irhamo al-qalba al-hazin

wirds.ar_wird_description: بابُ هادي الخَلقِ أحمَد [.....] رَحمَةٌ للعالَمين [.....] هوَ شَمسُ الدينِ حَقاً [.....] غَوثُ كُلِ العاشِقين
wirds.en_wird_description: The gate of the Human Guide, Ahmad, is a mercy to all worlds. He is the Sun of the Faith; he is the true help to all lovers
wirds.transliteration: Bab hadi al-khalq Ahmad [.....] rahmatan lil-'alamin [.....] huwa shamsu ad-deen haqqan [.....] ghawthu kulli al-ashiqeen

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا عَذولي لا تَلُمني [.....] ما على العاذِل مَلام [.....] أُدنُ مِني واروِ عَني [.....] أنا في العِشقِ إمام
wirds.en_wird_description: Blamers, stop blaming me; a lover cannot be blamed. Come closer to me, and copy me; I am at top in my love
wirds.transliteration: Ya 'adhooli la talumni [.....] ma 'ala al-'adhil malam [.....] udnu minni wa rawi 'anni [.....] ana fi al-ishqi imam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا أخا الأشواقِ يَمِم [.....] سيدَ الرُسلِ الكِرام [.....] واغنَمِ الذِكرى وزَمزِم [.....] بِصلاةٍ مع سلام
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, love-mates, head for the Most Distinguished of all honorable prophets. Seize opportunity and send more blessing and salaam
wirds.transliteration: Ya akha al-ashwaaq, yamim [.....] sayyida ar-rusul al-kiram [.....] wagnam al-dhikra wa zamzam [.....] bisalaatin ma'a salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: لِرسولِ اللهِ أحمَد [.....] كُلما جُنَّ الظلام [.....] كُلُ مَن والاهُ يَسعَدْ [.....] ويَنَلْ حُسنَ الخِتام
wirds.en_wird_description: To the Messenger of Allah, Ahmad, whenever night falls. Whoever supports him will be a winner, and have a good ending
wirds.transliteration: Lirasooli Allah Ahmad [.....] kullama junn al-zalam [.....] kullu man waalahu yas'ad [.....] wa yanal husna al-khitam

wirds.ar_wird_description: طاما أشكو غرامي
wirds.en_wird_description: I Always Cried in Love
wirds.transliteration: Tama ashku ghrami

wirds.ar_wird_description: طالما أشكو غرامي يا نورَ الوجودْ [.....] وأُنادي يا تِهامي يا مَعدِنَ الجودْ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have always cried in love, Light of the World. And called for the Inhabitant of Madinah, the Icon of Generosity
wirds.transliteration: Tama ashku ghrami ya noora al-wujood [.....] wa unadi ya tihami ya ma'dina al-jood

wirds.ar_wird_description: مُنيَتي أقصى مَرامي أحظى بِالشُهودْ [.....] وأرى بابَ السلامِ يا زاكي الجُدودْ
wirds.en_wird_description: My ultimate goal and wish is to behold You. And see the Door of Salaam, You of Most Noble Forefathers (Lineage).
wirds.transliteration: Muniati aqsa marami ahza bishuhood [.....] wa ara bab al-salam ya zaki al-judood

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا سِراجَ الكَونِ إنْي عاشِق مُستهَم [.....] مُغرَمٌ والمَدحُ فَنّي يا بَدرَ التَمامْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, the Sun of the Universe, I am a bewildered obsessed lover. Praise of you is my profession, Oh the Full Moon
wirds.transliteration: Ya siraja al-kawni inni 'ashiq mustaham [.....] mughram wal-madh hu fanni ya badra al-tamam

wirds.ar_wird_description: اصرِفِ الإعراضَ عَنّي أضناني الغرام [.....] فيكَ قَد أحسَنتُ ظني يا سامي العُهودْ
wirds.en_wird_description: Keep me away from any distraction; I’ve been ill with love. I thought good of you, the Noble Promise-Keeper
wirds.transliteration: Asrif al-iraada 'anni adhnani al-gharam [.....] fīka qad ahsant al-zanni ya sami al-uhud

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا إمامَ الأنبياء إنَّ قَلبي ذاب [.....] أرجو يا بحرَ الوفاءِ تَقبيلَ الأعتاب
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, the Leader of Prophets, my heart melted. I hope to kiss the doorstep, Oh the Ocean of Loyalty
wirds.transliteration: Ya imam al-anbiya inna qalbi dhab [.....] arju ya bahr al-wafa' taqbil al-a'tab

wirds.ar_wird_description: جُد وأنعِم باللقاء يا خَيرَ محمود [.....] يا نبيّاً قَد تَجلّى حقاً بِالجَمال
wirds.en_wird_description: Bless me with a courtesy meeting, Oh the Best Praiseworthy. You are the Prophet ﷺ that has truly shown his beauty
wirds.transliteration: Jood wa an'im bil-liqa' ya khayra mahmood [.....] ya nabiyan qad tajalla haqqan bil-jamal

wirds.ar_wird_description: وقفت بالذل في أبواب عزكم
wirds.en_wird_description: I Stood Humble at Your Glorious Doors
wirds.transliteration: Waqftu bil-dhulli fi abwabi 'izzikum

wirds.ar_wird_description: وَقَفتُ بِالذُلِّ في أبوابِ عِزكُمُ [.....] مُستَشفعاً مِنْ ذنوبي عندَكُم بِكُمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: I stood in humbleness at the doors of your glory Seeking intercession for my sins by you at your place
wirds.transliteration: Waqftu bil-dhulli fi abwabi 'izzikum [.....] mustashfa'an min dhunubi 'indakum bikum

wirds.ar_wird_description: أُعَفرُ الخَدَ في التُرابِ عسى [.....] أن تَرحموني وتَرضَوني عُبَيدُكُمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: I lower my face down to earth wishing.For you to have mercy on me and accept me as your little slave
wirds.transliteration: U'afrul khadda fi al-turabi 'asa [.....] an tarhamuni wa tardauni 'ubaydukum

wirds.ar_wird_description: فإن رَضيتُم فَيا عِزي ويا شَرَفي [.....] وإن أبيّتُم فمَن أرجوهُ غَيرَكُمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: If you accept, I will have real glory and honour.If you decline, I have no other one to hope for
wirds.transliteration: Fa in radhitum faya 'izzi wa ya sharafi [.....] wa in abitum faman arjohu ghayrukum

wirds.ar_wird_description: نَسيتُ كُلَّ طَريقٍ كُنتُ أعرِفُها [.....]  إلا طَريقاً يؤديني لِرَبعِكُمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: I have forgot all ways I used to know.Except the way that leads to your home
wirds.transliteration: Naseetu kulla tareeqin kuntu a'rifuha [.....] illa tareeqan yu'deeni li rab'ikum

wirds.ar_wird_description: أنا المُقِرُّ بِذَنبي فاصفَحوا كَرماً [.....] فبِذُلي وانكساري قَد أتَيتُكمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: I am the one who admits sins, and seek your noble forgiveness.I have come to you with humility and broken heart
wirds.transliteration: Ana al-muqirru bidhambee fasfa'hoo karaman [.....] fabidhulli wa inkisari qad ataytukum

wirds.ar_wird_description: لا تَطرُدوني فإني قَد عُرِفتُ بِكُم  [.....] وصِرتُ بَينَ الورى أُدعى بِعَبدِكُمُ
wirds.en_wird_description: Do not dismiss me as I have been known by you  And among people I have been called as your slave
wirds.transliteration: La tatrudooni fa inni qad 'uriftu bikum [.....] wa sirtu bayna al-wara' ud'aa bi'abdikum

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا آل بيت الرسالة
wirds.en_wird_description: You, the Family of House of the Message
wirds.transliteration: Ya Ahl Bayt al-Risalah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا آل بَيتِ الرِسالة [.....] لَكُم نَشكو الأحوالَ [.....] حِملي واقِع يا يا رِجال [.....] بنَظرة مِنكُم ينشالَ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh the family of House of the Message!.To you we complain our situations!.My load is down, oh men! By a look of yours I will be up again!
wirds.transliteration: Ya Ahl Bayti al-Risalah [.....] Lakum nashku al-ahwala [.....] Himli waqi' ya ya rijal [.....] Binazrah minkum yunsha'al

wirds.ar_wird_description: جِئتُكُم يا آلَ البيت [.....] وفي حِماكُم حَطيت [.....] ولِلأعتاب إلتَجيت [.....] أبغي مِنكُم وِصالا
wirds.en_wird_description: I came to you, the family of the house!.In your fold, I settled!.To your doorstep I resorted! Seeking a link with you!
wirds.transliteration: Jitukum ya Ahl al-Bayt [.....] Wa fi himakum hatayt [.....] Wa lil-a'tab iltajeet [.....] Abghi minkum wisala

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا أعَزِّ مِنِ الرُوحِ نظرَه [.....] تِشفي لي جُروحي [.....] يا ذا الوَجهِ الصَبوحِ [.....] قَلبي إلَيكُم مالا
wirds.en_wird_description: You who are dearer than my soul!.Give me a look that heals my wounds!.You with the enlightened face! My heart has leaned to you!
wirds.transliteration: Ya A'azzi min al-ruhi nazrah [.....] Tishfi li juroohi [.....] Ya dha al-wajhi al-sabuhi [.....] Qalbi ilaykum mala

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا اهلَ العَبا يا أسياد [.....] يا أفاضِل يا أمجاد [.....] جَدُكُم خيرُ الأجداد [.....] مِنه نِلنا الأمانا
wirds.en_wird_description: You, the people of the Cloak!.You, the distinguished and glorious!.Your grandfather is the best grandpa! From him we have received security!
wirds.transliteration: Ya Ahl al-'Aba ya Asiyad [.....] Ya Afadil ya Amjad [.....] Jaddukum khayru al-ajdad [.....] Minhu nilna al-amana

wirds.ar_wird_description: يالا بَيتِ النُبوه [.....] يا اهلَ العَزِم والقُوه [.....] نظرة يا اهلَ المُروة [.....] للشَجي تِصلِح حالا
wirds.en_wird_description: You the family of the Prophet ﷺ!.People of determination and power!.Provide a look, you noble! That would fix the state of the lover!
wirds.transliteration: Ya Ahl Bayti al-Nubuwah [.....] Ya Ahl al-'Azm wa al-Quwwah [.....] Nazrah ya Ahl al-Murwa [.....] Lil-shaji tislah hala

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا خير مولود بمكة قد أتى
wirds.en_wird_description: O the best born in Mecca who has arrived
wirds.transliteration: Ya khayra mawloodin bimaakkata qad ataa

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا خَيرَ مَولودٍ بِمَكَةَ قَد أتى [.....] ذَلت لِهَيبَتهِ جميعُ خُصومِهِ [.....] يا خَيرَ مَولود يا نبينا
wirds.en_wird_description: O the best of the born in Mecca who came to us, all his opponents were taken by his awe. The best of the born, you are our Prophet.
wirds.transliteration: Ya khayra mawloodin bimaakkata qad ataa [.....] Dhallat li hayibatihi jamee'u khusoomihi [.....] Ya khayra mawloodin ya nabiyyina

wirds.ar_wird_description: ضاءَت بهِ كُلُّ العوالِم جَهرَةً [.....] والكَونُ أصبَحَ مُشرقاً بِقدومهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: All worlds were clearly enlightened by him. The universe was enlightened by his arrival.
wirds.transliteration: Da'at bihi kullu al-'awalim jahratan [.....] Wal-kawnu asbaha mushriqan bi-qudoomihi

wirds.ar_wird_description: هذا الحَبيبُ المُصطفَى طَهَ الذي [.....] كُلُ العَوالِمِ قَد بَدَت مِنْ نُوِرهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: This is the Beloved Chosen one, Taha, from whose light all worlds came out.
wirds.transliteration: Hatha al-habeebu al-mustafa Taha alladhi [.....] Kullu al-'awalim qad badat min noorihi

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رجال الله داركوا لله
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh Men of God, Help
wirds.transliteration: Ya rijala Allah darikoo lil-lah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رِجالَ اللهِ دارِكوا للهِ [.....] وأنظُرونانَظره كرماً للهِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Men of God, Help for God. And look at us for the sake of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Ya rijala Allah darikoo lil-lahi [.....] Wa anzuroona nazrah karamallil-lah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رِجالاً غابوافي حَضْرَةِ اللهِ [.....] كثُليجه ذابواواللهِ والله
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Men absented in the presence of God. Melted like a piece of snow, by Allah, by Allah
wirds.transliteration: Ya rijalan ghaboo fi hadratil-lahi [.....] Kathuleeja thaboo wallahi wallahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: إن غنَّى المُغَني في جمالِ الله [.....] فقاموالِلمعنى طَرباً لله
wirds.en_wird_description: When the singer sings on the beauty of Allah. They stand for the meaning enchanted by Allah
wirds.transliteration: In ghannal-mughanni fi jamali Allah [.....] Fa qaamoo lil ma'naa taraban lil-lah

wirds.ar_wird_description: تراهُم سُكارى عِندَ ذِكرِ الله [.....] تراهُم حيارى واللهِ والله
wirds.en_wird_description: You see them drunken on the mention of Allah, You see them bewildered by Allah, by Allah
wirds.transliteration: Taraahum sukaraaa 'inda dhikri Allah [.....] Taraahum hiyaraaa wallahi wallahi

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا سيدي يا رسول الله
wirds.en_wird_description: O, Most Honorable Messenger of Allah
wirds.transliteration: Ya Sayyidi Ya Rasool Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا سَيدي يا رسولَ الله [.....] يا مَن لَهُ الجاهُ عندَ الله [.....] إنَّ المُسيئينَ قد جاؤك [.....] بِالذَنبِ يَستغفرونَ الله
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Most Honorable, Messenger of Allah. The one with status in the eye of Allah. The wrongdoers have come. With sins asking for forgiveness
wirds.transliteration: Ya Sayyidi Ya Rasoola Allah [.....] Ya man lahoo al-jaahu 'inda Allah [.....] Inna al-musayyi'een qad jaa'ook [.....] Bil-zanbi yastaghfiroon Allah

wirds.ar_wird_description: صَلوا على خيرِ الأنام [.....] المُصطفى بَدرِ التمام [.....] صلوا عليهِ وسلموا [.....] يشفع لنا يومَ الزِحام
wirds.en_wird_description: Send blessing to the best of people. The Chosen like the Full Moon. Send blessing to him with salam. To get intercession on the Day of Crowd
wirds.transliteration: Sallu 'ala khayri al-anam [.....] Al-Mustafa Badri al-Tamam [.....] Sallu 'alayhi wa sallimu [.....] Yashfa'u lana yawma al-Ziham

wirds.ar_wird_description: حليمةٌ لمّا رأت [.....] أنوارَهُ قَد أشرَقت [.....] مالَت إلَيهِ وعانَقَت [.....] وقبَلَت تحتَ اللِثام
wirds.en_wird_description: When Halimah saw his light shining. She leaned down and hugged, and kissed under the veil
wirds.transliteration: Haleemah lamma ra'at [.....] Anwarahu qad ashrakat [.....] Maalat ilayhi wa 'anaqat [.....] Waqbalat tahta al-litham

wirds.ar_wird_description: وأنشَدت وهيَ تَقول [.....] لِبَعلها نِلنا القَبول [.....] لا شَكَّ في هذا الرسول [.....] هذا المُظَلَل بِالغمام
wirds.en_wird_description: She started singing and saying. To her husband ‘We’ve been accepted’. No doubt this is the Messenger. This is the one Shaded with the Cloud
wirds.transliteration: Wa anshadat wa hiya taqool [.....] Li ba'liha nilna al-qubool [.....] La shakaa fi hadha al-rasool [.....] Hada al-muthallal bil-ghamama

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا رَبِّ بِالهادي الأمين [.....] رَسولُ رَبِّ العالَمين [.....] اغفِر ذُنوبَ الحاضِرين [.....] وَتُب علينا يا سلام
wirds.en_wird_description: O Lord, by the Trustworthy Guide. The Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds. Forgive the sins of all present. And get back to us, oh Salaam
wirds.transliteration: Ya Rabbi bil-haadi al-ameen [.....] Rasoolu Rabbi al-'aalameen [.....] Ighfir dhunooba al-haadirin [.....] Wa tub 'alayna ya Salaam

wirds.ar_wird_description: شَوقي إلى ذاكَ الحَبيب [.....] فَلَيسَ لي عَيشٌ يَطيب [.....] فاجعَل لِقاكَ لي نَصيب [.....] يا خِتام الرُسلِ الكِرام
wirds.en_wird_description: My yearning is for that Beloved. I have no good life without him. Let me have a meeting with you. The Seal of Honorable Messengers
wirds.transliteration: Shawqi ila thaka al-habeeb [.....] Fa laysa li 'ayshun yateeb [.....] Fajil liqa'aka li naseeb [.....] Ya Khitam al-Rusul al-Kiraam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا لَيتَ شِعري هَلْ أرى [.....] ذاكَ الضَريحَ الأنوَرا [.....] قَبرٌ حَوى خَيرُ الوَرى [.....] مِنْ قَبلِ مَوتي والسَلام
wirds.en_wird_description: O, could it really be true that I see. That Most Enlightened Abode. The Abode of the Best of Creation. Before I die, and Regards
wirds.transliteration: Ya layta shi'ri hal ara [.....] Dhaka al-dhareeha al-anwara [.....] Qabrun hawa khayru al-wara [.....] Min qabli mauti wal-salam

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا طير وين مروح
wirds.en_wird_description: Bird, Where are You Going
wirds.transliteration: Ya Teer, Wain Marouh

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا طِير وينِ مرَوِح [.....] نحوَ المَدينه ساري  [.....] باللهِ بَلّغ سلامي [.....] لكاملِ الأنوارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh bird, where are you going! To Madinah, you journey at night? By Allah pass my regards to the Perfectly-Lighted.
wirds.transliteration: Ya Teer, Wain Marouh [.....] Nahwa al-Madina, Saari [.....] Billahi Balligh Salami [.....] Li Kamil al-Anwar

wirds.ar_wird_description: يا طَيبه ما أحلاكِ [.....] كلُ الورى بيِهواكِ.  [.....] فيكِ النبيُّ الزاكي [.....] منِ حُسنِهِ البدرُ غار
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh Taybah, how beautiful you are! All people fall in your love. You have the noble Prophet ﷺ! The moon felt jealous of his beauty!
wirds.transliteration: Ya Taybah, Ma Ahlaki [.....] Kullu al-Wara Bi-hawaaki [.....] Fiki al-Nabi al-Zaki [.....] Min Husnihi al-Badr Ghaar

wirds.ar_wird_description: متى وَصَلتَ الحِمى [.....] سَلِم على فاطِمه  [.....] قُلّو مُحِبَك هائما [.....] عَوَقَتهُ الأقدارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: When you get to their fold, Pass regards to Fatimah! Tell them your lover is bewildered! Just being held against his will!
wirds.transliteration: Mata Wasalta al-Hima [.....] Sallim 'ala Fatimah [.....] Qul-loo Muhibbak Haa'iman [.....] Awaqatuhu al-Aqdar

wirds.ar_wird_description: صِديق يا صِديقِ [.....] ألقاكَ يومَ الضيقِ  [.....] كُنتَ خَيرَ رَفيقِ [.....] يُشهَد لَكُم في الغارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh Siddique, Most Truthful, See you on the day of Constriction! You ‘ve been the best companion That’ve been witnessed in the Cave!
wirds.transliteration: Siddiq Ya Siddiqi [.....] Alqaaka Yawm al-Dhiqi [.....] Kunta Khayra Rafiqi [.....] Yushhad Lakum fi al-Ghaar

wirds.ar_wird_description: عُمَر يابّنَ الخَطابِ [.....] يا مُلهَم بِالَصَوابِ  [.....] قَلبي بِحُبَك صابي [.....] يا مُرعِبَ الكُفارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Omar bin al-Khattab! Oh, the rightly-inspired! My heart is in love with you! You who scared the infidel!
wirds.transliteration: Omar Ya Ibn al-Khattab [.....] Ya Mulham Bil-Sawab [.....] Qalbi Bi-Hubbak Saabi [.....] Ya Mur'ib al-Kuffar

wirds.ar_wird_description: عُثمانُ ابّنُ العَفّانِ [.....] ذو الحيا والإمانِ. [.....] يا جامِعَ القُرآنِ [.....] ويا شَهيدَ الدارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Othman bin Affan, Known for modesty and faith! You have collected the Quran! You are the martyr of the house!
wirds.transliteration: Uthman Ibn al-Affan [.....] Dhul Haya wal-Iman [.....] Ya Jami' al-Quran [.....] Wa Ya Shaheed al-Dar

wirds.ar_wird_description: عَليُّ ابنُ أبي طالِب [.....] يا صانِعَ الْعَجَايِب [.....] يا مُفَرِّق الكتايب [.....] بالسيفِ ذو الفَقارِ
wirds.en_wird_description: Oh, Ali bin Abi Taleb, You are the Maker of wonders! Oh, scare out attackers with the sword of Dhul-Fiqar
wirds.transliteration: Aliyy Ibn Abi Talib [.....] Ya Saani'a al-Ajayeeb [.....] Ya Mufarriq al-Katayeeb [.....] Bil-Sayfi Dhul-Fiqar
